| | Peter,

This weekend, Sen. Elizabeth Warren and I held a town hall in Omaha, Nebraska, and I left feeling so inspired.
[](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/KK8CQz9uAnmCxtYNuUVZRA~~/AAPPABA~/oiGI9nSTszQiT_dizWMSubSyPBSQOl97Smbs62gWF1biB9losP_C7-SWxqe_mZPl_D1C1Diw0aPSjXLucfT7y8-_thOOoDMOdwQz3yn6KMqNl84DVv9oFEIwoyl0xf0_PjQqRXnROf_TmvEudb6x-qQrSwjaQotc8o3kQ48zUhuGeb1_9XWe_mWQqfQIsB1d0j-1sd2mkrMQMTlTziKcPpukYFcqCTfTGd5LZcXv88G8DyjB7yrgiBJPz8SlHenn79kwWKCmxN3_iECbVU5o5ETh415TwvOritYxVY2FI0nMH1W0ms9cSGWyvbgogSaiwVv6z7ek0XZmXTL27Oj1L4hJGgTl8Df2SL5K0twn6yQ~)
| [DONATE TO KEEP UP THIS MOMENTUM >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/H734gMsUeYOzIiaRToxw5Q~~/AAPPABA~/oiGI9nSTszQiT_dizWMSubSyPBSQOl97Smbs62gWF1biB9losP_C7-SWxqe_mZPlimAD9Kqd660uif6SEDe1v-Dv9L7a-6EoAKa48-QF9c536ieDOs3t9LAbSCELuNHYDR_4RdCnb8mplxjHf_mt5XSNruhVAU0YvWzD02c1j8Sw0-t74FGtOLQReuTiPBUQ6IsTu7EUYmTvfF6lbIW015-v7JCo1URwgdLT2L_0OjwnmWHqWr71zFZ5U-Y_388AhmaXutRtB6GyudK6Oqrc_XQ8I9AbjGzblnVX44S1kd3ZV3S3SI75qq1KPAmB9vrMdWtY9ryfByqmPIpwjjF9e8NR1P-gSxc7xnuDHQItrrI~)
---
Thousands of people turned out to demand better answers from their leaders and make their voices heard — _all thanks to Democrats across the country, chipping in to fund these town halls._

**Seeing families, young people, and seniors all stand up together reminds me what this fight is all about — building a country that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected.**

But here’s the truth: While folks are showing up and speaking out, too many Republican leaders are still refusing to listen to the very people they were elected to serve.

**That’s why I’m committed to continuing this work, Peter. And I’ll keep traveling across the country to hold town halls in red districts, because no matter where you live, you deserve a representative who will actually show up.**

But hosting these events takes real resources: travel, venues, organizing. And I can only do it because of grassroots donations from people like you.
[**_So I’m asking: Will you chip in $25, $10, or even $5 today to help me fund more town halls in red districts and keep this momentum going? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/KK8CQz9uAnmCxtYNuUVZRA~~/AAPPABA~/oiGI9nSTszQiT_dizWMSubSyPBSQOl97Smbs62gWF1biB9losP_C7-SWxqe_mZPl_D1C1Diw0aPSjXLucfT7y8-_thOOoDMOdwQz3yn6KMqNl84DVv9oFEIwoyl0xf0_PjQqRXnROf_TmvEudb6x-qQrSwjaQotc8o3kQ48zUhuGeb1_9XWe_mWQqfQIsB1d0j-1sd2mkrMQMTlTziKcPpukYFcqCTfTGd5LZcXv88G8DyjB7yrgiBJPz8SlHenn79kwWKCmxN3_iECbVU5o5ETh415TwvOritYxVY2FI0nMH1W0ms9cSGWyvbgogSaiwVv6z7ek0XZmXTL27Oj1L4hJGgTl8Df2SL5K0twn6yQ~)

clean_body: | ~ | | Peter, This weekend, Sen. Elizabeth Warren and I held a town hall in Omaha, Nebraska, and I left feeling so inspired. ~ | ~ Thousands of people turned out to demand better answers from their leaders and make their voices heard — all thanks to Democrats across the country, chipping in to fund these town halls. Seeing families, young people, and seniors all stand up together reminds me what this fight is all about — building a country that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. But here’s the truth: While folks are showing up and speaking out, too many Republican leaders are still refusing to listen to the very people they were elected to serve. That’s why I’m committed to continuing this work, Peter. And I’ll keep traveling across the country to hold town halls in red districts, because no matter where you live, you deserve a representative who will actually show up. But hosting these events takes real resources: travel, venues, organizing. Peter,

Last week, _Axios_ reported that Donald Trump is openly calling for a **100-seat Republican supermajority** in the U.S. House — which he plans to achieve through mid-decade gerrymandering and eliminating mail-in voting altogether.

Let's be clear: this is a blatant power grab designed to silence voters and cement Republican control for years to come.

But EMILYs List is ready for this fight. We know that Americans — especially women — are struggling right now and want leaders who will fight for them. Trump and his MAGA allies are doing the opposite: trying to take away our voices at the ballot box.

That's why we're recruiting, training, and electing **Democratic pro-choice women** who can protect our freedoms and stop Trump's extremist agenda in its tracks.

We don't have time to waste.

clean_body: Axios reported Trump wants to create a 100-seat Republican supermajority in the U.S. House — by rigging districts and eliminating mail-in voting. | = Axios reported Trump wants to create a 100-seat Republican supermajority in the U.S. House — by rigging districts and eliminating mail-in voting. We can't let this power grab succeed. Chip in now to help EMILYs List elect women who will fight back: | = Peter, Last week, Axios reported that Donald Trump is openly calling for a 100-seat Republican supermajority in the U.S. House — which he plans to achieve through mid-decade gerrymandering and eliminating mail-in voting altogether. Let's be clear: this is a blatant power grab designed to silence voters and cement Republican control for years to come. But EMILYs List is ready for this fight. We know that Americans — especially women — are struggling right now and want leaders who will fight for them. Trump and his MAGA allies are doing the opposite: trying to take away our voices at the ballot box. That's why we're recruiting, training, and electing Democratic pro-choice women who can protect our freedoms and stop Trump's extremist agenda in its tracks. We don't have time to waste. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. With the fight for the Senate a toss-up, our August fundraising shortfall is raising alarm bells. We know Democrats aren’t having the same problem, with the army of megadonors lining up behind their candidates.

The good news is that we still have time to close the gap before the end of the month deadline expires at the end of the week.

[**I hope I can count on your financial support. clean_body: I wanted to personally share with you the handwritten note my campaign finance director just passed to me during our meeting. | Fellow American, I wanted to personally share with you the handwritten note my campaign finance director just passed to me during our meeting. With the fight for the Senate a toss-up, our August fundraising shortfall is raising alarm bells. We know Democrats aren’t having the same problem, with the army of megadonors lining up behind their candidates. The good news is that we still have time to close the gap before the end of the month deadline expires at the end of the week. For America, Steve Daines P.S. I don’t usually share internal meeting notes like this. But with Democrats shattering fundraising records, I wanted to be 100% transparent about what we’re facing. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

### **[Want more raw, unfiltered conversations with voices like Mallory McMorrow? Become a paid subscriber to support Endless Urgency today](https://substack.com/redirect/329c94b0-c0dc-483f-994d-990195cf0cb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 👇**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/329c94b0-c0dc-483f-994d-990195cf0cb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
I went live with State Senator Mallory McMorrow to talk about Trump's push to militarize American cities, why Republicans are panicking over Alex Acosta, and what it means to run for office when you're _not_ the establishment's favorite. It's a must-watch if you care about safety, justice, and what the Democratic Party could be if we had the guts to listen more and posture less.
▶️ **04:20** - Trump's "security theater" may be coming to Chicago. Why the show of force is all about fear--and how it's making our cities _less_ safe.
▶️ **08:12** - The chilling atacks on Kilmar Abrego Garcia and how it's breaking trust with law enforcement across immigrant communities.
▶️ **21:03** - The Epstein cover-up cracks open. What Acosta's backroom testimony means and why the survivors' stories are finally taking center stage.
▶️ **28:56** - Mallory on why she's running. A powerful vision for a Democratic Party that's about service, not spectacle--and what it takes to reconnect with voters who've stopped believing in politics altogether.
**[If you believe, like I do, that we deserve a political movement that's courageous, compassionate, and willing to fight for the truth--this is the kind of conversation we need more of. Become a paid subscriber for $8 per month to support work that refuses to look away from what matters most.](https://substack.com/redirect/329c94b0-c0dc-483f-994d-990195cf0cb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
---
| | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492
---

subject: Here’s what happened to Social Security

body:
These changes might definitely affect you, so I want you to be the first to hear about what I just signed into law!
| | | | |

## **_MESSAGE FROM THE PRESIDENT ON SOCIAL SECURITY!_**

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Friend,
These changes might definitely affect you!
Here’s what happened to Social Security:
I just signed into LAW something I’m very proud of: NO TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY!

**But don’t thank me yet.**
_Democrats and Radical Judges are trying to shut down all the progress we’ve made TOGETHER. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas._
It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late.

All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY:

[YES](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[NO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[END TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you,

name: Naomi at Grijalva HQ
subject: It's Ballot Drop Week!🗳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
🚨Early voting begins this Wednesday, join us this weekend!🚨

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7595c1a4adca/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10308858?e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|

| | | | | |
# IT’S BALLOT DROP WEEK!
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| | Hi Peter,
Ballots drop THIS Wednesday and there are various events this week where you can chime in and help us elect the first Latina to Congress!
This weekend, **voters will have their ballots in hand** , so we need YOU to help reach them. This weekend we are having our Latina Leaders for Adelita with local Latina leaders joining us!
🗓️ **Tuesday, Aug 26 @ 6:00 PM** \- [**AZ Clean Elections Debate LIVESTREAM**](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=9f7d0802c3&e=f7c3700ccb) 🗓️ **Wednesday Aug 27@ 5:30 PM** – [Canvass in Sahuarita!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=642e8d8429&e=f7c3700ccb)[**📱**](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=ef8d69b3f0&e=f7c3700ccb)**Wednesday-Thursday @ 5:30 PM** – [Virtual Phonebanking to Voters!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=9c4783bdc9&e=f7c3700ccb)🚪 **Saturday, Aug 23 @ 8:30 AM** – [Canvass in Tucson! ](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=14aaee3285&e=f7c3700ccb)
The stakes are high: our students, our Department of Education, our future. This fight starts with us—**talking to voters, turning them out, and showing them what’s possible when we organize**.
So—will you be joining us? 👊🏽
---
| | **Here’s what’s happening this week:****Canvassing Door to Door!** Help us make phone calls, go door-to-door and connect with voters face-to-face.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=f033f72c2f&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **Saturday Canvass in Tucson: Latinas Lead 4 Adelita** Saturday, August 29th @ 8:30 AM2720 E Broadway Blvd. Tucson, AZ
---
| [RSVP to Tucson Canvass!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=19e6134384&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=37ec5921b1&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **FOR OUR PEOPLE FOR OUR PUEBLO IN YUMA****JOIN US!** Saturday, August 23rd @ 4:00 PM
---
| [RSVP for AVONDALE!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=a2d52cb33b&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=2a7578f213&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | **VIRTUAL PHONE BANK****JOIN US** TOMORROW August 19th @ 5:30PM
---
| [RSVP to VIRTUAL PHONE BANK](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=ac3c790090&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| | For a smoother experience, please**download MiniVAN ahead of your canvass**. [Here](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=9599df500e&e=f7c3700ccb) is a guide if you need any help. MiniVAN is the program we use to share your list of doors to knock and where we log responses. **Download links** : MiniVAN for [iPhone](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=5abd40d954&e=f7c3700ccb) and [Android](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=2435e6e2d4&e=f7c3700ccb).
---
| | Will you be joining us this weekend? 🤩
Thank you for all the energy you’ve brought so far—your time, your voice, and your presence are making a real difference. As we head into these final weeks, let’s stay grounded in our shared purpose and continue showing up for one another.
If you have any questions or need anything from our team, we’re here to support you. Reach out anytime at **volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com**
Let’s keep learning, growing, and building—together.
**Naomi De La Rosa Arellano**
---

Texas Governor Greg Abbott’s decision to redistrict his state's Congressional Districts mid-decade is a blatant attempt to rig the 2026 election before a single vote is even cast.

**But California is fighting back.**

Governor Gavin Newsom has signed the Election Rigging Response Act, which gives Californians the opportunity to push back by giving the voters the final say on November 4, 2025. Unlike in Texas where the legislators are picking their voters, California allows the voters to pick their U.S. representatives.

[We didn’t ask for this fight, but the gerrymandering in Texas calls us to action. Will you join me in standing with my California colleagues today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113990688/565622109/1606729196?source=EM_NBI_JP_20250825_EN_Redistricting_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBjNmE0Mi0xZjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3BF9-KLordX0UavyP_u4wJq74MRxHG_5Jc6JoMpXrU=&emci=efb5cb19-e881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=960c6a42-1f82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6108787) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO MINE IN SUPPORT OF CA DEMOCRATS >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113990691/565622115/1606729196?source=EM_NBI_JP_20250825_EN_Redistricting_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBjNmE0Mi0xZjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3BF9-KLordX0UavyP_u4wJq74MRxHG_5Jc6JoMpXrU=&emci=efb5cb19-e881-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=960c6a42-1f82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6108787)

name: Ryan Girdusky, 1776 Project Foundation
subject: Tucker Carlson answered my prayers.
body:
He did a MIRACLE for me. My message to him

| |
---
| | Tucker Carlson, _from the bottom of my heart_ , _**thank you!**_

Your courage changed the lives of **_MILLIONS_** of children, and my life as well. _Let me explain..._
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr90qiqvq5svjcq9enmjikn6pglta464p6e5vs8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9g64ob4cth2bs)
---
Patriot, it all started during the pandemic. I discovered the _**HORROR**_ of what our children are being taught in schools.
__My own Godson had been given a so-called “kids’ book” that accused police of being racist and labeled every white child as an “oppressor.”__

Thanks to the **RIDICULOUS** school shutdowns, kids were forced to take classes remotely...
**... And for the FIRST TIME EVER, parents were able to listen in and hear exactly what their kids were being taught!**

>> Radical leftist teachers were __**BRAINWASHING**__ students with radical, Anti-American propaganda.
>> Education standards were __**PLUMMETING**__ as schools prioritized **INDOCTRINATION** over EDUCATION.

>> Parents were being _lied_ to and _mistreated_.

>> Students were being _groomed_ and _indoctrinated_ with a sick brand of sexual woke-ism.

**Soros and his WOKE army were spending BILLIONS to indoctrinate, brainwash, and ROT the minds of our children._And the WORST PART..._**

...There wasn’t a SINGLE conservative group doing **ANYTHING TO STOP HIM**.

**These conservative parents and school board members were ABANDONED by the establishment to fight against the JUGGERNAUT Soros created. **

_**Alone in my apartment, I decided to do SOMETHING and launched an organization that would change the entire political landscape.**_

The __1776 PROJECT PAC__ was born that day.

It was just me. No billionaires. No lobbyists. _An _empty_ bank account._

I prayed for help, and it came.

**Tucker Carlson had the courage to have me on his show and ask his viewers to make a contribution.__Within 24 hours__ , we were FLOODED with more than $100,000 in support!**

It was a **MIRACLE.**

I’ve spent the last half-decade FIGHTING and WINNING!

✅ Flipped _**270+ school board**_ seats from LIBERAL to CONSERVATIVE.
✅ Saved _**4.5 million students**_ from leftist indoctrination.
✅ Built the _**FIRST**_ national movement dedicated to saving schools.

And now we’re _**EXPANDING**_ our mission with the 1776 Project Foundation!

-> We’re **BUILDING** an **ARMY of PATRIOTIC** education officials and parents!

-> We’re **SUPPLYING** school boards with **CRITICAL** policies to _**LASER FOCUS**_ and **DESTROY** the leftist indoctrination!

-> We’re **PROVIDING** a**LETHAL** weapon (our 167-page school board member guide) that trains every Conservative school board member to dismember the radical left’s insanity!

->We’re **ARMING** parents with a **POWERFUL** weapon (a parents’ guide to school board advocacy) that shows them how to TARGET and CRUSH radicalism in schools.

We’re not just EDUCATING parents and EQUIPPING school board members... _**We're DESTROYING Soros’s plans and building a NEW Conservative-led power structure to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS!**_

But we can’t do any of it without __**YOU!**__

-> Your help means we can build up our ARMY of conservative school board members and parents.

_**- > Your help means we can IMPLEMENT Trump’s executive orders BANNING CRT and transgender ideology in schools!**_

_**- > Your help with just $5 can supply our DEVASTATING weapon (our 167-page school board member guide) to school board members!**_

And any donation you give is __**TAX DEDUCIBLE!!**__

[_**So if you can provide just $5, you can physically put a guidebook in the hands of a school board member.**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo88u7d4r6cabe82ckkqf7u1dfg5si8vrbcnvfto_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9g64ob4cth2bs)
---
[ SPONSOR A GUIDEBOOK! ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn5vcsn70a096p9cehdd0vpmj8oiggj2rtovv4no_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9g64ob4cth2bs)
---
You’ve been a blessing to me and to millions of kids across America. But this fight is about to get even bigger, even harder, and even more urgent.

_**_[If you can, we’d be HONORED to have your support in the next leg of this fight!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5bvl9nv4c391o4fd8d4meulj3le7vlor25ggprg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9g64ob4cth2bs)_**_

Thank you,
Ryan Girdusky
Founder, 1776 Project PAC
---

subject: This can’t wait any longer
body:
I won’t back down. I won’t fold. I won’t sell out.

This is Trump-endorsed, battle-tested MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds -- and the Radical Left has declared WAR on my campaign for Governor of Florida.

>From the moment I announced I was running for Governor of Florida the Democrats have been relentless in their _**[attacks against me.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze01sjnkslr6eamg8vo1b65ctrhe5puv509ngh28_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9g6cpj2cjh2bs "attacks against me.")**_

They've teamed up with their buddies in the Fake News, launching _NATIONAL smear campaigns_ , hit pieces, and relentless lies to destroy my reputation.

_But they aren 't just attacking me. They are attacking my family, my friends, my allies, and the MAGA movement._

The same Democrats who wasted **$45 MILLION** trying to flip Florida Blue are gearing up to dump MILLIONS MORE to crush this campaign. They're BEGGING me to back down and surrender.

But let me make this clear: I won't back down. I won't fold. I won't sell out.

_Thankfully President Trump chose me for a reason_. I'm a fighter, period. With every attack from the Left I become stronger and more determined to maintain the American First way of life for Florida.

So will you please stand with me by chipping in _**[$20.25, $50, or $100](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr8e8ci9r39llf58dkfo7uedho60tja4qhej1nn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9g6cpj2cjh2bs "$20.25, $50, or $100")**_ to help me become Florida's next governor? With your help, we'll send a clear message to the Radical Left that we won't be intimidated.

Byron

It’s what patriots like YOU made possible.It's my personal thank you to the patriots who lit the match for this conservative youth REVOLUTION...And it’s how you and I are going to hit the Left TWICE as hard to SAVE America. You and I were never supposed to be winning... Yet here we are.So thank you, patriot — in advance — for taking the time to read my message to you. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1873, the[ first free kindergarten](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAQgOHT4M7RMBjjFBSvcZfXbmnhMCazwhABTuTbr7JX2P7XV_xft-XmOHIK_91Otm15SfSukVqjsmzRhfUoiVN4UnKxnW_ynlNYEFD3MPU4Lt5xPJeh83YjQlIdWWn0iIAGsHvYqzFwV36VcpLSa3m_DkpJID2sq1Nadmw_Gkw4SgAN8oJACGQ8EZirNloMQJ5bLpfvzKk9aItnflG53PPeRfto7VmF-idwFjjvXGs-Ckfe6BMInN0Rjtp6HHs5GSVw7or1zzfHyHU0YoCwO46_WvvTgpfFnwAAAP__FRFuBw) in the U.S. was opened in Carondelet, Missouri, by educator Susan Blow. She taught the children in the morning, while educating the teachers in the afternoon. Weddings may be priceless in memory, but the price tag looks very different depending on where you say _“I do.”_ Below, we report on the average [cost of a wedding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLEOmzAYhJ_GbI5-_mBMBg9d2NK1I3LiAxwZG9luKG9f0Vfo9kl3-nS6X8_paX3wcflpN5g6pyniKAG1Ik9zsMvrd44-LjuiDfU84JyPy8TEStIguZ-c9eGcusaZGWDcG5hWq56JNXGzmn4eXhp8R6s6Sw-t-f1Qmtg5TUrbtvHmstHAfUukqL0xgQnaAaQfSivREZyvKd8-yce6Yg5n-iLf3mlrgllr3Yu4_xA8Ch7juadSr0jweIkFjzRcfFHwM0o9A64mDvlBLjilL7KukDFJllsqVeLPjlj8F3IP9g1Zk1xQ5WZz9nCCxyYbtx8-BF96LTpaNuvDv0H1v178Gv4bAAD__1E5hQA). ## Trump Signs Orders Targeting Flag Burning
President Trump on Monday signed a [pair of executive orders](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdEbLgu1L4SIN3aVNiQxeYCNjkO07cn8fEeUP0o00mhm9-bwPd8eB4_LhNrJl3odIZw5UCqVhDm4ZHylyXA6KLpTXSd5zXAYEVBJuEvXgHYfX0FXezkRIbUW2MUojoAGsVjuZsWnUZFpvaCQ1uxbmW2ucH7V2uu0qtlcb3FA3AAqaGoEQyHgiMG_KKNEBeS57qr92jmWlObz2J6V62rcq2LWUI4v2XWAvsD_Ps57GfFFcvsD-kgL7kh7bIS8k-cckJ5fXQDnL0XGQ9E3To_CT5J48pStTJeuPk0PgrI3oYNkch9_Z8q-vnhZ_AgAA___7yX_H) targeting both cashless bail and flag burning, as part of a broader federal crime initiative focused on Washington, D.C., and other cities. The orders direct the Justice Department to penalize jurisdictions that use cashless bail and to investigate instances of flag desecration. Currently, flag burning is protected as free speech under the First Amendment, following a 1989 Supreme Court ruling, but Trump said he wants it to carry a [minimum one-year jail sentence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOszAQRk9jOkfDJMahcPE3dPnbLZHBA5mVsZFtkuX2K6_2Btt90khP897HY3xY9hzW_3YjU5Y4BnpnT6VQGhdv1-lIgcO6U7C-nG9yjsM6IqCScJfYjc6yP8db48xChHRtyLRadQioAZunUX3X9te5m2ZoNaqldb2DyWo7Ta1erG3YVBrcsWsBFLQXBEIg7YhA90orcQNyXGK6fEYO5UmLP-OL0mWOW-PNs5Q9i-s_gYPAIZx7zKWeBA4VLHCAe911HVlWP4FDSce2y8xryJK-aD4Kv0jG5CjJyYbqLKu__A0gcGiScfubvefcaXGDdbPsf54ofyr3MvgdAAD__0SYggY). The administration also announced plans to expand federal custody for suspects in D.C. and increase the number of federal law enforcement personnel.
## US Fighters Intercept Russian Aircraft Off Alaska
A Russian [surveillance aircraft was intercepted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAQQL_GdETDYGOncHENXa69Ehk8wNwOBhknEX-_yv7C1k96T3r_HsMjsHBa_oaNfJn3IdH7FCqF8jBLWMZnTpyWg1KQcr0pRk7LgICmBldjN8TAcg26in4mQmor8o01HQJawGr1M2m4Q4wdmnszutG1TXAGx0l36FrtKvYfGzjsGgADzQ2BEMhGIrB3Y43SQJHLnm__d05lpVmu_UX5Nu1bJX4t5ThV-0dhr7AvK60s8mEK-2MXni6FfaSZ0kkKe6M7Z62u8_M8OaR6Y-ES8lUfEhLVnArliY5CsQ4Szq-gsK-yj8ebRfjsrNKwbIF_ElX51bOXx-8AAAD__zvWgEU) near Alaska on Sunday, marking the third such incident in the past week, U.S. officials said. The plane entered the Alaskan Air Defense Identification Zone but remained in international airspace and did not cross into U.S. or Canadian territory. Over the past week, American F-16 fighters have been [dispatched twice,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MHO2yAQBOCnwTcisjbGOXCoVFnq4e-1R2tjFmdbAhZsEvntK_cVev6k0cz8-lq-kBPn7Sc-yUssS6ZPSyRCdYkJt_urZs7bThmTHB8KgfO2gAGrzaRhXAJyOpahCz4SAfUd-auzIxhwBrqHj7f7vZ_6wU1uim61AdZAllYwlmIYsWN_ppkJxqsx1lwvYAgMuUBk3M06qwZDgaXUy-_CWR4U01HeVC9reXbJP0T2pvpvCmYFM97Xc8FlKycrmH9koZpRuGRMCuZX05G3h1Btmk9baRddX60xZo1c14pRdIlRY8L2B7XwkxTMTUo9VD9zUP33Kwy3oR_t0FUf9g-nxG10ajDbEzn9ayb_defbw98AAAD__wa9ivU) once on Aug. 21 and once on Aug. 20, to intercept Russian Il-20 aircraft operating in the Alaska ADIZ.
## List: Wedding Costs by State in 2025
A new analysis of more than 4,000 couples spotlights the cost of weddings across the U.S. in 2025, with the [average celebration](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLEOmzAYhJ_GbI5-_mBMBg9d2NK1I3LiAxwZG9luKG9f0Vfo9kl3-nS6X8_paX3wcflpN5g6pyniKAG1Ik9zsMvrd44-LjuiDfU84JyPy8TEStIguZ-c9eGcusaZGWDcG5hWq56JNXGzmn4eXhp8R6s6Sw-t-f1Qmtg5TUrbtvHmstHAfUukqL0xgQnaAaQfSivREZyvKd8-yce6Yg5n-iLf3mlrgllr3Yu4_xA8Ch7juadSr0jweIkFjzRcfFHwM0o9A64mDvlBLjilL7KukDFJllsqVeLPjlj8F3IP9g1Zk1xQ5WZz9nCCxyYbtx8-BF96LTpaNuvDv0H1v178Gv4bAAD__1E5hQA) coming in at about $36,000 and Washington, D.C., topping the list at $70,625. New Jersey follows at $57,706, with New York close behind at $53,873, while Alaska remains the least expensive at just $12,500. Venue rentals ($6,500–$12,000) and catering ($6,500–$10,000) are the biggest expenses, though budgets vary widely depending on guest count and location. Nationally, most weddings host an average of 136 guests, and couples are increasingly leaning on savings, credit cards, and cash registry funds to cover rising costs. See the average cost of a [wedding in your state here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1u6zAQBODTSB2F1eqHcsHiNe782pTCmlxKDGhSoDZSnNMHDnKD1B8wg5m323yjEENa_tODjfg8Jz73yCJcZh9puX-UFNKycaIoz5OdC2mZEXBQMCkcZ0chPue-dsYzI3c1m1YPIwJqwHo1LVqLvh2c7h3B3Y6XS4eesLddj9PU1sG80mDCsQUYoG0QGIG1YwZ9GfRQ9cAuSC7New5JVvbxmQ8ujc2POppVZNur7l-F1wqv53k2XznSCyu88ufGRRS5I1h-8UqyK1lZ0cGFFlY276KyV6R-x9XFuO0MMYZ91FUPy4NC_OmSPx10GPwOAAD__8cMesU).

On this day in 1873, the in the U.S. was opened in Carondelet, Missouri, by educator Susan Blow. She taught the children in the morning, while educating the teachers in the afternoon. Weddings may be priceless in memory, but the price tag looks very different depending on where you say “I do.” Below, we report on the average . If you’re married (or have been), we’d love to hear from you—hit reply and share your favorite moment from your wedding day. Today, we're sponsored by , which offers a pre-IPO investment opportunity in America's energy future. | Trump Signs Orders Targeting Flag Burning President Trump on Monday signed a targeting both cashless bail and flag burning, as part of a broader federal crime initiative focused on Washington, D.C., and other cities. The orders direct the Justice Department to penalize jurisdictions that use cashless bail and to investigate instances of flag desecration. Currently, flag burning is protected as free speech under the First Amendment, following a 1989 Supreme Court ruling, but Trump said he wants it to carry a . The administration also announced plans to expand federal custody for suspects in D.C. and increase the number of federal law enforcement personnel. US Fighters Intercept Russian Aircraft Off Alaska A Russian near Alaska on Sunday, marking the third such incident in the past week, U.S. officials said. The plane entered the Alaskan Air Defense Identification Zone but remained in international airspace and did not cross into U.S. or Canadian territory. Over the past week, American F-16 fighters have been once on Aug. 21 and once on Aug. 20, to intercept Russian Il-20 aircraft operating in the Alaska ADIZ. List: Wedding Costs by State in 2025 A new analysis of more than 4,000 couples spotlights the cost of weddings across the U.S. in 2025, with the coming in at about $36,000 and Washington, D.C., topping the list at $70,625. New Jersey follows at $57,706, with New York close behind at $53,873, while Alaska remains the least expensive at just $12,500. Venue rentals ($6,500–$12,000) and catering ($6,500–$10,000) are the biggest expenses, though budgets vary widely depending on guest count and location. Nationally, most weddings host an average of 136 guests, and couples are increasingly leaning on savings, credit cards, and cash registry funds to cover rising costs. See the average cost of a . ## Abbott Further Expands Session Agenda
Gov. Greg Abbott [expanded the agenda](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO3DAMRb9G7jSQOHpYhYo07jZtSkMPekysxhYs7Xj27wNvmTYdQYIH99w_H_NHoELb43d4ou_vZZ83PFvB3vGY81GxVjxaLdQ7bY-vulBbP2kGAZqLkYOZc6DyPash-yiykwN6abUBYYSVw-rvOTjtbMqjSynerZNjlFEtGq2JTomB_AUTIxgphRT6pg0aUCLEEYRSyTIlMFPfj1tfseM7tKV87y88bml_DsWvvdfG7r8YTAym8zxvn68vvI4MpnB0SgUZTJcXg6nuhTqla2wVE4XCG7ZG-8Zg-qHzf_Y8PHDLgYcY9945vmvY8vUPxnGHyyK0UFzYe-IKTORjsiOPQWkTVQ5JuuHwuZ5UCjVz2TyegcpP-P5_lb88_A0AAP__QiSVUw) for the second special session again yesterday, adding legislation to ban same-day voter registration and to allow political subdivisions to contract directly with sheriffs and constables for law enforcement. Meanwhile, the Texas House approved bills related to property tax rates, permits for water wells in parts of East Texas, and the construction of flood-control ponds. Those related to property tax rates were passed along party lines, while the others were passed with bipartisan support. Senate Bill 10 [lowers the threshold](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAMhk8DXUbBAyEUKbahe9tuiTKJGawXSJR4huH2qzxpT7CdJfv__Nl_vpYvS4GO52-7o-HPGpcDzxKQGfPic8KUMJcUiJmO5yutVLZvWkDCIKQWoBZvKVxL33rzkH7qWjTdOCiQSo5duxmvtIap6-7ajdMKCgcJa-_Gyd5Badu3ZCpMalBdJzs53AaFCnppHxpk37ux6SV64phvvCHjx5Y1XPGN-ebi3gazMafS3H81MDcwn-d5c4HcN2zxVTgedaqBuZ7VwPyTb2CuOxuYpa718K8hagaFTSnHNxbxoBCEpR294CgC7cTCEV_CxdfBl0g5Jsx8CbYfrNg2G59OCoGKquLP3VL48eT_--7bwN8AAAD__32Sj0I) for triggering a tax rate election from a maximum tax rate increase of 3.5% to 1%. [House Bill 17](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uhDAQBOCnMd2h9R62oXCRFOiaS5sSGbyAFYMtvLmft4_uXiHtaDSfNN_X4epCDPvy5Tay_JjTsNO9RGKmY_BHppzpKDkG5rAvv3kOZf0JAwKqE7Qn1IN3IT6HpvJ2BN_Jiqw0SiNoMLJaLUqc9VkR0IjGtKbrvBlbN0-kxrFTugr2NQYtailBgqqVJo0NuLFFaJrJiAbIB05HzSsxPVyZ4zPd6KintFXRrsy5iPOHwF5gP7kcOMX6XayXdBPYc0w-TUVg33YosHe7i88SXsHKWxTYXz4BQJpLvfJWHdbne4gxFP3Cl82F-Lb4fw_dLP4FAAD__wjeeZE) requires local governments to provide taxpayers with information regarding population growth, inflation, and historical tax rate data when proposing property tax rates. House Bill 27 [pauses new well water permits](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFygzAQRL8GOjHSBQQuVKShc9qUjECHuYlAGuls2X-fwfmE9Ltv3u73dbpa8nTcvuyOhp9rmA4s2SMzpsmliDFiytETMx23e1wpbz80gYROyEGAnpwl_5ra2plZuouq0ai-0yC17FW9Gdl1sCC2vbv0bmgdDDivINXS6VWhw5rMCZMDaKWkkl3TadTQSjsPINt26atWoiMOqeENGZ82r_4VHpiaJey1NxtzzNXHZwVjBWMppTknrCnsvGFmy5jPZAWjTUyLxwrGN0Zs4Z5R2BhTeGAWM3kvSrh7JzztxKJYxiTwGUPiLNBmFn_FI5Q6GRcLeU9Zn4q33ZJ_G_H_fnwY-A0AAP__IoKMTg) in three East Texas counties where a company owned by a Dallas businessman has proposed extracting over 15 million gallons of water a year.
## Keurig Dr Pepper Announces Acquisition, Split
Keurig Dr Pepper announced Monday that it is acquiring the Amsterdam-based parent company of Peet's Coffee for $18 billion. After the deal closes next year, the brands will become [separate beverage and coffee companies](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSrCAQQE-jGRYgohMQ_MRsfrqhhdBq76Cw2I4zt99y9wibvequevW6P-7D3WLAbf5vVzD0muKwwbkHIII8-JwgJch7CkiE23ykCfflgYPksmG8Y1IP3mJ4D6r0ZuT-Jkowom205Jq3olyMEL5Vde0m5Zu6u0nvajmKWyOU87rWvkRzyXgntRBc8KZqNGipuB07yZVybaE4eKSYK1qA4GX3KbzjE3Ll4loGsxClvaj_FbIvZH-eZ-W20V3LQvaXu5A97y6-6AFHxpn5zH5vYxSZdV8HZmD-ILcwF6cJgLm4Jru92acHlgBoZ1PMTHRsxBAwbtVCayiz8em8Bru-QufVYvjpor9982nkdwAAAP__exOJFQ). The split will [undo the 2018 merger](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQhp_GbEa2A4YMHrIwVE3XjsjBB5xibGofIXn7ivQROp_u0_f939f-atFjmL7sAoaeY-wD7NkDEaTepRXWFVJePRJhmLZ1xDzfsVdC1Vy0XOneWfSvviqcuQl3lgUY2dRaCS0aWcym1edatk0zWhgrOQzNWN3AnVpXu_OgxKlAc8BEq7SUQoq6rDVoVQl7a5WoqqFhlQCHFFNJMxA8bR79Kz4glUNcCm9mojWz04Wpjqlu3_dyyeG4MdVB4FtmqltigBdTXaQZElPdHbaEE3eJ_xXydyLf0Xs-4QP4mDAPkVueyQZnfQzAZ7DuZ7OJIB1Mm_jlIj_tx0JFMm49njHrw3daLPq3Hv1v1IdRvwEAAP__llWOQg) between Plano-based Dr Pepper Snapple Group and Keurig Green Mountain Coffee, aiming to create "two pure-play powerhouses" with “distinct standalone propositions." The coffee company will be based in Massachusetts, with projected [annual net sales of $16 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SrCAUhJ9GMyxgFCUguInZ3HRDi5-DnhpGKMBxfPut2X2Ezbu6-_u-7stdY8B9_a-foOrbx2WHswSoFfLicoKUIJcUsFbc1yN5LNsDF075QOhEuFicxnAtfeuUoU6yFhQbB8GpoCNrNyWFNDBqq63W9OaMNVpKM1rrByknz1tUnzI6ccEYZXToBgGC91SbidO-t2PTU3BYY-7qBhXeuvhwxRfkzsZnG9RWayrN7V_D54bP53l2Pr7NUXCHUj6Zhs8BPZR6BWj4_IAj40pcJr90xBwXSQC1EBu9ByDx3CETNhniQIc2K5dODAGL-JxZnxrDz3b9m7GX4t8BAAD__4w5g2I) and a market presence in more than 100 countries. The beverage company, which will be led by Keurig Dr Pepper CEO Timothy Cofer and based in Frisco, is projected to generate [more than $11 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGWnSAQhp8GO-4ZR0FuQZGGbtOm9CDMVbKoBHC9vn2OySNsNV8xZ-b7_18f44cNMWzzT7uSru_XPm50lki1Uh59TpQS5ZJiqDVs85FeoSyfYURAwUFxlKO3IV5j33g9gX-2Del2EBJBwtA2i-4U9B12A5ETvZMShBDeT_QE54anc03Q9zFQKNsWWhAPIUliD3ZSCH3vBtYD-VD3_KgLVXrb8orX_kX54fa1iXqpNRXW_WBoGJrzPB9HsXX39roXGJpS93wxNOu-0T2no4SNSmFo7tcMDaibb_qkI4eZ-8z_R-e_PfFEVAv3ZCO37s8RMjE0Sqh2UIAAA0PTZO3TGWIMRd7G82pD_CdYv1frl8a_AQAA__8oL4om) in net sales across multiple brands.
## Geese Rescuers Get Rescued
Animal services officers [rescued five baby geese](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAQRU9jZ7SKMmBPQLCJs9l0Q6uAcjdqGixgxtO3X3mvsPGXnv57fz63T4op5vtverHtP3vZMp8tce9ct1APPg6u7Uix95jvX8ce2-MZNwTUAhaBZgsU03tTY7AOwocc2cpZGwQDsxwfdloIdphhmSVMjnYvFShSThuYvVNujPaCwYJGSpCgb9qwQQXkFgSl_Dwo4BB7qbf-4M4_1Pb0Lt9cb768xmQfvR9tmH4NuA64nud5e3Ju-loHXKn26BMPuF5iA66peEoDro2yoNxLjkVQji9KwlNlUbn5LxZ35sbiLCUkOrNI9LwYOE8iLNp9SCIRIAShlPGCdq3FpMibZUY1ORyrDccZU4rNXAL3F8X072__v8rfFv8GAAD__5oPj5Q) at the Woodlawn Lake dam in San Antonio on Sunday, but they got stuck themselves in the process. The team responded to a call from a resident who saw the stranded goslings. When the rescuers arrived, they were greeted by a "string of angry honks" from the mother goose. They used a rope to [rappel down the dam](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdEbjiTG8wsVr6JItttgS2XgCozVgYSeEv1-xv_C6I40099z75z7cHUdep4dbyJbPcxtWOnKkUmgfwp4oJdpzilwKr9MrPTnPf3lAwEZCJ9EMwXE8B10F6yF8qYqsahuDYKBV1WzhZjwZrxRqBcob3yjX0hgCYPtlwlixvZ5Bh0YpUNDUjSGDGpzvELQeW6GBApdtr8tMhT4uP-O5vWmvx22pop1LSVncvgX2AvvjOOpX4usmsP8VwvCgIwvsrxSBPXQXX_TbrfJ7LdvKmwxukTlxjIc7pXeZV-mdP-VElEnulMcXCex1213l1E1p1Qrsq92GdHCMnM3lOS2O43-t8rMx3xb_BQAA___mkYWm) and then retrieved the geese using a net. When the officers had collected all the geese, however, they realized they couldn’t climb back up the dam. "Unfortunately, algae-covered boots + steep, slick walls = zero traction," the department [explained on social media](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFu4zoQRb-G6miQE5JSChXGA9TlNSm2FEbmWBqEIglxHMV_v_DuJ2x_cXDP-fUxfyAnzuv_uNMoP_cyZzpbIhE65nhUqpWOVhOLcF4f9c5t--IZDHhtBg1hjsjpObsujouJ77aj0fY-gAmmt902vnmHsPgw9OQX6hdP_a0PAZ2xGA0NHY8vmBkgWGus8RcfKIAzuAxgnLv1yhmKLOW4yEZCP9ju6Vm-6bjcyt6lcROpTb1dFUwKpvM8L3e80VLK12ugYPrEfM1SMpfrf58KplqaNAUTiz6xadQt8UvzqRvLA4VLPlk2jTrirtdSoqYcOa-aRWNKugkeQlGXh-i_AN5rIgWTBfPuvXXWgnXD4BRM3THGenJK3MLLZd2R05_r8m_Bv0f4HQAA__9vP5Vh). Firefighters and park police officers provided an extension ladder, helping the "slightly soggy heroes climb to safety with the babies in tow." Greg Abbott for the second special session again yesterday, adding legislation to ban same-day voter registration and to allow political subdivisions to contract directly with sheriffs and constables for law enforcement. Meanwhile, the Texas House approved bills related to property tax rates, permits for water wells in parts of East Texas, and the construction of flood-control ponds. Those related to property tax rates were passed along party lines, while the others were passed with bipartisan support. Senate Bill 10 for triggering a tax rate election from a maximum tax rate increase of 3.5% to 1%. requires local governments to provide taxpayers with information regarding population growth, inflation, and historical tax rate data when proposing property tax rates. House Bill 27 in three East Texas counties where a company owned by a Dallas businessman has proposed extracting over 15 million gallons of water a year. Keurig Dr Pepper Announces Acquisition, Split Keurig Dr Pepper announced Monday that it is acquiring the Amsterdam-based parent company of Peet's Coffee for $18 billion. After the deal closes next year, the brands will become . The split will between Plano-based Dr Pepper Snapple Group and Keurig Green Mountain Coffee, aiming to create "two pure-play powerhouses" with “distinct standalone propositions." The coffee company will be based in Massachusetts, with projected and a market presence in more than 100 countries. The beverage company, which will be led by Keurig Dr Pepper CEO Timothy Cofer and based in Frisco, is projected to generate in net sales across multiple brands. Geese Rescuers Get Rescued Animal services officers at the Woodlawn Lake dam in San Antonio on Sunday, but they got stuck themselves in the process. The team responded to a call from a resident who saw the stranded goslings. When the rescuers arrived, they were greeted by a "string of angry honks" from the mother goose. They used a rope to and then retrieved the geese using a net. When the officers had collected all the geese, however, they realized they couldn’t climb back up the dam. "Unfortunately, algae-covered boots + steep, slick walls = zero traction," the department . Firefighters and park police officers provided an extension ladder, helping the "slightly soggy heroes climb to safety with the babies in tow." name: Terrifying
subject: Why MAGA is working overtime to win obscure court race
body:
They are pissed off, and launching a quiet offensive to reclaim these seats to overturn everything from gay marriage to basic voting rights.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017gKbt5aO9STkCH9zpC-MDgK3z_Exi_Wy4JkMCkpnb50PRBJtK1LzvmIVaI5VlyLAXPYGJ6Gk3StMEiRyJboTy8OArFN-A1MJb02wdLUDVhNe4757uZ3A6qo63MqCO0tQN4f0pqx8y7PmDuDSak429z8zoWg8icPtGer7k2Ydv_g83LCmFd0mIWdsp6BEU9vQDJZd8khr1XBFdTl62Hr87sOlmrCdKoDz&c=pT4igt-OWRqBqRyLx563lGaMMWel0MDCelDq99Gbp4GqyScO1WL2aA==&ch=DE163vBUqHUILZYREW4hk53UAuPUWLJGyx3ha7cqhJyd3iUO3SQoEg==)
---
| Peter,
We have to give credit where it is due: MAGA organizers are seriously working ridiculously hard to win an obscure November 2025 Pennsylvania judicial election.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017gKbt5aO9STkCH9zpC-MDgK3z_Exi_Wy4JkMCkpnb50PRBJtK1LzvmIVaI5VlyLAXPYGJ6Gk3StMEiRyJboTy8OArFN-A1MJb02wdLUDVhNe4757uZ3A6qo63MqCO0tQN4f0pqx8y7PmDuDSak429z8zoWg8icPtGer7k2Ydv_g83LCmFd0mIWdsp6BEU9vQDJZd8khr1XBFdTl62Hr87m6_X6fSP1C7&c=pT4igt-OWRqBqRyLx563lGaMMWel0MDCelDq99Gbp4GqyScO1WL2aA==&ch=DE163vBUqHUILZYREW4hk53UAuPUWLJGyx3ha7cqhJyd3iUO3SQoEg==)
---
Are you curious why? Because the three DEM justices up for re-election to the PA supreme court have acted as absolute bulwarks against MAGA's darkest ambitions: a total abortion ban, full repeal of mail voting (which saved Biden in 2020), and eliminating multiple Dem House seats with gerrymandering schemes that would make Greg Abbott blush.
The Dem-majority supreme court turned back all of that. And now MAGA is pissed, and they are launching a quiet offensive to reclaim those seats in order to challenge and overturn everything from gay marriage to basic voting rights.
But here's the real doozy: Trump is serious about running for a third term.
The plain text of the Constitution won't be enough to protect us. The U.S. Supreme Court is Trumpified. And the MAGA-controlled Congress will do everything they can to ensure Trump can ignore the 22nd Amendment's presidential term limits.
State courts are crucial backstops against MAGA's total and complete takeover of our democracy. And Pennsylvania is one of the biggest prizes: a swing state with two major metropolitan centers, it is worth 19 electoral votes. As goes Pennsylvania, so goes the nation.
That's why MAGA is attempting to co-opt the PA Supreme Court--to ensure that Pennsylvania goes permanently red.
[We now have just a little over two months left to do the work to win. Can you chip in $50, $25, or even $5 to help us reach as many voters as possible to save the PA Supreme Court -- and possibly even our nation?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017gKbt5aO9STkCH9zpC-MDgK3z_Exi_Wy4JkMCkpnb50PRBJtK1LzvmIVaI5VlyLAXPYGJ6Gk3StMEiRyJboTy8OArFN-A1MJb02wdLUDVhNe4757uZ3A6qo63MqCO0tQN4f0pqx8y7PmDuDSak429z8zoWg8icPtGer7k2Ydv_g83LCmFd0mIWdsp6BEU9vQDJZd8khr1XBFdTl62Hr87gE2_ScAolJN&c=pT4igt-OWRqBqRyLx563lGaMMWel0MDCelDq99Gbp4GqyScO1WL2aA==&ch=DE163vBUqHUILZYREW4hk53UAuPUWLJGyx3ha7cqhJyd3iUO3SQoEg==)
---

clean_body: They are pissed off, and launching a quiet offensive to reclaim these seats to overturn everything from gay marriage to basic voting rights. | | | | | == | Peter, We have to give credit where it is due: MAGA organizers are seriously working ridiculously hard to win an obscure November 2025 Pennsylvania judicial election. | | == Are you curious why? Because the three DEM justices up for re-election to the PA supreme court have acted as absolute bulwarks against MAGA's darkest ambitions: a total abortion ban, full repeal of mail voting (which saved Biden in 2020), and eliminating multiple Dem House seats with gerrymandering schemes that would make Greg Abbott blush. The Dem-majority supreme court turned back all of that. And now MAGA is pissed, and they are launching a quiet offensive to reclaim those seats in order to challenge and overturn everything from gay marriage to basic voting rights. But here's the real doozy: Trump is serious about running for a third term. The plain text of the Constitution won't be enough to protect us. The U.S. Supreme Court is Trumpified. And the MAGA-controlled Congress will do everything they can to ensure Trump can ignore the 22nd Amendment's presidential term limits. State courts are crucial backstops against MAGA's total and complete takeover of our democracy. And Pennsylvania is one of the biggest prizes: a swing state with two major metropolitan centers, it is worth 19 electoral votes. As goes Pennsylvania, so goes the nation. That's why MAGA is attempting to co-opt the PA Supreme Court--to ensure that Pennsylvania goes permanently red. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == With your help we can turn things around and wage a real battle here -- but we are running out of time. Thank you for joining the fight. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

name: Eileen Laubacher
subject: How can I convince you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
What if I told you that winning this seat would guarantee that we take back the House for Democrats in 2026?
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T333b2673-8894-4e5c-8f3b-5c97a4a3056c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23a90c5c-3f0b-40a9-b064-d94c77a3b504/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | Peter, Is there anything I can say to convince you to make a donation to my campaign against Lauren Boebert before midnight tonight? What if I told you that I’m the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running to defeat Lauren Boebert? What if I told you that Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in the closest race in the country? What if I told you that Lauren Boebert is as unpopular as ever among voters? What if I told you that winning this seat would guarantee that we take back the House for Democrats in 2026? And what if I told you that we can finally send Lauren Boebert packing – but only if grassroots donors like you chip in now to my campaign? We need to raise another $7,500 before midnight tonight if we’re going to defeat Lauren Boebert and flip this seat blue, but right now, we’re still very short. The only way I’ll be able to fight back against the GOP Super PACs and win is if you give right now: [Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – every dollar you can afford before midnight – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6071ad55-afd2-4d50-9dc9-760d78e6b20d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ll never be able to thank you enough for being on this team and joining me on this journey. My deepest gratitude, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy
---
|
---
| | _REAR ADMIRAL EILEEN LAUBACHER (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HER MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE._

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8add9d01-b894-446c-bdd0-0e04edf3155c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Paid protesters tried to intimidate us…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
The Left is targeting us and watching our every move
| Dear Friend,
---
This was truly an honor.
---
I just received the “Congresswoman of the Year” Award for deciding to withdraw my nomination to serve in President Trump’s Cabinet in order to SAVE our House majority.
---
And thank God for that decision.
---
Because right now, we're only _ONE_ seat over the threshold to declare a majority in the House — and that seat is _**ours**_. Our razor-thin margin is the only thing that separates a Trump House Majority from a Congress controlled by AOC and Ilhan Omar.
---
And that’s why the Left is targeting us and watching our every move...
---
**...Recently, at a non-political event I attended, dozens of paid protesters from a dark money left-wing group SWARMED the area in an attempt to INTIMIDATE us.**
---
Not only are Democrats furious that our seat saved the majority, _but they also see the nonstop headlines showing that we’re**“closing the gap”** on Kathy Hochul to achieve the “impossible” by electing a Republican governor of New York._
---
**It’s no coincidence that this paid agitation comes just after AOC came to our congressional district.**
---
**From _Wall Street Journal_ : “AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash...”**
---
The Radical Left sent us _their_ message of intimidation. Now it’s _our_ turn to respond with a message of our own.
---
**I need your help proving that their intimidation tactics didn’t just fail – they BACKFIRED.**
---
I’d love to report our largest fundraising surge to date – not just to send a message, but to build on our momentum to not just close the gap, but TAKE THE LEAD in this critical fight.
---
**Best of all, thanks to being awarded “Congresswoman of the Year,” I’ve secured a 500% MATCH for 24 hours – and given the Left’s tactics, I’m going to put it to use right now.**
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to help us TAKE THE LEAD as we fight to FIRE Hochul – _and I’ll ensure it goes FIVE TIMES AS FAR_. **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=de80c02a777f41b7853f9e2d8ef73981&_e=l29_yfGY95BjmSrjrpuaSs5VOLLi4TTGp4gzroQWauzc-oY0nImdBgVxc-FTE80noc6JSn0K4NDb634rphUHWhL0X3CztwVcxlj9l4CExibK0IwohzT1rV6wgzFSQL0MTdY-Ibc9y6I-zwCJ2am6N7jjHStyoAZQHiKLaN2t0804kkSVOjuCsUHEb2l_-zFQWzaVVPJaQrsdl1R5M6rsMu8WJcpoh9m34vG3m3TrvzagetHrV2kg_dELJl1wYDhA1I0sejObYars9hASoK-RAxfabJoA-0IdzgaNws5YvM2iedZBGlGYiSGqfLvLKAie6Vlf6ItVqgxzLR8omDnsfeVZmQr56js6VRtr4ubxbgObYzkNsWVTn1tXPPB91gvJ-liMXqtUj9zLZT5mrO2bJOw7UQJ4sLqpM_CKGeggzMgHRf_alljA98qL7xx-r407sQgABWSQ2-OCtdo9EtUotcMm0Fy9aKKpgfBWvpesTSuT0CCtFhr1vbnCwXH-bhi_r934uZN2UOCuvvNgclvnznGYrnzjXH2kPSPjLtUU0nhMXFTm2KsabEzc6kfv7LfWfVkiUHc1IIoZwa34I3xkH-8igmyGgW-JCqNhTKdwR9U%3D)

clean_body: The Left is targeting us and watching our every move | Dear Friend, This was truly an honor. I just received the “Congresswoman of the Year” Award for deciding to withdraw my nomination to serve in President Trump’s Cabinet in order to SAVE our House majority. And thank God for that decision. Because right now, we're only ONE seat over the threshold to declare a majority in the House — and that seat is ours. Our razor-thin margin is the only thing that separates a Trump House Majority from a Congress controlled by AOC and Ilhan Omar. And that’s why the Left is targeting us and watching our every move... ...Recently, at a non-political event I attended, dozens of paid protesters from a dark money left-wing group SWARMED the area in an attempt to INTIMIDATE us. Not only are Democrats furious that our seat saved the majority, but they also see the nonstop headlines showing that we’re“closing the gap” on Kathy Hochul to achieve the “impossible” by electing a Republican governor of New York. It’s no coincidence that this paid agitation comes just after AOC came to our congressional district. From Wall Street Journal : “AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash...” The Radical Left sent us their message of intimidation. Now it’s our turn to respond with a message of our own. I need your help proving that their intimidation tactics didn’t just fail – they BACKFIRED. I’d love to report our largest fundraising surge to date – not just to send a message, but to build on our momentum to not just close the gap, but TAKE THE LEAD in this critical fight. Best of all, thanks to being awarded “Congresswoman of the Year,” I’ve secured a 500% MATCH for 24 hours – and given the Left’s tactics, I’m going to put it to use right now. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Dudley Brown
subject: BREAKING: UN “Small Arms Treaty” enforcement scheme in the United States?!
body:
BOMBSHELL: New U.S. Department of Commerce firearms export rule mirrors UN global gun control requirements.
Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Association for Gun Rights.
* * *
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Fellow Patriot,

**BREAKING:** **The White House could be on the cusp of adopting an ILLEGAL Biden-era rule to enforce the UN “Small Arms Treaty” in America!**

This comes just _WEEKS_ before the UN’s annual “Small Arms Treaty” conference in Geneva, Switzerland, where globalist one-world dictators will discuss their international gun control strategy for implementation and enforcement of the treaty around the world.

Last year, the Biden administration’s Commerce Department published a rule (**RIN 0694-AJ46**) that _directly mirrors the language in the UN “Small Arms Treaty_ ,” intended to bar the U.S. from supplying arms to civilians in other countries.

The Rule has remained unimplemented since then, but began to move last week -- just as we started packing for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” conference later this month:

**Your National Association for Gun Rights is calling on the Trump administration to:** **A)** **_Rescind this rule_** implementing the UN “Small Arms Treaty” using domestic policy; and **B)** Ensure that **_NO American taxpayer dollars_** are put toward implementing the Arms Trade Treaty, as directed by federal statute. **[So right now, before you do anything else, I’m calling on every single NAGR member to please sign your “NO UN GUN BAN” petition to President Trump, urging him to STOP THIS MADNESS>>](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2m7xgrbcvq1my0jqdj84r3xzkniv6d1z1hej7yldngdhibxwd6s07tv8sqgera77obzhvp5euikonc10g4836rnmv80evh6fk4oyp0svyjvaem1p614znr0xgniicaxlcrr24pduhixupm6ntpxu42hylisxzddqntru75ko1g99gv8g4wzpggdewfy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1lnkd&__onlt=h)**
The Commerce Gun Control rule is directly tied back to the United Nations global gun control efforts, which insist that governments – not civilians – should have control of small arms and access to the tools of self-defense.

The rule doesn’t just flirt with globalist gun control, it directly parrots propaganda from the UN’s so-called “Small Arms Treaty” (the Arms Trade Treaty).

Line for line, the Commerce Gun Control Rule reads like it was ripped straight from the UN’s playbook; **the similarities aren’t a coincidence, they’re a blueprint.**

_This is the deep state working overtime to sneak America into compliance with, and even expand on, that dangerous treaty_.

And here’s the kicker... this Interim Final Rule blatantly violates Public Law 118-42, Section 537, which flat-out bans the use of taxpayer dollars to implement the Arms Trade Treaty.

If this rule were passed, it would have DISASTROUS economic implications for US firearms manufacturers and exporters.

More importantly, the United States would **aid in implementing the Arms Trade Treaty gun control and assist through our own policymaking process.**
**[Tell President Trump to TAKE ACTION>>](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2m7xgrbcvq1my0jqdj84r3xzkniv6d1z1hej7yldngdhibxwd6s07tv8sqgera77obzhvp5euikonc10g4836rnmv80evh6fk4oyp0svyjvaem1p614znr0xgniicaxlcrr24pduhixupm6ntpxu42hylisxzddqntru75ko1g99gv8g4wzpggdewfy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1lnkd&__onlt=h)**
Like all gun control, the Commerce Department’s Gun Control Export Rule will only harm innocents around the world while restricting legitimate firearm exports domestically.

It **won’t stop** America’s adversaries from arming hostile actors.

It **won’t stop** rogue regimes from continuing to oppress their people with guns.

Warlords will **continue to wreak havoc** on civilian populations with guns. Innocent populations will only be further disarmed!

When I addressed the UN last year, I said to their faces that _“giving the state the monopoly of the possession of small arms is dangerous to all free-thinking individuals and liberty as a whole.”_

And that’s the same message I plan to deliver again later this month in Geneva.
**[SIGN YOUR PETITION to President Trump telling him that the United States has no business participating in GLOBAL CIVILIAN DISARMAMENT>>](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2m7xgrbcvq1my0jqdj84r3xzkniv6d1z1hej7yldngdhibxwd6s07tv8sqgera77obzhvp5euikonc10g4836rnmv80evh6fk4oyp0svyjvaem1p614znr0xgniicaxlcrr24pduhixupm6ntpxu42hylisxzddqntru75ko1g99gv8g4wzpggdewfy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1lnkd&__onlt=h)**
**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
_President_
National Association for Gun Rights**

---

---

[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2ofz36788piqgdm3u5hqctglu7toxy7g637v8surs0teexjkb5xufp9kt34h52uinug0zqvydlcdpq33s3gno36id8nyc3m5wxrkpef60j9o84t1yjqwk5e318&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1lnkd&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=61yltqxjmw3r3tdphmors0s1lpk91bsfasieh7fja878csvnckq6tgjofcf3f0xhkulxtky7uhmhw4zipvmweqiujo5w57208d19xcumj442j30c5p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1lnkd&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=u3vjp0osqvto4r69ybcxpor257do4gzj3uwow1pfgtij2kg444xpknl5171j77w5ejpkuu7kzgj4l2zl8g1kv02dl2v8y42az1gelgoh1o4jsh8p1582ghya5wr81dr4i9bd6w7cfy5w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1lnkd&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=37t93es05427b28btg85r1oeiy920tgmk5sanijg1vt3ju1l4dhs0e0w0ewkzf6qs3r63isfgqgfcfenvnotpnj5isdy0497t4o9t535cmptj4cfpcnts4qo1ifbtxgnur3qf69colg017it1gx1ry1m4bgjsfnj4w9oh2szbmno0j2x53mnt2rx5nedjt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1lnkd&__onlt=h) _The National Association for Gun Rights, Inc. is a non-profit tax exempt advocacy organization under Section 501(c)4 of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to NAGR are not tax-deductible for IRS purposes. The National Association for Gun Rights' mailing address is P.O. Box 26989, Greenville, SC 29616. They can be contacted toll-free at 1-877-405-4570. Its web address is
[Gunrights.org](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=ruqhgddg5origgjhk7aihlhmjq5ldsywwcfctz74du06heg6mnuvrcffxo1zpq0j87si4kai4vrudp1imgflbmpvwsf8lo016qsz7ooj9a&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1lnkd&__onlt=h)_ Not produced or emailed at taxpayer expense.

_To view this email as a web page, please click this link:[ view online](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xm=Yk02K3sfYIDloyfwYE1umSH3Yu0jn2H6rTj8pTVdXzVbL2t0p2xgL3VxoS9kpO5vn20%3Da&ocx_email_hash=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&ocx_unixtime_base36=t1lnkd&ocx_unsubscribe_link=http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39vf6h2twagtp4hq3iiewbkcovc5tbq0bl56q2bq82l8ihgddqz7wfxo32ahho72fwmnwg0coahyr73adopd&__stmp=t1lnkd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)._

Last year, the Biden administration’s Commerce Department published a rule (RIN 0694-AJ46) that directly mirrors the language in the UN “Small Arms Treaty ,” intended to bar the U.S. from supplying arms to civilians in other countries. The Rule has remained unimplemented since then, but began to move last week -- just as we started packing for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” conference later this month: Your National Association for Gun Rights is calling on the Trump administration to: A) Rescind this rule implementing the UN “Small Arms Treaty” using domestic policy; and B) Ensure that NO American taxpayer dollars are put toward implementing the Arms Trade Treaty, as directed by federal statute. The Commerce Gun Control rule is directly tied back to the United Nations global gun control efforts, which insist that governments – not civilians – should have control of small arms and access to the tools of self-defense. The rule doesn’t just flirt with globalist gun control, it directly parrots propaganda from the UN’s so-called “Small Arms Treaty” (the Arms Trade Treaty). Line for line, the Commerce Gun Control Rule reads like it was ripped straight from the UN’s playbook; the similarities aren’t a coincidence, they’re a blueprint. This is the deep state working overtime to sneak America into compliance with, and even expand on, that dangerous treaty. And here’s the kicker... this Interim Final Rule blatantly violates Public Law 118-42, Section 537, which flat-out bans the use of taxpayer dollars to implement the Arms Trade Treaty. If this rule were passed, it would have DISASTROUS economic implications for US firearms manufacturers and exporters. More importantly, the United States would aid in implementing the Arms Trade Treaty gun control and assist through our own policymaking process. Like all gun control, the Commerce Department’s Gun Control Export Rule will only harm innocents around the world while restricting legitimate firearm exports domestically. It won’t stop America’s adversaries from arming hostile actors. It won’t stop rogue regimes from continuing to oppress their people with guns. Warlords will continue to wreak havoc on civilian populations with guns. Innocent populations will only be further disarmed! When I addressed the UN last year, I said to their faces that “giving the state the monopoly of the possession of small arms is dangerous to all free-thinking individuals and liberty as a whole.” And that’s the same message I plan to deliver again later this month in Geneva. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Association for Gun Rights** The National Association for Gun Rights, Inc. is a non-profit tax exempt advocacy organization under Section 501(c)4 of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to NAGR are not tax-deductible for IRS purposes. The National Association for Gun Rights' mailing address is P.O. Box 26989, Greenville, SC 29616. subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani

body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znfl8sp9mo3lm3n3ea3usv8o6vgfdtj8i6hsn1v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9h62o34cth2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj84aups59af7hj7d9n5ml3eeqbs9ucovdi759l0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9h62o34cth2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zntv74s2novr8uir2sqkbe5129ecgc6fnp6vkbuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9h62o34cth2bs)

---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

body:
| |
---
How your action is protecting Texans everywhere | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYzNzk4NTkwMjM3NDQzODEyLFwiclwiOjE2Mzc5ODYzNjE4ODE0MTQ3OH0iLCJzIjoiMmEwYzM3OTAyYjAwOWYwZCJ9)
| | | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYzNzk4NTkwMjU4NDE1MzQ4LFwiclwiOjE2Mzc5ODYzNjE4ODE0MTQ3OH0iLCJzIjoiYjgyNmMzMDNkMzFiZTFlOSJ9)
---
|
---
# Texas' Winning Streak
| |
---
| Texans for Vaccine Choice has lots of _irons in the fire_ and _victories on the horizon_! As your dedicated defenders of medical liberty in the Lone Star State, we’re proud to recap just a few of the ways we’re safeguarding freedom for Texas families right now. **OTC Ivermectin on the Special Session Agenda**
Because of your relentless calls, emails, and petitions, our champions in the Legislature—**led by Rep. Joanne Shofner** —successfully got over-the-counter ivermectin added to the current special session as HB 25 which was heard last week in the House Public Health Committee. This is a **massive step** toward protecting medical freedom and access for every Texan. [Watch TFVC’s testimony here.](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYzNzk4NTkwMjg1Njc4MzM5LFwiclwiOjE2Mzc5ODYzNjE4ODE0MTQ3OH0iLCJzIjoiMGZmNDZmZTc1NjNhZDliOSJ9) **Big Legislative Win – Implementation Coming No Later Than October 1**
Thanks to your activism, **HB 1586** passed last session, ending the archaic and invasive process of ordering hard-copy exemption forms through the mail. Official rules will be adopted imminently, and this _major_ victory will be fully online soon! **Defending Our Constitution – Vote YES on Prop 15**
This November, Texans will vote on a constitutional amendment to finally codify parental rights in our state constitution. **We’re urging a YES vote on Proposition 15** – and mobilizing supporters statewide to get it across the finish line. **Asking the Big Questions – Straight to the Top**
We recently submitted **two official requests for Attorney General Opinions** to Ken Paxton’s office asking for vital clarification on state laws that protect you and your family. [Read the filing here.](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYzNzk4NTkwMzA2NjQ5ODc5LFwiclwiOjE2Mzc5ODYzNjE4ODE0MTQ3OH0iLCJzIjoiNDAwYTFlNzNlYzU3ZGJhNyJ9) **The Bottom Line**
From the courtroom to the Capitol to the ballot box, TFVC is **relentlessly defending your medical liberty**. None of this is possible without _you_. Together, we’re proving that Texans don’t back down – we stand up, speak out, and win. **Thank you for being part of this fight.******

---
|
---
# TFVC in the Media
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYzNzk4NTkwMzI5NzE4NTY0LFwiclwiOjE2Mzc5ODYzNjE4ODE0MTQ3OH0iLCJzIjoiZDg3YjZiNzQ0M2M3NjY0YiJ9)

|
## Dr. Bowden Interviews Team TFVC
|
---

As your dedicated defenders of medical liberty in the Lone Star State, we’re proud to recap just a few of the ways we’re safeguarding freedom for Texas families right now. OTC Ivermectin on the Special Session Agenda Because of your relentless calls, emails, and petitions, our champions in the Legislature—led by Rep. Joanne Shofner —successfully got over-the-counter ivermectin added to the current special session as HB 25 which was heard last week in the House Public Health Committee. This is a massive step toward protecting medical freedom and access for every Texan. Big Legislative Win – Implementation Coming No Later Than October 1 Thanks to your activism, HB 1586 passed last session, ending the archaic and invasive process of ordering hard-copy exemption forms through the mail. Official rules will be adopted imminently, and this major victory will be fully online soon! Defending Our Constitution – Vote YES on Prop 15 This November, Texans will vote on a constitutional amendment to finally codify parental rights in our state constitution. We’re urging a YES vote on Proposition 15 – and mobilizing supporters statewide to get it across the finish line. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkvtd4vp6gsgocj0lb4vl28vs3kt5ml89s0uach8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9h62p74chh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3bccv2cbd1548abh42jeffuumb5t7snp08c5440_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9h62p74chh2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4qtj41ugmtt151i9cv6n51p5ff3qi43ldudgcqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9h62p74chh2bs)
---

__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdvp1d0bq538lddhafokrisrukvstiehr4nbkrrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9h62p74chh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcr22a4f89bu3kv0en2510r57v6q3kd77dsu9mro_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c9h62p74chh2bs)

subject: The Destructive Nature of Property Taxes: Why a Consumption Tax Is a Fairer Alternative
body:
For many families in Mississippi, that means you never truly own your property free and clear. Pay off the mortgage, and the bank may be gone, but stop paying property taxes, and the government can still take your home.

_from the desk of_**Dana Criswell**
* * *
* * *
# [The Destructive Nature of Property Taxes: Why a Consumption Tax Is a Fairer Alternative](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=170972494&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTcyNDk0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYyMTI0MDcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODgwNDQwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.21iEwmTe6ovLjON7tGsskWUbPrkMsOeUA54gvfOAH-U)
| | [Dana Criswell](https://substack.com/@danacriswell)
---
| Aug 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@danacriswell)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=170972494&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTcyNDk0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NjIxMjQwNywiZXhwIjoxNzU4ODA0NDA3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTUyNjc4MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZPboZitCl-xh66lW5zts4lEBSXKs4CBDX0exq4wbQus&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=170972494&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTcyNDk0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYyMTI0MDcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODgwNDQwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.21iEwmTe6ovLjON7tGsskWUbPrkMsOeUA54gvfOAH-U&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=170972494&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTcyNDk0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYyMTI0MDcsImV4cCI6MTc1ODgwNDQwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.21iEwmTe6ovLjON7tGsskWUbPrkMsOeUA54gvfOAH-U)
