| | [](https://substack..LqSflGoeExJa_IFeBU2-kZqFrFlwUMGMbP83r138qzE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/danacriswell/p/the-destructive-nature-of-property?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e715a334-f443-453a-9da6-ba8b62796f66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Property taxes are one of the most aggressive forms of taxation we face. They operate like a never-ending rent on something you already own. Unlike sales taxes or income taxes, which are tied to what you buy or what you earn, property taxes keep coming--year after year--based solely on the government's assessment of your land or home.
For many families in Mississippi, that means you never truly own your property free and clear. Pay off the mortgage, and the bank may be gone, but stop paying property taxes, and the government can still take your home. Chief Justice John Marshall's old warning comes to mind: "The power to tax involves the power to destroy."
#### Crushing Families on Fixed Incomes
This tax hits our most vulnerable neighbors the hardest--seniors living on fixed incomes, widows trying to hold on to the family home, or working families already stretched thin by inflation. When property values rise because of neighborhood changes or inflation, so do the taxes, even though the homeowner's income hasn't gone up a dime. Too often, people are forced to sell their homes just to escape the tax burden.
#### Inequality and Injustice
Property taxes don't just strain families; they create inequality. Lower-value homes are often over-assessed compared to high-dollar properties. That means working- and middle-class families shoulder a bigger burden while wealthier property owners find ways to avoid paying their share.
And the horror stories are real. Across the country, families have lost homes they've owned for generations simply because they fell behind on taxes. In Washington, D.C., the Powell family's home--worth more than $700,000--was seized after tax penalties piled up. The city handed their property to a private investor, and the family lost everything. Cases like these show just how destructive property taxes can be.
#### A Better Way Forward
There's a better way. A tax system based on consumption--like a sales tax--makes more sense and is far fairer. You pay when you spend, not just for owning a home or land. That means taxpayers have more control over their burden. Everyone who buys something contributes--including tourists and out-of-state visitors. It's broad, transparent, and it encourages saving and investing instead of punishing ownership.
Mississippi already relies heavily on sales taxes, but we can do more to shift the load away from property owners. Other states are finding ways to cap property taxes or tie them to inflation to protect homeowners on fixed incomes. Mississippi should do the same, with the goal of eventually moving away from property taxes altogether.
#### Protecting Liberty and Property
Property taxes don't just take dollars--they chip away at liberty. Families deserve to pass their homes and farms on to the next generation without fearing that the government will one day take them away. If we want to keep Mississippi affordable, protect our seniors, and defend property rights, we must find the courage to reform this broken system.
It's time we stop treating homeowners like tenants of the state and start looking for tax solutions that are fair, transparent, and that respect the right to truly own what is ours.

clean_body: For many families in Mississippi, that means you never truly own your property free and clear. Pay off the mortgage, and the bank may be gone, but stop paying property taxes, and the government can still take your home. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | Aug 26 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Property taxes are one of the most aggressive forms of taxation we face. They operate like a never-ending rent on something you already own. Unlike sales taxes or income taxes, which are tied to what you buy or what you earn, property taxes keep coming--year after year--based solely on the government's assessment of your land or home. For many families in Mississippi, that means you never truly own your property free and clear. Pay off the mortgage, and the bank may be gone, but stop paying property taxes, and the government can still take your home. Chief Justice John Marshall's old warning comes to mind: "The power to tax involves the power to destroy." Crushing Families on Fixed Incomes This tax hits our most vulnerable neighbors the hardest--seniors living on fixed incomes, widows trying to hold on to the family home, or working families already stretched thin by inflation. When property values rise because of neighborhood changes or inflation, so do the taxes, even though the homeowner's income hasn't gone up a dime. Too often, people are forced to sell their homes just to escape the tax burden. Inequality and Injustice Property taxes don't just strain families; they create inequality. Lower-value homes are often over-assessed compared to high-dollar properties. That means working- and middle-class families shoulder a bigger burden while wealthier property owners find ways to avoid paying their share. And the horror stories are real. Across the country, families have lost homes they've owned for generations simply because they fell behind on taxes. In Washington, D.C., the Powell family's home--worth more than $700,000--was seized after tax penalties piled up. The city handed their property to a private investor, and the family lost everything. Cases like these show just how destructive property taxes can be. A Better Way Forward There's a better way. A tax system based on consumption--like a sales tax--makes more sense and is far fairer. You pay when you spend, not just for owning a home or land. That means taxpayers have more control over their burden. Everyone who buys something contributes--including tourists and out-of-state visitors. It's broad, transparent, and it encourages saving and investing instead of punishing ownership. Mississippi already relies heavily on sales taxes, but we can do more to shift the load away from property owners. Other states are finding ways to cap property taxes or tie them to inflation to protect homeowners on fixed incomes. Mississippi should do the same, with the goal of eventually moving away from property taxes altogether. Protecting Liberty and Property Property taxes don't just take dollars--they chip away at liberty. Families deserve to pass their homes and farms on to the next generation without fearing that the government will one day take them away. If we want to keep Mississippi affordable, protect our seniors, and defend property rights, we must find the courage to reform this broken system. It's time we stop treating homeowners like tenants of the state and start looking for tax solutions that are fair, transparent, and that respect the right to truly own what is ours. Unleash ICE to the full extent of the law President Trump has closed the Southern Border, but we still have most of the 8 million Biden Border Crashers (and at least 15-17 MILLION illegal aliens total)...costing taxpayers an estimated $150 BILLION dollars a year.Our hospitals are overcrowded, our public services are overextended, and millions of Americans have been replaced by illegal workers. We literally cannot afford to delay.My team at NumbersUSA has 29 years of experience and success in harnessing the power of grassroots armies of American Patriots to defeat the open-borders activists. So if you’re frustrated by the well-funded and organized protests slowing down deportations...if you’re worried about all the illegals still here...and if you want to make a difference right now... Thank you, and God Bless you! | | Roy Beck FounderNumbersUSA | | | P.S. Click the button below to access your Deport 1 Million Petition. I need you to sign and submit it to NumbersUSA right away, along with your best donation.And with a donation of $27 or more, you will join the 8 million members who already call NumbersUSA home. | | | | | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence. GOP Rep. LAuren Boebert called out the Democrat Mayor of Washington D.C., Muriel Bowser, for cutting her city's police budget and letting crime get out of control.
**[Boebert called her out in front of the nation:](https://substack.com/redirect/b38460e9-ee29-4635-b109-eb713dd5696f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "You think you're doing a good job?!!"

# [Trump orders NASA to STOP studying climate [Liberals OUTRAGED]](https://substack.com/redirect/46ae3584-613f-421d-ad1a-63af5604cfc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/46ae3584-613f-421d-ad1a-63af5604cfc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
Trump just appointed a new head of NASA and he is NOT wasting time...
Secretary Sean Duffy has ordered NASA scientists to immediately _**cease and desist**_ all further climate change study...
And _**liberals are FURIOUS**_ ...
They're also praying another shoe isn't about to drop, because Trump and Duffy are now poised to reveal **[NASA's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/46ae3584-613f-421d-ad1a-63af5604cfc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**...
Of all the conspiracy theories surrounding the Apollo moon landing missions... **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/46ae3584-613f-421d-ad1a-63af5604cfc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** may be the most shocking.
And Trump's new NASA chief has the power to expose everything.
Which is why the deep state and liberal media are pulling out all the stops and smearing him at every turn.
They've kept **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/46ae3584-613f-421d-ad1a-63af5604cfc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** secret for decades and they'll do everything in their power to stop it from getting out.
But you can **[click here now](https://substack.com/redirect/46ae3584-613f-421d-ad1a-63af5604cfc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to finally get the truth.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/46ae3584-613f-421d-ad1a-63af5604cfc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. If they're going to these lengths to stop the most powerful man on earth from exposing the truth... there's no telling what they'll do to **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/46ae3584-613f-421d-ad1a-63af5604cfc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Watch it now while it's still available.
* * *
# **Snowflakes threaten to quit if Vanity Fair features Melania Trump on cover**
Global editorial director of Vanity Fair, Mark Guiducci, has reportedly floated the possibility of **[featuring First Lady Melania Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/142b643b-f595-4402-ba83-2a9183dfb5e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on the magazine's cover as he tries to establish himself in his new role at the Conde Nast publication.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/142b643b-f595-4402-ba83-2a9183dfb5e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Not the real Vanity Fair cover, this is our team's imagining of it.
* **Staff threaten mass walkout over potential cover** : Left-leaning editorial staff have reacted with fierce opposition, with one editor threatening "I will walk out the motherf-king door, and half my staff will follow me" if the Melania cover proceeds, calling the Trumps despots they refuse to normalize.
* **Other employees dismiss walkout threats** : Some staff members are skeptical that colleagues would actually quit such prestigious positions over the cover decision, with one saying "It's all talk" and noting that people will "protest and gripe about it" but likely won't abandon their careers.
* **Melania previously excluded from major fashion covers** : Unlike Michelle Obama, who appeared on Vogue's cover three times as First Lady, Melania was notably snubbed by both Vanity Fair and Vogue during Trump's first term, though she has stated she has "no interest" in appearing on magazine covers and has more important work to do.

* * *
# **Dangerous MS-13 member arrested through NCTC intelligence**
The National Counterterrorism Center provided intelligence that helped Border Patrol arrest Jonathan Ezequiel Portillo Beltran, who is **[reportedly a dangerous member of MS-13](https://substack.com/redirect/b4a24b84-c81e-4dc9-9a27-f06fb21881dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , in Los Angeles on August 14.
"Our team works to ensure law enforcement officers have operational intelligence they need when encountering suspected terrorists like Beltran. Thanks to this work, the days of terrorists living freely within our borders are over," NCTC Director Joe Kent said.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4a24b84-c81e-4dc9-9a27-f06fb21881dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Multiple cartel members apprehended** : NCTC intelligence also aided in arrests of suspected cartel members including Luis Alberto Davila Salazar (Los Zetas), Edgar Omar Botello Rangel (Gulf Cartel), and Edgar Martin Rosales Montoya (Sinaloa Cartel) between July and August.
* **Massive expansion of terrorist database** : Since Trump designated drug cartels as terrorist organizations, NCTC has added over 21,000 cartel members to its terrorist database and created over 35,000 identities linked to 10 designated Foreign Terrorist Organizations.
* **Significant border security impact** : The enhanced intelligence operations have resulted in 6,525 suspected terrorists being denied entry into the United States, with NCTC Director Joe Kent claiming "fentanyl deaths are at an all-time low" due to increased coordination efforts.

* * *
# Democrat mayor brags about ignoring immigration orders
Democratic Mayor Barbara Lee publicly **[boasted at the DNC summer meeting](https://substack.com/redirect/d01f279e-1e6e-4521-b662-942a71775b25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Oakland's police "do not cooperate with ICE," openly declaring the city's defiance of federal immigration enforcement efforts.
"Donald Trump, you know, he trashed Oakland, he lied about us, but Oakland is not afraid. We embrace all residents, including our immigrant communities. Our police do not cooperate with ICE. We don't," Lee said to meeting attendees.
* **Democratic Party facing low approval ratings** : The party's favorability has plummeted to 29% according to CNN polling, with only 19% approving of congressional Democratic leadership in a Quinnipiac poll, amid infighting and fundraising difficulties.
* **Trump designates gangs as terrorist organizations** : President Trump issued executive orders on January 20, 2025, designating Venezuelan gang Tren de Aragua, MS-13, and Mexican drug cartels as foreign terrorist organizations as part of his immigration crackdown.
* **Escalating resistance includes violence against federal agents** : Opposition to ICE operations has intensified beyond political defiance to include physical confrontations, with shots fired at ICE facilities in Texas, Democratic officials interfering with operations, and one incident where someone fired at ICE agents during a California marijuana farm raid.

Fellow activist, During these unprecedented times, our nation is navigating a new reality, and our rights and freedoms are consistently at risk of being stripped away. **NOW is the time that we need to invest in our year-round work engaging voters.**

We are preparing for our critical Get-Out-The-Vote (GOTV) door-knocking and digital communication program ahead of the judicial election to begin October through November. Unfortunately, too many **institutions are failing to meet this moment with much-needed EARLY funding.**

Judicial elections could not be more important, yet we are not seeing traditional funders step up to ensure we can counter far-right funders that are already pumping dark money into Pennsylvania. We must fully fund our GOTV program to ensure voters turn out in this important local, municipal, and judicial election year. While it can be common to face scarce funding during odd-year elections, the judges and justices we elect this fall will play a critical role in protecting our voting rights, and all the other freedoms we’ve fought so hard to gain. We cannot afford to slow down or play catch up.

**More than ever before, we are depending on the power of individual grassroots donations to fuel our organization. That is why we are reaching out today. **
[**We are facing the decision to reduce our GOTV efforts as we near the November election, and we cannot let that happen. Will you help fill our budget gap by pitching in $25 today?

_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.

| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, During these unprecedented times, our nation is navigating a new reality, and our rights and freedoms are consistently at risk of being stripped away. NOW is the time that we need to invest in our year-round work engaging voters. We are preparing for our critical Get-Out-The-Vote (GOTV) door-knocking and digital communication program ahead of the judicial election to begin October through November. Unfortunately, too many institutions are failing to meet this moment with much-needed EARLY funding. Judicial elections could not be more important, yet we are not seeing traditional funders step up to ensure we can counter far-right funders that are already pumping dark money into Pennsylvania. We must fully fund our GOTV program to ensure voters turn out in this important local, municipal, and judicial election year. While it can be common to face scarce funding during odd-year elections, the judges and justices we elect this fall will play a critical role in protecting our voting rights, and all the other freedoms we’ve fought so hard to gain. We cannot afford to slow down or play catch up. More than ever before, we are depending on the power of individual grassroots donations to fuel our organization. That is why we are reaching out today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: This isn’t hyperbole. If MAGA is successful with their anti-retention campaign against three Supreme Court justices who were elected as democrats, we will face a constitutional crisis. We are counting on your support to invest in our work and boost our GOTV program to ensure our state courts remain fair and independent. Thank you, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer New Pennsylvania Project Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

Last year, we were proud to support Debra Shigley’s candidacy as she ran against an extremist anti-choice opponent who helped push the state's cruel and deadly 6-week abortion ban. This law has already caused untold harm to women, including Adriana Smith, who was declared brain dead at 8 weeks pregnant and was subsequently placed on _life support_ for months so doctors could retrieve her baby via cesarean section.

The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government, **which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch and a state legislature that is more than 65% male.**

The women of Georgia deserve so much more, and that starts with better representation in their government. That’s why we are thrilled to be supporting Debra Shigley once again as she runs for **the Georgia State Senate District 21.**

While this district is historically represented by Republicans, the special circumstances of this election, combined with disapproval of the current lawmakers in Georgia, put Debra in a unique position to flip this seat. **We believe Debra has what it takes to win this highly competitive seat. Here’s what she had to say:**

_“As a proud member and supporter of Planned Parenthood Southeast, I'm committed to protecting reproductive freedom and expanding access to care for women across our district. Georgia's 6-week abortion ban has created fear, delayed treatment, and put lives at risk — and I won't stand by while politicians play games with our health.”_

[**We only have a few days to get Debra the support she needs to win this race. Join us in this mission by pitching in a split $20.25 contribution between Her Bold Move and Debra Shigley’s campaign today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114008380/565660535/-1604983161?refcode=EM_F_250825ShigleyC_N_JZ_NO_6_NG_B_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5YjkyNGE5LTdlODItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rfQTNlW-elK2RuQrsOT-bWyti2BS8p45czrppo280HI=)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
Her Bold Move
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states.

name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: This has to be done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Republicans in Texas are currently redrawing the map for U.S. House districts to correct the congressional map that the Biden Department of Justice insisted on after the 2020 census. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c6b306dfe2294faba54245e48760144e&_e=Yw8-GmaRdwyHEyEhf5Df_R1GKx7j6e4d2CnbuycH3z_0td2BRrdGUxgRUIyww6H44ywxqhirrOl0wNSxwZK-uxhAuXkqQHQCbeazSXD3TOd0WDZuEvDcI8jFBfKZdjHP3cyuJXDalhJW98pYbMYaXaBDvFYMwyJdJZVzZfobnV5pXE7hkqxRPJFhrGtzDXMZsShQVVNxHcix32cy4LBAiySXJQDZcUhkLBOh8rBTweV6160iQlfVp2wxlXCfX-JMXcZW7rUjPyR-LMfFXtFKwwObyREVnCSxBuYXUK3cYMZYL9t8svTM63UxLC8iSgyCmwffC7Hpz_V9t4sBgmPk2jetCEUUwcvBA8aGi2A5lh4oIWHRNpZCfkOGrOF5mbSjkJ1rvFv4owXWQTPKex6g3Vz0NPFB5D0-wnEefSSTmK_047Z8gy_SaertmRyu3jd3ArFSHs9MhHMQr-zLphaMJlvwAApsmigwGARpSeBVM3tcR4SFZfBT8KRRbEfl1Qg_4v9nDwOpsTQa_kRXDxY_ROJfa7aqcfZR9j6bMzi9EnEP2l8Pz5zMAc5M7iEL-a4El4mOqM3CWfmn0iLwpQFN0doj9sNQEfBrtG58sjQOTA1eJebSFPpAJ5R9nLV7TdaeQUeFKGAcYwENf0hmj7Zrtxo1mmxHg7G_XEs5-9qpiavjAiS2z1S5kDoCkRsRphamhhvoaAtG2dLPwg-V7ABHbXBHQX4US137piRKa3juF0fhE1ZVBCtKoTLG-8S7Ykf7XwqEqkEeeXEnz3ALjda2HA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**I need you to read this carefully**_ — what’s happening with redistricting right now could reshape Congress for the next decade, and Democrats are doing everything they can to rig the game before the next election.

**After the 2020 Census** , Biden’s Department of Justice forced states like Texas to redraw their congressional districts to help Democrats. Now, under the Trump administration, the DOJ has reversed course — declaring those maps to be unconstitutional gerrymanders.

**Texas Republicans are taking action — redrawing the map in a special session, and the result could be up to 5 new GOP seats in the U.S. House.**

That’s why Democrats are panicking. **Gavin Newsom is already threatening to redraw California’s map in retaliation. And Eric Holder and Barack Obama — through their pet project, the National Democratic Redistricting Committee** — are mobilizing in New York, New Jersey, Minnesota, and Washington to offset our gains.

This isn’t a drill. It’s a coordinated attempt to rig the system before voters even head to the polls.

clean_body: Republicans in Texas are currently redrawing the map for U.S. House districts to correct the congressional map that the Biden Department of Justice insisted on after the 2020 census. | Fellow Conservative, I need you to read this carefully — what’s happening with redistricting right now could reshape Congress for the next decade, and Democrats are doing everything they can to rig the game before the next election. After the 2020 Census , Biden’s Department of Justice forced states like Texas to redraw their congressional districts to help Democrats. Now, under the Trump administration, the DOJ has reversed course — declaring those maps to be unconstitutional gerrymanders. Texas Republicans are taking action — redrawing the map in a special session, and the result could be up to 5 new GOP seats in the U.S. House. That’s why Democrats are panicking. Gavin Newsom is already threatening to redraw California’s map in retaliation. And Eric Holder and Barack Obama — through their pet project, the National Democratic Redistricting Committee — are mobilizing in New York, New Jersey, Minnesota, and Washington to offset our gains. This isn’t a drill. It’s a coordinated attempt to rig the system before voters even head to the polls. Democrats have already raised over $52 million to fund their efforts — with help from Obama’s old Organizing for Action network and the Hollywood elites. We must match their energy if we want to preserve the Republican majority and defend fair representation. I may not serve in the House, but as a U.S. Senator, I know how critical it is that we hold the line — because if we lose the House, the Senate won’t have the votes needed to deliver for President Trump’s agenda. , and raise awareness across the country. Can you rush a donation right now to help stop Democrats from trying to rig the map in their favor? We’re facing threats in California, New York, and beyond — and we cannot let them go unanswered. The National Democratic Redistricting Committee knows what it’s doing. Obama and Holder have been preparing this strategy since the day they left office. They’ve merged their fundraising, organized teams of lawyers, and built a pipeline to flip seats by redrawing the rules. If we don’t act now, they’ll make sure the Republican Party is locked out of power for the final years of President Trump’s term. I’m lending my voice and my name to this cause because I’ve seen what Democrats are capable of. They won’t stop at fair competition — they’ll rewrite the rules to win before a single vote is cast. Let’s send them a message: Republicans won’t be erased. In for the mission, Tim Sheehy U.S. Senators- Montana P.S. Every dollar you give will go toward fighting back in court, raising national awareness, and keeping the Democrats from stealing the House through backdoor gerrymandering. We’re just getting started — | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: DemsGive
subject: A first in 111 years? Dispute over a Fed seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Protect Our Democracy Fund
body:
Attempted removal meets legal limits as Fed independence takes center stage.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K3K9AE4F0BHPQSR5CHCPDHZ5_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, The White House says it has fired Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook. Cook responded that the president has no authority to remove her and that she will continue in her role. By law, removing a Fed governor requires “cause,” and that standard may be tested in court. This would mark an unprecedented step in the Fed’s 111-year history. It also raises fresh questions about the independence of the central bank at a time when rate decisions still shape jobs, prices, and growth. [**Read the full story** ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K3K9AE4F0BHPQSR5CHCPDHZ5_1) More soon, Andy
DemsGive.org

Peter,

Republicans are launching an all-out assault on Governor Walz and our One Minnesota values. They know they can’t defend their own agenda—tax breaks for billionaires, cutting public services, and rigging elections by maps or by money—so they’re pouring money into smear campaigns instead.
**To counter their lies, we need to raise $30,000 by Sunday, August 31.** It’s an ambitious goal, but if enough of us step up right now, I know we can get there.

Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
**[Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $10 or more to my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93974?refcode=em20250826-9311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9311%2E614464%2EL9hDie)**

body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=777b42133b3f4b1eac0e0ec0828860ed&_e=JzQaHW9IBSCobpDNnhsGFw0zXtt7YQ4-LO-ylDsooRUwWyXA0lvJp0cUDA0u3nPc3d2gyjrbK1D1t01K8r-cNqpM7gXTC5XKohk_hfsX9JMYlDJyLxnq1X8SIFQt_tnXXWFiPq1zukOplwjY0ePISVg3uC0bMXybTOYN-zd97qDDfS7aLQtlYCOtZBYpyMZd7bECqV-kptog-q5GnoyFnjWPM1aVdqLDjw_Nb5KFt-Elvcw6ZEVOsDWXP3wepnK_qR027b6GiTb5z1nIPr4JyrMt420UPxj9qb_8yHYR9MldDHIjw7uyPB-z8nWoBCJWWD3QAd7aWgT7yCrUlhzwUafH9M2c18pOIeXGErjDQGNA7Rd8SWwVo1GMGeUcZC1Dex8dXT8uRC3qRpqQ08v15RNnzUR5A72B_CvtXIRnkVn1unpDCmdQpPkTYYE8XGtDNL25SJiBSXgKjYPX3LR4-ZdhIguls975Ad_ymxwF3mZacnEPhIBGY2JiB1EDTPxdMiodWRlikU21ADe1NQ8DDywCrZ_4amc_l0mKeE3ozLxdMDu0EsNtEpEOrcP3EjDwr5Q5Q2oxP90DgewUTgyhsnzctW2MqYEfNC75B1DV_WdJjJSWe4x8TCTdUK36kX201AoCpbPod5Hi1zDmadG9BQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=777b42133b3f4b1eac0e0ec0828860ed&_e=JzQaHW9IBSCobpDNnhsGFw0zXtt7YQ4-LO-ylDsooRUwWyXA0lvJp0cUDA0u3nPc3d2gyjrbK1D1t01K8r-cNqpM7gXTC5XKohk_hfsX9JMYlDJyLxnq1X8SIFQt_tnXXWFiPq1zukOplwjY0ePISVg3uC0bMXybTOYN-zd97qDDfS7aLQtlYCOtZBYpyMZd7bECqV-kptog-q5GnoyFnhkuK6mQBdqH71aXv71fMvDumXSkSes3ClsfX5cXNLCmZeZS_OjDKHlK8-y8Fl9SNtqGO8jA2iJutyTwV_j4e9sPU89Kk8IgqaUUIvWGvAlhopOCz5e2JWF3zIKyWGYHkgpoByxSC4nIrw-T4dK4_GtLyJrEGOkuUzOwCb8bjtLdHIZ8bl43zI0ViyOkAK8erbE9iX2Ozdz_SDDEVGasTSL7p5PmWPFXcreypamr7QPXydCQCMR3IR0X3cFiMjiB7NA8juPdkse-9LOFEK-zNbHntg0uSY0EOTWtefIFQRsNCawB-61t8fwvtQq6pIJ0epp2g1jeCHhvGBAQUg2spAujGBJ6S456R1Hfx6ncueugdeeXFvphqxsD7xdLg2JMtUI0s7FImZfc1SfYzIz7x_al7LLPVRvVqQOcgA0axdgjpJznza0RiGyBXilm8Nimpw%3D%3D)
But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Is this the beginning of the end?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
He’s testing how far he can go. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1TID0lw0NeiKL6eq3E5rVnHSkOxJIp6yP3mt-ZBgjjySsOeAxYpvlYccPpvt0ijm34C7GQTaCWDcTcFO3FAi98vwlM52iqlUx1p0lrZ7pUiY77fjPDvgp66b38LKN1ePge7cvuMvuVnhwR0QGJ8z4v2dbeGBz-IfjEYW0791vv9hbQgZjAp82S6Riv5cI93yzYNQjoKgrClBkiouREeQ8A96d9fqNOllXKEXFES58q14AWYZQH298cp9C8QrcGKxrkkf-LDFtBlMiwy87Ta18Fw/4jd/2j4nxEzyQ7a_yARWpzQ1NQ/h0/h001.f3U55XHodXFUzH2tbwOyAovZ5nQj6NW3VFkd5FGMxyQ)
---
Friends, This is real -- and it's getting worse.
First, Trump sent federal troops into D.C., claiming "crime was out of control." **But there was no crisis.** He manufactured it to justify flooding the streets with armed officers. Now, he says he'll send troops into Chicago. New York. Anywhere he thinks people won't fight back.

_**That 's not about safety. That's about control. That's what a dictator does.**_
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1TID0lw0NeiKL6eq3E5rVnHmtx-mdOmD0u4UAqFCW_1kwZUdRm6bbU-nmL252mx1mdv1Cpr3Nl6nrqHMNdV4OQx0PfyNUFbnKPS4V3LAfCQ5eVkSnnk45gNj53F9FmxebyXa_K287kwrjeIRWd80ZcTU_wHWHUooNKFneDK3IwB0VV9dDIjdlT3vVHSohOIMrG3GVXOvIbns5XEbPwlPgEBACmaLOBHpu87fs4SOF2g7JPBrSn-TjHbfiviKVnR8n-nYGe4T2GzYt1M5ENl0ubw/4jd/2j4nxEzyQ7a_yARWpzQ1NQ/h1/h001.w0ZANokcXsrKxZ_Zs7qaVDXBKeWAnRY5RVcl7df0EfI)
---
**And just yesterday, he went even further.** Trump signed an executive order demanding federal prosecution for anyone accused of "desecrating" the American flag -- even though the Supreme Court has ruled it's protected speech. _**It doesn 't stop there. The order lets the attorney general go after protestors and even revoke visas from immigrants who dare to speak out. It's an all-out assault on dissent.**_ **[At No Dem Left Behind, we see exactly what this is-- because we've been fighting it for years in rural towns and deep-red districts where these power grabs hit hardest. We're organizing. We're resisting. But we can't do it alone. Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us fight back -- before Trump pushes even further?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DS9fi8hUq1S8zgcF5CeUO1TID0lw0NeiKL6eq3E5rVnHhHPj4Lcj3oh0dsSESmCwZPy8qiuwevRDSSxvzbv1TsWv1e8cGOwLTWdkK-TMIM170p9i2tbEWDcGntz7Hw7egnYaqUgS7DIN7L5Bf-c9ZaoUyDZIjSjYJ7aNyM560kHe5omp3iQjBm5X27obGlPQQuxqbpeui66upX8KBPnuV3G4i9MIDYqlGK3LDihDwMbrCdFV7GbfTY_BoPtz7KWXMzLqExxkHmUfd_cCvoyuL8489wrXS7ChVCB7wDs1XYy8/4jd/2j4nxEzyQ7a_yARWpzQ1NQ/h2/h001.0-MeyL9YfcNXsVaK6y0Rnq6eOxnq-2ua68Ihews07Rk)**

clean_body: He’s testing how far he can go. | | Friends, This is real -- and it's getting worse. First, Trump sent federal troops into D.C., claiming "crime was out of control." But there was no crisis. He manufactured it to justify flooding the streets with armed officers. Now, he says he'll send troops into Chicago. New York. Anywhere he thinks people won't fight back. That 's not about safety. That's about control. That's what a dictator does. | And just yesterday, he went even further. Trump signed an executive order demanding federal prosecution for anyone accused of "desecrating" the American flag -- even though the Supreme Court has ruled it's protected speech. It doesn 't stop there. The order lets the attorney general go after protestors and even revoke visas from immigrants who dare to speak out. It's an all-out assault on dissent. They want us to feel powerless. Let's show them we're just getting started. No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . clean_body: Now we need to finish August strong — $37,400 left to raise by Sunday. Friend, a shocking Politico poll just dropped. Shocking to the establishment — not to us! I’m officially the leading Republican candidate for Governor of California : We’re outpacing every other Republican and 8 of 9 Democrats...a maverick sheriff...in deep-blue California... Voters are frustrated with government corruption, sick of incompetence. They are hungry for real change in California. They see our campaign as the one that can deliver it. But being the frontrunner means we’ve got a target on our back. The field is shifting, the race is intensifying, and Democrats are spending unlimited sums to stop us. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give, this is it. Any amount, even just a buck, shows the doubters how much grassroots support we’ve got: Thank you for fighting with me, Sheriff Chad Bianco Republican Candidate for California Governor | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC #1479095 3649 Mission Inn Ave., 2nd Floor Rotunda, Riverside, CA 92501 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: God help us if we lose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
Derek,
We are going to pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California because Donald Trump cannot be allowed to steal the next election by redrawing maps in red states only.
I've heard the calls to "Do Something!" And I agree. I don’t want to go to another candlelight vigil. I don’t want to hold hands. It's time for action. Concrete action.
And God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
This is going to be a big week.
In Texas, Republicans have passed their new maps.
Here in California, our legislature put a special election on the ballot for November where the people will vote on our maps.
They don't need a vote of the people in Texas. In California, people will vote. It will be a close election. Republicans will spend more than $100 million to beat us.
**[Please make a contribution to help me and Adam Schiff pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. If you've given before, please give once more. If you haven't given yet, now is when I need you most. We cannot afford to lose this election.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250826_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=3&akid=8939%2E5257348%2E-QpvEq)**

name: Team Rob
subject: Rob's NEPA Rundown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
Getting to Every Corner of PA-08 🗺️

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/00a3ac178c30/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| | Good Morning,
This past week, Rob had the privilege of engaging with communities all across the 8th Congressional district. He joined the Meredith Hose Company for their 2nd Annual Wine & Brew Festival, attended the Pittston Tomato Festival, and cheered on the Wyoming Valley Challengers at the Little League World Series. In addition, he toured Matamoras in Pike County alongside community leaders to discuss local needs and opportunities for growth.
Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | This entire month, Rob has been working hard to get to every corner of PA-08. His main goal is to help his neighbors and those he represents. He had a great week and is looking forward to getting back to Washington to continue the fight for all Northeastern Pennsylvanians!
---
|
---
|
---
| | Yesterday, many of our children across the district started their new school year. We would like to wish all the students a safe and educational school year!
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=30f70dd8e8&e=131e83a3c2)
| | Our Small Business of the Week is National Bakery in Scranton. Be sure to support local businesses!
---
|
---
| | The midterms are creeping up on us and are more critical than even 2024. That’s why the far-left is attacking Rob with lies and smears. He’s fighting for NEPA values, the American economy, and the truth.
**Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Do you agree with this Good Idea?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=v8IO9htMbN2VynavkQk8vQKU4ItskQIiFJ3W7CdRjylnH45K7B84G761zFwPuoONL9ieswo%2BF89f%2BAj5AgaFS2A5kqayMS%2Bf0dnMtrmKG88PWT99T%2B5yZ9Efb5CJ6Sx3znrZZ33g50PS0R%2BFB4CKVqW8FfhZ1ZebSImTzZwugnFzyn%2FwPR2nxXjRkqYKiMnw1umpeDu4WFt3J6D87YYWqhEDHH34HZw%2B%2B6lMGQf%2BLuHrA4LI5gNGODFuH14zzoa6JbTqu1FzP0ZhjMgQPCNXUjZEc3sjjQwTqy33WNf%2FevUX6YN5O5w6vlZi4o6LvbYZJbhnhwgkuJFxcQfR59WMgEAbZfwbS%2BLGjuyUXCw5EFAZiuNeFy10smlr7elLzPIwR5iFiswmuQBYppSwApBGeqsbD41wbguw%2F9VPdd%2BVdDHwc6a%2F1gamfuGtxB2OLej2)
---
| |
---
Peter,

This week’s Good Idea came from a constituent in Cranston: **companies shouldn’t be allowed to sell our personal data without giving us a choice.**

And she’s right. Every day, corporations profit off our most personal information — _what we buy, where we go, and even what we search online_ — without our consent. **It’s wrong, and it’s time we take back control.**

These are exactly the kinds of fights I want to keep bringing to Congress. If I stay in this seat, I can keep pushing to make sure we protect people’s data, lower costs, and fight for common-sense solutions that actually make life better.

But I can’t do that without your help. I’m up against opponents who don’t want these fights — because they’d rather protect corporate profits than protect your privacy.

**That’s why I’m asking:** [will you contribute $10 today to help me keep fighting for Good Ideas like this one in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114025248/565701386/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250826_FR_GoodIdea_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzBmMzk3Yi04YzgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VKqq45qxORcBItgXmKbjmm_AMGLpjeJvVwNJ-2s0EfI=) | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114025250/565701387/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250826_FR_GoodIdea_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzBmMzk3Yi04YzgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VKqq45qxORcBItgXmKbjmm_AMGLpjeJvVwNJ-2s0EfI=)

Together, we can stand up to corporate interests, take back control of our personal information, and make sure voices like yours are heard in Washington.

— Seth

clean_body: Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, This week’s Good Idea came from a constituent in Cranston: companies shouldn’t be allowed to sell our personal data without giving us a choice. And she’s right. Every day, corporations profit off our most personal information — what we buy, where we go, and even what we search online — without our consent. It’s wrong, and it’s time we take back control. These are exactly the kinds of fights I want to keep bringing to Congress. If I stay in this seat, I can keep pushing to make sure we protect people’s data, lower costs, and fight for common-sense solutions that actually make life better. But I can’t do that without your help. I’m up against opponents who don’t want these fights — because they’d rather protect corporate profits than protect your privacy. That’s why I’m asking: = | | = Together, we can stand up to corporate interests, take back control of our personal information, and make sure voices like yours are heard in Washington. — Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =**.

body:
Public safety isn't soldiers in the streets--it's safe schools, safe jobs, safe neighborhoods

| |
---|---|---

# [Trump's Tough Guy Act Is Making America Less Safe](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171988388&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxOTg4Mzg4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYyMjA5NTUsImV4cCI6MTc1ODgxMjk1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OWLRZp08wyZLhaVLVi3tB4UCuW5oqfbbEddZqE6UP8Q)
### Public safety isn't soldiers in the streets--it's safe schools, safe jobs, safe neighborhoods
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Aug 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171988388&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxOTg4Mzg4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NjIyMDk1NSwiZXhwIjoxNzU4ODEyOTU1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0aQhVPyuWWt36lbEO4WhdKHikHnPu7UlpSPbEaJjhm0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171988388&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxOTg4Mzg4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYyMjA5NTUsImV4cCI6MTc1ODgxMjk1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OWLRZp08wyZLhaVLVi3tB4UCuW5oqfbbEddZqE6UP8Q&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171988388&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxOTg4Mzg4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYyMjA5NTUsImV4cCI6MTc1ODgxMjk1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OWLRZp08wyZLhaVLVi3tB4UCuW5oqfbbEddZqE6UP8Q)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/trumps-tough-guy-act-is-making-america?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Donald Trump is once again trying to play the tough guy. He's already deployed U.S. military forces into cities like D.C. and L.A., and now he's eyeing places like Baltimore and my hometown, Chicago. He claims it's about public safety. It's not.
It's political theater--dangerous, cynical acting. It's a smokescreen to distract from his failures on the economy, the job market, and his own legal messes. A power grab to look strong as his popularity tanks.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/a0faf254-9260-46c5-974e-3628c407af3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/a0faf254-9260-46c5-974e-3628c407af3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And here's the part that really pisses me off: while Trump flexes for the cameras, he's actively making Americans _less_ safe. He's undermining local law enforcement, trashing municipal leadership, and burning through our tax dollars to do it. He's got FBI agents babysitting drunk college kids in Georgetown instead of going after drug rings and human traffickers. Meanwhile, he's slashing the very programs that actually reduce violence and keep communities safe.
Let's pause here and make a distinction we don't talk about enough:
**Crime is statistical. Safety is emotional.**
Crime is homicide rates, burglaries, shootings per capita.
Safety is whether you feel okay letting your kid walk to school, sit on the porch, ride the train without looking over your shoulder.
Trump knows people crave safety. So do Republicans. But instead of facts, they sell fear. They tell you you're not safe, then roll in the troops to "prove" it.
It's bullshit.
Crime surged during the pandemic, but now? It's plummeting.
* Baltimore saw a 62% drop in monthly homicides this spring.
* Chicago just logged its steepest homicide decline in a decade.
* New York had its lowest first-quarter shootings since 1994.

Republicans love to dunk on "Democratic cities," but here's the inconvenient truth: crime is rising in red states while it's falling in blue ones.
And you couldn't pay a GOP official to address the disaster in their own backyards:
* West Virginia leads the nation in overdose deaths.
* Oklahoma has the worst schools in the country.
* Texas's power grid collapses every time it gets hot or cold.
* Louisiana is the murder capital of America.
* Mississippi has the highest poverty rate.

**Where 's the Republican urgency on **_**those**_**crises?**
Their policy failures--on education, guns, health care, infrastructure--are tanking their own states. And Trump? He doesn't give a damn. He's chasing headlines and cheap applause at the expense of his own voters.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/a0faf254-9260-46c5-974e-3628c407af3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/a0faf254-9260-46c5-974e-3628c407af3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's zoom out and look at the GOP's budget train wreck:
Billions slashed from community policing which means fewer cops on the streets. Hundreds of safety orgs cut off from DOJ grants--$820 million, gone.
These weren't extras. They were the backbone of actual, proven progress. A few more highlights from the GOP chopping block:
* $13 million cut from rural law enforcement investigating sexual assault and child abuse
* $169 million cut from community violence prevention programs that stop shootings _before_ they happen

And then Trump turns around and accuses _Democrats_ of defunding the police?
The hypocrisy is staggering.
This is the GOP playbook: defund government until it breaks, then point at the wreckage and say, "See? Told you it doesn't work."
Let's be crystal clear: Trump has no business pretending to be America's top cop.
He won't release the full Epstein files--because his name's in them.
He's been indicted for fraud, obstruction, and more.
Now he's militarizing city streets to protect _his_ image.
He doesn't care about law and order. He cares about Donald Trump.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/a0faf254-9260-46c5-974e-3628c407af3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/a0faf254-9260-46c5-974e-3628c407af3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And Democrats--listen up. On policy, we're winning.
Crime is down.
Community programs are working.
Federal investments have helped cities like Baltimore, Chicago, and New York make real progress.
I live in Chicago--I _feel_ the difference. There's still work to do, but we're moving in the right direction.
But on _messaging_? We're getting our asses handed to us.
Republicans own the emotional ground on "safety" because Democrats don't claim it boldly enough. We throw statistics at people who are scared, instead of speaking to what they _feel_.
Time to flip the script:
We're not weak on crime. We're strong on safety.
Republicans stage fear. Democrats fight like hell to keep you safe.
Trump militarizes our cities. Democrats invest in our communities.
Because public safety isn't soldiers in the streets--it's safe schools, safe jobs, safe neighborhoods based around community policing, mutual trust and respect, and politicians who actually give a damn.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/a0faf254-9260-46c5-974e-3628c407af3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

Public safety isn't soldiers in the streets--it's safe schools, safe jobs, safe neighborhoods | | | Aug 26 | | | | | | | | | | | | Donald Trump is once again trying to play the tough guy. He's already deployed U.S. military forces into cities like D.C. and L.A., and now he's eyeing places like Baltimore and my hometown, Chicago. He claims it's about public safety. It's not. It's political theater--dangerous, cynical acting. It's a smokescreen to distract from his failures on the economy, the job market, and his own legal messes. A power grab to look strong as his popularity tanks. And here's the part that really pisses me off: while Trump flexes for the cameras, he's actively making Americans less safe. He's undermining local law enforcement, trashing municipal leadership, and burning through our tax dollars to do it. He's got FBI agents babysitting drunk college kids in Georgetown instead of going after drug rings and human traffickers. Meanwhile, he's slashing the very programs that actually reduce violence and keep communities safe. Let's pause here and make a distinction we don't talk about enough: Crime is statistical. Safety is emotional. Crime is homicide rates, burglaries, shootings per capita. Safety is whether you feel okay letting your kid walk to school, sit on the porch, ride the train without looking over your shoulder. Trump knows people crave safety. So do Republicans. But instead of facts, they sell fear. They tell you you're not safe, then roll in the troops to "prove" it. It's bullshit. Crime surged during the pandemic, but now? It's plummeting. Baltimore saw a 62% drop in monthly homicides this spring. Chicago just logged its steepest homicide decline in a decade. New York had its lowest first-quarter shootings since 1994. Republicans love to dunk on "Democratic cities," but here's the inconvenient truth: crime is rising in red states while it's falling in blue ones. And you couldn't pay a GOP official to address the disaster in their own backyards: West Virginia leads the nation in overdose deaths. Oklahoma has the worst schools in the country. Texas's power grid collapses every time it gets hot or cold. Louisiana is the murder capital of America. Mississippi has the highest poverty rate. Where 's the Republican urgency on thosecrises? Their policy failures--on education, guns, health care, infrastructure--are tanking their own states. And Trump? He doesn't give a damn. He's chasing headlines and cheap applause at the expense of his own voters. Let's zoom out and look at the GOP's budget train wreck: Billions slashed from community policing which means fewer cops on the streets. Hundreds of safety orgs cut off from DOJ grants--$820 million, gone. These weren't extras. They were the backbone of actual, proven progress. A few more highlights from the GOP chopping block: $13 million cut from rural law enforcement investigating sexual assault and child abuse $169 million cut from community violence prevention programs that stop shootings before they happen And then Trump turns around and accuses Democrats of defunding the police? The hypocrisy is staggering. This is the GOP playbook: defund government until it breaks, then point at the wreckage and say, "See? Told you it doesn't work." Let's be crystal clear: Trump has no business pretending to be America's top cop. He won't release the full Epstein files--because his name's in them. He's been indicted for fraud, obstruction, and more. Now he's militarizing city streets to protect his image. He doesn't care about law and order. He cares about Donald Trump. And Democrats--listen up. On policy, we're winning. Crime is down. Community programs are working. Federal investments have helped cities like Baltimore, Chicago, and New York make real progress. I live in Chicago--I feel the difference. There's still work to do, but we're moving in the right direction. But on messaging? We're getting our asses handed to us. Republicans own the emotional ground on "safety" because Democrats don't claim it boldly enough. We throw statistics at people who are scared, instead of speaking to what they feel. Time to flip the script: We're not weak on crime. We're strong on safety. Republicans stage fear. Democrats fight like hell to keep you safe. Trump militarizes our cities. Democrats invest in our communities. Because public safety isn't soldiers in the streets--it's safe schools, safe jobs, safe neighborhoods based around community policing, mutual trust and respect, and politicians who actually give a damn. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

---|---|---
_Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here:_ [ATXpulsepremium.com](https://substack.com/redirect/e9398131-57d1-4a65-b377-e06c7fe86dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> Read the most recent FREE subscriber email [here](https://substack.com/redirect/152b0138-3e0f-4969-afcf-882b9a6ac8de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr [here](https://substack.com/redirect/e9398131-57d1-4a65-b377-e06c7fe86dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" Love Field unveils overhaul plan that could add 50% more passengers," **Dallas Morning News' **Jordan Parker** \-- "[Dallas Love Field](https://substack.com/redirect/8219631f-58fe-43c2-9120-c4ad47171b70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) leaders are calling for a major overhaul to expand the airport in an attempt to squeeze more passengers into the size-restricted air hub.

Plans call for expanding the terminal, building a new facility for TSA security checkpoints and new baggage claim and adding a fourth parking garage, among other changes.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/cb8f57a5-b2b0-4e1e-8d9b-e94879b82cb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
That could help the airport increase passenger traffic by almost 50% while keeping the legally mandated 20 gates.

The expansion program, dubbed [Love What's Next](https://substack.com/redirect/5c425515-792b-4693-971a-2a9780495f34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), is entering its final stages of development and [was presented](https://substack.com/redirect/386f4984-3479-4991-b76a-aa176d389cc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the Dallas City Council last week. The airport, which is owned by the city of Dallas and hosts the headquarters for [Southwest Airlines](https://substack.com/redirect/be8d6a48-5e87-449b-959b-eb5f60a38e4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), is now determining the financial feasibility of the project and final layout details.

**Patrick Carreno** , the airport's aviation director, told _The Dallas Morning News_ that the Dallas Love Field Expansion Airport Program's [initial design](https://substack.com/redirect/a1af1439-39d3-467c-a83c-b28055c6f7e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) includes a 50-foot extension of the existing terminal, a consolidated rental car facility, a new terminal headhouse for ticketing, TSA security checkpoints and baggage claim, a new parking garage and a commercial pickup area for transportation companies such as Uber and Lyft.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/cb8f57a5-b2b0-4e1e-8d9b-e94879b82cb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A skybridge will connect passengers between security and the main terminal, Carreno said. New access roadways and elevated roadways to improve the flow of traffic around the airport are also part of the plans.

Officials [expressed hope last week](https://substack.com/redirect/5cd30f5f-c25d-4b5c-b57e-2de209ecaa24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the plan would "enhance capacity, elevate the passenger experience and prepare the City of Dallas-owned airport for continued long-term growth." A team will begin designing the project early next year, with "full construction" set to begin in the first quarter of 2027, Carreno said. "We don't have the full timeline yet. We're looking at full completion towards the end of the decade, early next decade, to finish all 14 components of the LEAP program."

Carreno said the project does not have a price tag yet, though he admitted it will be "significantly higher" than the $800 million that the airlines operating at the airport already agreed to pay for their portion of the costs. The previous major improvement project for Love Field, the Love Field Modernization Program, was valued at $519 million, officials said.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9860a3b9-909d-448f-96c1-fb610a88b940?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A screenshot of a video of preliminary plans to redesign Dallas Love Field to accommodate more passengers, which was presented to Dallas officials last week. (Courtesy Dallas Love Field)
The announcement of the plan comes three months after [Southwest Airlines solidified its commitment to Love Field as its home base through at least 2040](https://substack.com/redirect/3397b14e-e4da-4614-bfbb-b321dc48fc1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The carrier operates 18 of the airport's 20 gates, with Atlanta-based Delta Airlines operating the other two.

Love Field [had nearly 18 million passengers last year](https://substack.com/redirect/3c7abf45-6975-43cc-b890-0f2e99209ac4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The current terminal complex, designed in 2013, has a designed capacity for 8 million passenger boardings. By 2018, capacity had already exceeded that level, officials said. The increased capacity came on the heels of the 2014 repeal of the Wright Amendment, initially passed in 1979 to restrict the airport so that it could not compete with the larger DFW International Airport. After the law was repealed, Southwest could offer nonstop flights to any destination in the U.S.

Despite the repeal, some [restrictions of the law](https://substack.com/redirect/18a0a76e-e396-4458-a21d-5232886e2d00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are still enforced through an agreement between the city of Dallas, the city of Fort Worth, Southwest Airlines, American Airlines and the DFW Airport Board.

The agreement stipulates that Love Field is limited to 20 gates, cannot offer international passenger service and had to negotiate a voluntary noise curfew with commercial airlines. According to Carreno, the airport is the only one in the country with a federal law restricting the number of gates it can have.

Despite the restrictions, Love Field is now the [32nd busiest airport in the U.S](https://substack.com/redirect/cdeef11f-ef22-44b1-b4ed-961ef4dd786d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The airport forecasts it could eventually handle 11.9 million passenger boardings and nearly 24 million passengers total under the gate cap, Carreno said.

"We think that's what is possible," Carreno said. "So this program is looking at how we get ourselves to that activity level."

Carreno said Love Field could get close to reaching those passenger estimates by early next decade. "That's why we want to fast-track this program and make sure that we can accommodate and continue to add passengers into this airport."" [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/92abfe90-1779-4b01-9b84-2b7f93fc01b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)
* * *

With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | | ---|---|--- Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . TOP NEWS " Love Field unveils overhaul plan that could add 50% more passengers," Dallas Morning News' Jordan Parker \-- " leaders are calling for a major overhaul to expand the airport in an attempt to squeeze more passengers into the size-restricted air hub. Plans call for expanding the terminal, building a new facility for TSA security checkpoints and new baggage claim and adding a fourth parking garage, among other changes. That could help the airport increase passenger traffic by almost 50% while keeping the legally mandated 20 gates. The expansion program, dubbed , is entering its final stages of development and to the Dallas City Council last week. The airport, which is owned by the city of Dallas and hosts the headquarters for , is now determining the financial feasibility of the project and final layout details. Patrick Carreno , the airport's aviation director, told The Dallas Morning News that the Dallas Love Field Expansion Airport Program's includes a 50-foot extension of the existing terminal, a consolidated rental car facility, a new terminal headhouse for ticketing, TSA security checkpoints and baggage claim, a new parking garage and a commercial pickup area for transportation companies such as Uber and Lyft. A skybridge will connect passengers between security and the main terminal, Carreno said. New access roadways and elevated roadways to improve the flow of traffic around the airport are also part of the plans. Officials that the plan would "enhance capacity, elevate the passenger experience and prepare the City of Dallas-owned airport for continued long-term growth." A team will begin designing the project early next year, with "full construction" set to begin in the first quarter of 2027, Carreno said. "We don't have the full timeline yet. We're looking at full completion towards the end of the decade, early next decade, to finish all 14 components of the LEAP program." Carreno said the project does not have a price tag yet, though he admitted it will be "significantly higher" than the $800 million that the airlines operating at the airport already agreed to pay for their portion of the costs. The previous major improvement project for Love Field, the Love Field Modernization Program, was valued at $519 million, officials said. | | ---|---|--- A screenshot of a video of preliminary plans to redesign Dallas Love Field to accommodate more passengers, which was presented to Dallas officials last week. (Courtesy Dallas Love Field) The announcement of the plan comes three months after . The carrier operates 18 of the airport's 20 gates, with Atlanta-based Delta Airlines operating the other two. Love Field . The current terminal complex, designed in 2013, has a designed capacity for 8 million passenger boardings. By 2018, capacity had already exceeded that level, officials said. The increased capacity came on the heels of the 2014 repeal of the Wright Amendment, initially passed in 1979 to restrict the airport so that it could not compete with the larger DFW International Airport. After the law was repealed, Southwest could offer nonstop flights to any destination in the U.S. Despite the repeal, some are still enforced through an agreement between the city of Dallas, the city of Fort Worth, Southwest Airlines, American Airlines and the DFW Airport Board. The agreement stipulates that Love Field is limited to 20 gates, cannot offer international passenger service and had to negotiate a voluntary noise curfew with commercial airlines. According to Carreno, the airport is the only one in the country with a federal law restricting the number of gates it can have. Despite the restrictions, Love Field is now the . The airport forecasts it could eventually handle 11.9 million passenger boardings and nearly 24 million passengers total under the gate cap, Carreno said. "We think that's what is possible," Carreno said. "So this program is looking at how we get ourselves to that activity level." Carreno said Love Field could get close to reaching those passenger estimates by early next decade. "That's why we want to fast-track this program and make sure that we can accommodate and continue to add passengers into this airport."" body:

| Peter,
Donald Trump doesn't need to win the headlines to win back the White House. He tried chaos on Jan. 6 and it failed. He tried a loud, billion-dollar Supreme Court race in Wisconsin earlier this year -- and Democrats shut him down.
So now he's learned his lesson - and he and his MAGA Extremists are still plotting their takeover.
Instead of noise, Trump is making moves in silence. His next target -- Pennsylvania.

Three Democratic justices are on the ballot this November in a retention election most voters don't even know is happening. If MAGA groups can flip those seats, they'll seize control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. And once they do, they'll have the power to redraw maps, restrict voting rights, and toss out legal challenges -- paving the way for Trump in 2028.
This is Trump's hidden path to a third term. No rallies. No riots. Just three quiet "No" votes on a November ballot.
Defend Our Courts is one of the only groups exposing this plan. But we're being outspent and are outnumbered -- and if we wait until October to act, it will be too late. [Can you chip in right now to help us shine a spotlight on Trump's stealth campaign and stop his backdoor plan to the White House?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AknPhgeUZN3pRpBhdyOTh4Lx8E0uGwPSUF4NrN8bB-GhwcqqK2yXxxkFfxlckxmUaI_UcnHUvwAlHWDLIoEosrTXYmrDiy5wgCkwQFVPT-Rl0eDr4hY0N9S2gv6lDdF9I8b-sOjQZGYTlhaQ8TF4GfhuYEeqH2fdg2_ZE1Rxv71NmN11Q16hl_dEcfPoVlYvIgsE31OMFeeAb_GGCJw-lPGVS0OpOPewg6kRlfJQuiE=&c=Mr_mrFI2L6NDgKHdQ5SLrTpGQnEDxt-DwdVF95owwn72xUY3GmkbHw==&ch=cQuMKUsD1dl2AgpM_kxbaMT_KzQv9S6mDF_6UWcBhTf5f2o5Bjh79Q==)
