name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: ICE is beyond reform and should be abolished.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump has made ICE the centerpiece of his fascist attack on immigrants and our democracy.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1782%2E791427%2E74lWL9)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-ice/?source=em250826-1-180&akid=1782%2E791427%2E74lWL9)
Friend — Over the last seven months we have watched Trump make ICE the centerpiece of his fascist attack on immigrants and our democracy.
So far, Trump has used ICE to
* Arrest student protesters for exercising free speech and hold them in indefinite detention.

* Suspend due process and deport both documented and undocumented immigrants on suspicion alone.

* Terrorize immigrant communities with violent raids, racial profiling, and gestapo-tactics.

* Deport legal US residents to a notorious super-prison in El Salvador with no trial and no pathway to return home.

* Construct concentration camps to hold immigrant families in disgusting and inhumane conditions without contact with the outside world.

* Take over the streets of DC and violate civil rights to respond to a fake “crime emergency.”

In a functioning democracy, these would be criminal acts. Under Trump, they are part of an authoritarian plan to turn our country into a constant police state.
Friend, ICE was created 2003 — it’s not a long-standing institution in our democracy, and it’s not a necessary one either. We can have a functional and humane immigration system without the need for violent crackdowns.
That’s why we’re asking: **[Do you support Ilhan’s push to abolish ICE and hold the Trump administration accountable for these abuses? If so, please, sign on to our petition today and help us show that a vast majority of Americans oppose Trump’s secret police and support the end of ICE.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-ice/?source=em250826-1-180&akid=1782%2E791427%2E74lWL9)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-ice/?source=em250826-1-180&akid=1782%2E791427%2E74lWL9)**
America has been a country of immigrants since its founding. It’s a blessing there was no ICE when millions of people immigrated here to escape war, famine, and persecution throughout our history — people who went on to build this country from the ground up and do great things for their communities and the world.
We can and should do away with this thuggish police force that serves no purpose but to carry out Trump’s fascist policies.
In solidarity with all of our immigrant friends and neighbors,
Team Ilhan
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-ice/?source=em250826-1-180&akid=1782%2E791427%2E74lWL9)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1782%2E791427%2E74lWL9)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1782%2E791427%2E74lWL9)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1782%2E791427%2E74lWL9)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1782_791427_74lWL9&akid=1782%2E791427%2E74lWL9)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

Hi Supporter!

We are excited to host our Coffee & Calls for Toni ☕📱

series on *Sundays* at *10:00 AM. *

why we are organizing now for Toni.

help us reach voters for Toni!

*When: *Every Sunday from 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM

When: Every Sunday from 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM Where: SD Headquarters Click here <>to register for a Sunday that works best for you today! If you are not based in San Diego, we have two virtual opportunities to phone bank for Toni this week. Join us by registering below. Tuesday 8/26 6-7:30 PM <> Thursday 8/28 6-7:30 PM <> Stay in the loop on all campaign opportunities by joining us on Outreach Circle. <> Thank you, Ryan at Team Toni

Trump-Endorsed Conservative Connects with Voters in All Corners of the State

| | | | | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** August 26th, 2025
**Karrin Taylor Robson Completes 100th Campaign Stop Since June 1st** _Momentum Grows Across Arizona as Trump-Endorsed Conservative Connects with Voters in All Corners of the State_
**PHOENIX, AZ** – Trump-endorsed conservative and Arizona business leader Karrin Taylor Robson announced that she has completed her 100th campaign stop since June 1st, highlighting her commitment to meeting voters face-to-face and building the strongest grassroots campaign in Arizona.
Over the past three months, KTR has traveled thousands of miles, engaging directly with Republican leaders, grassroots activists, and everyday Arizonans from across the state. Her campaign has prioritized listening to voters, earning trust, and showing that she is the conservative business executive with the work ethic and vision to Make Arizona Strong Again and defeat Katie Hobbs.
“This milestone is proof of the movement we are building,” said **Karrin Taylor Robson.** “In every corner of Arizona, voters are ready for a Governor who will fight for secure borders, safe communities, strong families, and have President Trump’s back. With President Trump’s endorsement, the grassroots behind us, and the momentum we’ve built through 100 campaign stops, our campaign is built to win — and we are just getting started.”
---
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=95a685d567&e=ebfb0fda52)
| | **About Karrin Taylor Robson** Karrin Taylor Robson is a lifelong conservative, successful business leader, and mother of four running for Governor of Arizona with the endorsement of President Donald J. Trump. She is committed to securing the border, restoring law and order, cutting waste and fraud in government, and fighting for a stronger economy and a stronger Arizona.

In Tampa one officer was shot while he was standing in front of his station.In Kansas City a deputy sheriff was shot and killed while responding to a domestic violence call. And in Baton Rouge another officer was intentionally rammed and runover by a criminal who was later caught because he was bragging about the barbaric crime on social media.Friend, I’m sorry to have to recap these horror stories for you, but these tragic events remind me of what would’ve happened to Officer Brad Lunsford and his fellow officer if Brad hadn’t responded quickly and decisively in following his training.Now instead of being awarded for his courage and heroism, Brad is facing 11 years in prison because Soros-funded New Mexico Attorney General Raul Torrez hates the police. **[Friend, will you join us in supporting Brad Lunsford’s fight for justice?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e8d45dbc0764145a6971ac752a9e6ff&_e=feWUVXInZwttqykXCpvyImmKpJ7Lt-hPQwps2SqbNcBfu1PGZEMEHJ1Yq_ZqnfolEsta7NoBqEtcs77ZiRwX6ApyTfJWdfsjkobtUN0Ib4r5uNZLS8vXuCsCr62clCfQxkNgr0RKOF0fuXaz517JtkMSFJI27wHE6X8I04a8uDSM2HN-nk30bfFGTrKW4I7uZ3CugZY6Pq3NpLPI9kmBZv6QZDDc-Ufl5p49Hty-nWwzeyMmOKtw4Sf7HPpkLhnE2XsUTALbF_uMZ2BBsJp4EKj-XD8b-wK49QcbNEFqqsdXGPbhGDZYMGEupUrtbMqUj7zhs8Fdc3LnKAWpG-ZZKBwBVlt4V-7oOPV7sWent2DjWCp6uRV4IY2g2B6LJSsALRpSuv1XfsTJGNgFq1v3G4Prnust5qxoS-Ryd9p9dBeJu9SWMYD1gb-IRznjwBZi9tf-f2gnHJvCXv6H_NYsQt0-ckQVqQzL_WsPrxYzW2rt8EJ_rEn94gpOXRxmFiYW9iVOE7AbBSY1NmG-vqW8MkFDgtgT11-iKlE0pp4rEuHmrxEyqBnK2IPDW9aw-5wSC9ezlUmTGWBRb00ltz9kgymOaY2e8Th3JQO4NPEl3E9rPrVeOa9luVVVxNq_bObwL7bPCSOMydjclF0jiDQqtWpqkwHlY8KjXcT4zXMa8V0%3D)** Like every other Soros-backed prosecutor, Torrez is following a political playbook: crack down on innocent officers and let offenders go free. Not only did one of the jurors conceal their BLM activism, but now Raul Torrez is defending the juror who failed to disclose their documented anti-police bias at the New Mexico supreme court! Friend, this isn’t merely unjust...it’s criminal.Which is why the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) is doubling down in our efforts to support Officer Lunsford and provide the best legal defense possible.If you’ve heard of LELDF you know that we organize and fund the successful legal defense of good officers wrongly charged for crimes – like Officer Brad Lunsford. Helping to hire the best attorneys and secure expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. **[As we prepare leading up to Brad's hearing on September 19th, will show your support by donating $35 or more to fund Brad’s defense?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e8d45dbc0764145a6971ac752a9e6ff&_e=feWUVXInZwttqykXCpvyImmKpJ7Lt-hPQwps2SqbNcBfu1PGZEMEHJ1Yq_ZqnfolEsta7NoBqEtcs77ZiRwX6ApyTfJWdfsjkobtUN0Ib4r5uNZLS8vXuCsCr62clCfQxkNgr0RKOF0fuXaz517JtkMSFJI27wHE6X8I04a8uDSM2HN-nk30bfFGTrKW4I7uZ3CugZY6Pq3NpLPI9kmBZv6QZDDc-Ufl5p49Hty-nWxO4D5cfBI2vQrd2XfSkwm5X3MmB1NibZ11iYnzFGLxtY8KgYOqJnNkvXqbPpbf63F_lpxnZAzp4GsNRdUVuRIdY--76q4QSbsyzSkp1qZETliatl-clBaK6uoDdTpMDl0zxUPgRFb3K25ZX9NK70rOzcdT5Jkpx6-i1WSXfBFDPZPYBkhl6lcTXyEP3olI943MJXzLpuoJxHvAqiEm8MLYEcaAXtjlBpaf3tnUOqehD4Yfp8ls7Rg-dddchjnNcuGUl3LK38u9Dcr3KQY59vIg4bQnZVY1N0HFRN0loInar04Wah3F7A4ClOyolWMA9UcrZb9xm7ZPod7wz8-vfI8-lkgYfcsUoYT-cROwxe1QFhtpDqnhRk84f1ucVYkY7xjnIRCL_UH1ySiYuLVe3BLHoVrtlQmazHdUkKj2c8nDJnLS6GhlfteARFsSXayU4Us%3D)** Your tax-deductible donation is more than a financial help to the Lunsford family as they continue to deal with politically motivated battles in court – it’s a sign of hope for them to know that they’re not alone in this fight.As the country faces increasing violence against our law enforcement, thank you for choosing to stand with our men and women in blue.

Friend, this isn’t merely unjust...it’s criminal.Which is why the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) is doubling down in our efforts to support Officer Lunsford and provide the best legal defense possible.If you’ve heard of LELDF you know that we organize and fund the successful legal defense of good officers wrongly charged for crimes – like Officer Brad Lunsford. Helping to hire the best attorneys and secure expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. Your tax-deductible donation is more than a financial help to the Lunsford family as they continue to deal with politically motivated battles in court – it’s a sign of hope for them to know that they’re not alone in this fight.As the country faces increasing violence against our law enforcement, thank you for choosing to stand with our men and women in blue. | | Sincerely, Jason C. JohnsonPresident, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! | | | ---|---|--- © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\}) |

name: Bruna, United We Dream
subject: DACA recipients will lose their access to health coverage through the ACA
body:
Together, we have the strength to push back. | | | Peter, it’s Bruna from United We Dream — I’m reaching out because our fight for immigrant justice and dignity is more urgent than ever. _Due to a decision by the administration, as of August 25, DACA recipients are no longer eligible for health insurance coverage under the Affordable Care Act (ACA) 1. _ For many DACA recipients, access to affordable health care is not just a policy issue; it's a lifeline. Approximately **11,000 DACA recipients nationwide will lose health coverage without access to the ACA**. Health care is a fundamental human right, and everyone should have access to it, _regardless of their immigration status._ This is yet another attempt at intimidation by the administration, but we know that the power to initiate real change rests with us — _the people._**We know that immigrants are exercising the strength and resilience of our communities to create a future where we can all thrive.** Through collective action, advocacy, and community support, we have the strength to push back against policies that undermine our shared values and to fight for the rights of all immigrants. United We Dream is committed to this essential work, but we need your support. Your contribution will fuel our efforts to advocate for policies that ensure justice and dignity for immigrant communities. [**Please consider making a timely donation today. Your support right now will help us fight tirelessly for health care access and other crucial rights for DACA recipients and all immigrants.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeHd1VIQvbrJiu_yCLbM7G-x2Hj8NqlRfrkMpGW750OCOUxh-saDsf-GAF0umw21CqOSWsTkDnu8EAc-qijBPxOk1-ijRpcgfRaVUOpNpnEIqUXD0Z4Am747a3XuEYXurMRg4S2StwWcr_bX74LLN1C9z-iH-f0wQEaHMl-0XXHQwOXd7TqpbN6YrdDw-6R54h2O4QNCqHNScxIDVALDzeIAbZBs-MavHL__pmC_BnwkL2tnKrQEDW_HGc_buTmV-9MCzg7RmMIxz51s7d94H4Ns1Ix8_K9aJrmy7OFxWMJVkA65qC7q9RITiv2h1R-ZHdd-LGOmJJSVnrtUC30Nrf9iv3_WkPYf1_H3Ue5GOcpVEXQyo7D45zyjTz7tSpouK8eJg_ubHzIREDhC2to2dH2ScIh2dWSof82fMekbRKGlX0brZ01DU9MXQW-zv9dTHPiUAkujuGtb5c67y6QsMxHv_BZ0W3nuri8moq1sLQ_Ig/4jd/h0afLV35QkyZsakQpH4Ucg/h0/h001.Je4ZyMLcfQBnKFeVjU8Fp-ZW7Z0c3dQgN0rdFxvgn-Y) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeHd1VIQvbrJiu_yCLbM7G-x2Hj8NqlRfrkMpGW750OCOUxh-saDsf-GAF0umw21CqclTOau0TC8C-hGZQz1oKKeOUU54zR_mm-ds7Vd88z5bzZmk7fXLsjZwAE519_UktdoWSEGa8ncbMeOkAjTfoLVuiYEJjcpAlPTzdlc_Sh3gxYLfQc8r0kzIxHCN8JB76XQFf9-7wGRr1pcptubARMRNZIEPj-p4rOlqVb7DdCB0YXrNQfsKurU0lyhMKSyaElE-NAIV2j3RkBURhe0qOLYzQT5c2T4ZtChoNPZf_tKSgMKV6omC5K-etcTDXJLb1huBND7Xc4HvO0PH75qoF6i6CIqXaqykrsDjIPmJ8uIrO3RE3KUpOjvqJq2b8IAazaQ_avmHgz-ILg8ywc6Rf6nJZA_8NyU2zIrTR4Vwx-tX3AurcPgeZjxmWrbSsdjMiBkns1zX-P5nLWGeRZairvmtQHrJ4ipZSeQxdRbN7nK1_52X5rJ9MO7s9M0HV9GeH/4jd/h0afLV35QkyZsakQpH4Ucg/h1/h001.-HMnF9golACcCn8Mucft_HmV0dKof9fx8CX6tAXJZes)

name: Jay Jones
subject: They're panicking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Team, I need you to see what just leaked from the Republican camp. ⬇️
The Republican Attorneys General Association just sent panic letters to their MAGA mega-donors admitting that our opponent, Jason Miyares, is in serious trouble. They're literally begging their billionaire friends to bail him out because they’re scared of an attorney general who will finally hold Trump accountable.

body:
Do you know how many in-person public town halls Ryan Mackenzie has held since taking office? None.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114036304/565734272/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVlMzg5YWYtOWQ4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LXWLUqbd8j-T2bDE9PanZNKyZ4n13JxIQiDJGSaiK5Q=)

| Hi Peter,

Do you know how many in-person public town halls Ryan Mackenzie has held since taking office? None.

Mackenzie’s avoiding the tough conversations because he knows his record doesn’t hold up. Instead of addressing the real struggles we face here in PA-07, he’s been protecting special interests and billionaire donors who don’t have our community’s best interests at heart.

**While Ryan Mackenzie hides in Washington, I’ve been here in PA-07, hearing directly from you.** I’m listening to your concerns about rising grocery prices, the fear of losing healthcare due to Medicaid cuts, and the need for good-paying jobs in our district.

In Congress, I won’t walk away from the hard conversations. That’s why today, I’m asking for your input.

[_**I want to hear from YOU. Please take a moment to fill out my priorities survey. Your responses will help me understand what’s most important to you as we continue this fight for real representation in Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114036305/565734273/1379693329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVlMzg5YWYtOWQ4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LXWLUqbd8j-T2bDE9PanZNKyZ4n13JxIQiDJGSaiK5Q=&emci=5b2a2d93-8382-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2ee389af-9d82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=2418100)

| | | **👋 **Hi there,

This is a longer message, and we hope you’ll read until the end.

| | Here’s what’s at stake:

Donald Trump and House Republicans are pushing their extremist policies and making life harder for Michiganders. They’re attacking our democracy, rolling back reproductive rights, and putting corporate interests over working families.
---
| | Hillary is running for Congress to fight back against these dangerous forces and ensure West Michigan remains a place where effective, common-sense leadership is the priority.

During her time in Congress, she’s stood up for the values that matter to us here — protecting access to healthcare, securing economic justice, and ensuring that our democracy works for the people, not the powerful.

Grassroots support is what powers this campaign and allows us to keep connecting with voters and building a movement that can take on the extremists.

# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=646%2E181023%2EB0S2bT)
Team,
The DeVos family and corporate PACs are pumping as much money into my opponents' campaigns as they want, but _I’ll still never back down and never waver in my fight for the working people of Michigan._
**Because $5 from you means more to me than $5 million from the anti-public education DeVos family or billionaires and corporate PACs.**
What matters the most to me is getting $5 from Gerald in Traverse City, Bella in Troy, Brandon in Coloma, and Cynthia in Marquette — all real grassroots donors who care about protecting our public schools and building an affordable Michigan where everyone can thrive.
The people who chip in a few dollars to support me aren’t just names on a list. They’re actual Michiganders who are standing up and saying: “I believe in this campaign. I believe in making Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.”
**[I’d be honored if you’d stand up and join them. Before our August fundraising deadline, will you join this grassroots team by making a $5 contribution?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/585?c0=jmb-em-q32025.ZUaTEC&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250826_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=646%2E181023%2EB0S2bT)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/581?c0=jmb-em-q32025.ncJ1B1&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250826_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=646%2E181023%2EB0S2bT)

Every dollar from folks like you is a direct challenge to the big money trying to buy this election.
Together, we’re proving that when Michigan comes together, we can win, no matter what the billionaires and bullies might throw at us.
Thank you for stepping up.

subject: Devastating ruling in Maine.
body:

---|---
Hi Peter,

A federal district court in Maine ruled yesterday that the Trump Administration can continue to deny Medicaid funding to Maine Family Planning (MFP), despite the fact that nearly half their patients rely on Medicaid.

[**This ruling means that by the end of October, MFP will be forced to turn away all primary care patients and it threatens the future of other essential services.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114036363/565734859/2141984067?sourceid=1150863&utm_campaign=26emaus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=mfp&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyMzdmNS05ZDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BjQEAYXA2tVHU-LwqN6Av-lPSzviG7ureTvd3JavYu8=&emci=1bc3c5a3-ef81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=090237f5-9d82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) As the state’s largest network of reproductive health care clinics, MFP serves thousands of low-income Mainers—largely in rural areas—providing STI testing, cancer screenings, contraception, and primary care.
> _The Trump Administration and Congress would rather topple a statewide health safety network than let low-income patients receive a cancer screening at a clinic that also offers abortions. This ruling takes a sledgehammer to an already overstretched health care network, and Mainers statewide will feel the effects of defunding Maine Family Planning, regardless of their insurance status._
> –Nancy Northup, President and CEO, Center for Reproductive Rights
We filed _Maine Family Planning v. HHS_ to stop Congress's recent attack—pushed through President Trump's so-called "big beautiful bill"—that punishes providers for also offering abortion care (even though no federal Medicaid funds pay for abortion). [**We are considering all options to ensure that patients on Medicaid in Maine can continue to receive the health care they need and deserve.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114036370/565734868/2141984067?sourceid=1150863&utm_campaign=26emaus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=mfp&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyMzdmNS05ZDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BjQEAYXA2tVHU-LwqN6Av-lPSzviG7ureTvd3JavYu8=&emci=1bc3c5a3-ef81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=090237f5-9d82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) | [**HELP US FIGHT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114036377/565734886/2141984067?sourceid=1150863&utm_campaign=26emaus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=mfp&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyMzdmNS05ZDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BjQEAYXA2tVHU-LwqN6Av-lPSzviG7ureTvd3JavYu8=&emci=1bc3c5a3-ef81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=090237f5-9d82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237 "HELP US FIGHT")
---
Your commitment makes our work possible and keeps us in the fight. Thank you for showing up when it matters most.

In solidarity,

Center for Reproductive Rights
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114036384/565734909/2141984067?sourceid=1150863&utm_campaign=26emaus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=mfp&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyMzdmNS05ZDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BjQEAYXA2tVHU-LwqN6Av-lPSzviG7ureTvd3JavYu8=&emci=1bc3c5a3-ef81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=090237f5-9d82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Urgent: I Stopped The Gazan Visas – But I Need Your Help to Keep Fighting!
body:
The U.S. State Department was caught red-handed rubber-stamping visas for potential terrorists from Gaza. Of course, leftist humanitarian groups did it under the guise of children needing medical assistance, but these children were not alone. They were accompanied by unvetted adults from hostile territory in Gaza that is controlled by Hamas.
| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/A3c1892Et1jaTyW89jEh7jXg)** to be removed.
* * *
---
| [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SW1Xkxj49JWdw2PDnuDXdg/A3c1892Et1jaTyW89jEh7jXg)
[****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SW1Xkxj49JWdw2PDnuDXdg/A3c1892Et1jaTyW89jEh7jXg) Dear Patriot,

An article in _The Hill_ this week ran with the headline, "Laura Loomer flexes influence, racks up wins with Trump."

While it's nice to get recognition, I'm not in this for fame.

**Keeping America safe from Islamic terrorism** has been my main priority since I started my work as an investigative journalist 11 years ago.

It's amazing to see the impact that **my** work can have, [**and I need your support to keep going**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SW1Xkxj49JWdw2PDnuDXdg/A3c1892Et1jaTyW89jEh7jXg).

**The U.S. State Department was caught red-handed rubber-stamping visas for potential terrorists from Gaza.**

Of course, leftist humanitarian groups did it under the guise of children needing medical assistance, **but these children were not alone**. They were accompanied by unvetted adults from **hostile territory in Gaza that is controlled by Hamas.**

And let me remind you about**Hamas. They** are the Islamic terrorist group that was part of the mass murder of 1,139 people, mostly civilians, on October 7th in Israel. **They also took 251 men and women hostage, torturing and raping them. Many of those people who were killed by HAMAS were American citizens. **

And if they get their talons into our communities, **they will do the same thing right here on the streets of America . . . to our women . . . and to our children. **

Our vigilance stops the threat, and it takes [**us working together to make that happen**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SW1Xkxj49JWdw2PDnuDXdg/A3c1892Et1jaTyW89jEh7jXg).

My team and I work around the clock to uncover these hidden dangers. **We expose the truth to protect our country**. But, [**we need funds to pay my researchers and keep the heat on**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SW1Xkxj49JWdw2PDnuDXdg/A3c1892Et1jaTyW89jEh7jXg).

**[**Will you stand with me? Chip in $25, $50, or more today to fuel this fight**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/SW1Xkxj49JWdw2PDnuDXdg/A3c1892Et1jaTyW89jEh7jXg)****.**

Your support means more wins for safety and strength.

Respectfully,
Laura Loomer

body:
Fighting for federal abortion protections
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114037453/565738587/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTU3ZWI4NS05ZTgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9r2au6SwVM8FpSPKtYKnWgENuooGClE7Aa-m_Hl_N5Y=&emci=e7680e73-6d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b557eb85-9e82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Today is Women's Equality Day, an opportunity to celebrate the achievements of women's suffrage fighters and modern-day advocates for gender equality alike.** As we celebrate the many victories this day stands to commemorate, including movements toward pay equality, the advancement of women in underrepresented fields, and acknowledging the achievements of women and girls, we must consider the work still ahead of us, particularly as allies. Right now, there is no shortage of work to be done (and in some cases, _re-done_) to ensure equal protection regardless of gender identity. **And in today's post-****_Roe_****landscape, where basic reproductive rights are constantly under attack, I am reaffirming my commitment to advancing gender equality in Congress.** The Supreme Court's decision to overturn the federal protections for abortion established in _Roe v. Wade_ was nothing short of devastating and disastrous. The landmark decision paved the way for states to implement stricter abortion bans than ever and has even led to attempts to curb birth control access. Here in Washington, I am proud that our governor and state leaders have worked diligently to protect reproductive freedom and provide access to care for out-of-state patients. **But at the federal level, critical protections for the full spectrum of reproductive care, including abortion, remain stalled.** Last session, I joined a majority of my colleagues in the House to pass the Women's Health Protection Act, which would ensure access to abortion regardless of your zip code. The measure was stopped by Republicans in the Senate, and abortion access remains nonexistent or jeopardized for millions nationwide. I will continue the efforts that earned me a 100% voting record on choice and multiple endorsements from Planned Parenthood. This work — and so much more — is far from done. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: what I’ve been doing in OR-06
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
the House may be in recess, but that doesn’t mean there isn’t plenty of work to do here in OR-06.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114038191/565740760/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmMwYjUzNy05ZjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jbfRPu0mHfA7Lo0GultJDkPo51ravUfTmpbwz3cK_-Q=) Hey team, it’s Andrea. Right now, the House is in recess, which means members of Congress are sent home to meet with community members, discuss the impact of government policy, and help constituents navigate federal agencies. **So while I may not be taking votes on the House floor, that doesn’t mean there isn’t plenty of work to do here in Oregon’s 6th district.** **[I want to tell you about what I’ve been working on these past few weeks, but if you’re short on time, please consider making a donation to my campaign and help me keep up the fight for working families. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114038192/565740761/-480163815?refcode=email_082625_recess&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmMwYjUzNy05ZjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jbfRPu0mHfA7Lo0GultJDkPo51ravUfTmpbwz3cK_-Q=)** | | **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114038193/565740762/-480163815?refcode=email_082625_recess&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmMwYjUzNy05ZjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jbfRPu0mHfA7Lo0GultJDkPo51ravUfTmpbwz3cK_-Q=)**
---
On August 14th, I co-hosted a town hall here in OR-06 alongside my friend and colleague Senator Ron Wyden. It was so great to see so many folks from the community and to hear about the challenges that matter most to you, because unlike some politicians, _I’m not afraid to face my own constituents in a town hall meeting._
Now that Donald Trump has signed the Big Ugly Bill into law, I’m also holding roundtables with nonprofits, small business owners, and stakeholders across the district to discuss how the Republican cuts to health care and food assistance will impact our community — and what we can do to mitigate the harm GOP policies are causing families across the district.
Look, while Republicans have made it clear that they’ll prioritize shady corporations and billionaires over working people, I'll keep working to help our families and small businesses succeed, and work towards a future where no Oregon families struggle just to put food on the table.
**I’m committed to supporting the hardworking folks in my district any way I can,_because that’s exactly what the people of OR-06 elected me to do._**** [So if you’re ready to join the fight, please, chip in anything you can to help us take back the House and hold the Trump administration accountable to the American people. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114038194/565740763/-480163815?refcode=email_082625_recess&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmMwYjUzNy05ZjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jbfRPu0mHfA7Lo0GultJDkPo51ravUfTmpbwz3cK_-Q=)**

clean_body: the House may be in recess, but that doesn’t mean there isn’t plenty of work to do here in OR-06. = Hey team, it’s Andrea. Right now, the House is in recess, which means members of Congress are sent home to meet with community members, discuss the impact of government policy, and help constituents navigate federal agencies. So while I may not be taking votes on the House floor, that doesn’t mean there isn’t plenty of work to do here in Oregon’s 6th district. = | | = On August 14th, I co-hosted a town hall here in OR-06 alongside my friend and colleague Senator Ron Wyden. It was so great to see so many folks from the community and to hear about the challenges that matter most to you, because unlike some politicians, I’m not afraid to face my own constituents in a town hall meeting. Now that Donald Trump has signed the Big Ugly Bill into law, I’m also holding roundtables with nonprofits, small business owners, and stakeholders across the district to discuss how the Republican cuts to health care and food assistance will impact our community — and what we can do to mitigate the harm GOP policies are causing families across the district. Look, while Republicans have made it clear that they’ll prioritize shady corporations and billionaires over working people, I'll keep working to help our families and small businesses succeed, and work towards a future where no Oregon families struggle just to put food on the table. I’m committed to supporting the hardworking folks in my district any way I can,because that’s exactly what the people of OR-06 elected me to do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206wlcfn8k4zvetwm9ockugdwtyn5tk4u6rb2agv3aiw52qu4n0o28aumhflvqaeywegh1zjnt8nawwe4fv&__stmp=t1m2bo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1m2bo&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ijq1v1wksykh7m60d8wygmjwpk65uq0lbao7cmvs1nohb84cqvrndpxl7egn6e0ctvuh3zcc7ycj5o3w0s91ve7qvjdeymrl8q7fzhpasf8sj0p9po3s8ef7xmj2cvv1zqygza19t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1m2bo&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1m2bo&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1m2bo&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1m2bo&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ijq1v1wksykh7m60d8wygmjwpk65uq0lbao7cmvs1nohb84cqvrndpxl7egn6e0ctvuh3zcc7ycj5o3w0s91ve7qvjdeymrl8q7fzhpasf8sj0p9po3s8ef7xmj2cvv1zqygza19t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1m2bo&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1m2bo&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

_**Do Latino Trump Voters Regret Their Decision?**_

**Unpacking the Summer 2025 Latino PulseCheck**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 28
| Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid dig into fresh polling from **EquisLab — the “Memo: Summer 2025 Latino PulseCheck”** — and lay out why a sizable slice of **2024 Latino Trump voters are disappointed or regretful** , especially on the economy, mass deportations, rising costs, and cuts to social programs. From concerns about ICE's use of 'indefinite detention' to fears of Medicaid/SNAP cuts in the GOP’s “big, beautiful bill,” Chuck and Mike map out the political danger — and the opportunity — of refocusing on affordability, blue-collar messaging, and localized persuasion.
---
| [Check out Equis Research's 'Memo: Summer 2025 Latino PulseCheck': ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=e3baa4bdda&e=5bd167f239 "Check out Equis Research's 'Memo: Summer 2025 Latino PulseCheck': ")

A recent Reuters poll shows Donald Trump’s approval rating at just 40%, his lowest point so far in this term.

Despite his terrible poll numbers, House Republicans keep backing Trump. name: Team NDRC
subject: 📣MAJOR news out of Utah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This update in the fight for fair maps:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114038959/565743180/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyZjhkNWE4LWEwODItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j2McfGJ4afchE4XlHKrEXHTcIrbjDFnSoMt78oYxOWQ=&emci=ee6faca0-7f82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=62f8d5a8-a082-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

**🚨 A Utah District Court just struck down a gerrymandered map, giving power back to the people 🚨** BREAKING: A Utah District Court JUST announced its decision in _League of Women Voters of Utah v. Utah State Legislature_ — **and it’s a major win for the fair maps movement. ** The court found that the Republican-controlled legislature violated the state constitution by undermining a voter-approved independent redistricting commission and enacting an egregious partisan gerrymander. Utahns made it clear from the beginning: They want to get politics out of the map-drawing process. But these power-hungry elected officials in the Republican-led legislature ignored the will of the people and enacted an egregious partisan gerrymander that carved up the most populous, diverse area of the state. **Peter, this decision affirmed what we already knew to be true: we must hold leaders accountable when they violate the will of the people and try to cement power through partisan gerrymandering. It’s why the NDRC is working day and night to protect fair maps and prepare for upcoming redistricting battles — but we can’t do it alone. ** [**We need the continued support and commitment of folks like you who are dedicated to safeguarding our democracy. As Americans, we expect our elected officials to fairly earn their role of representing us by acting in the best interests of their constituents. Instead, Republicans have resorted to trying to seize unearned power by manipulating maps and silencing voters’ voices.
**This isn’t just happening in Utah. **
In Ohio, Republican lawmakers are preparing to redraw their congressional map under the exact same system that they previously exploited to gerrymander in their favor.
In Texas, the GOP legislature passed a gerrymandered map this past weekend with the goal of adding as many as five Republican seats in Congress next year by targeting Black and Latino communities.
In Missouri, Indiana, and Florida, we are seeing growing threats from Republican leaders to follow Texas’s lead with their own mid-decade redraws.
**While today was a win for our movement and the people of Utah, it is also a staunch reminder that our fight for fair maps across the country is FAR from over. **
[**Peter, let’s keep the momentum going for the fair maps movement. The NDRC is already mobilizing for the fights ahead. # ACTION ALERT: OTC IVERMECTIN BILL ON THE HOUSE FLOOR
|
---
HB 25 by Representative Shofner is up for a floor vote in front of the full Texas House tomorrow, Wednesday August 27! This bill would empower pharmacists to **dispense Ivermectin without a physician’s prescription** , meaning that you would be able to access this effective and safe medication without jumping through unnecessary hoops. **MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD!**
**Call and Email YOUR State Representative**

|

We've already welcomed **740 investors** , which means we're just **260 away.** Will you be one of them?
Here's why now is the perfect time to join:
* **Reader-owned, not establishment-owned.** Rarely do readers have the chance to own a piece of the news they trust. [This is your opportunity](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkUFr4zAQRn-NfEuQZ2zJPuiwu8a3bC7L9ihUa5yoSLKxxwn998UtBAK99fwejxm-l5M9uRBDvvx1iQyPk_Xkw-CYvM10XyMx02JBSQsS6oNsDqDsn37cYuweJhTejERAWJApda0A2raui6vR9atGKQlkW-nK1yMO0jcKGiTQElURzN6VDahSY1vi0VVVpVzZlCVoOWIpKkk-8LQc36aQ-UpjfJ9utByHKRXRXJnnVeAvAb2APuQbrfyNuWPsN052nbZlIIHd43wByqVZ4O8dJ_JhSwK78z2TP5zIB_ckDC7NLlyywK7_6j_jKTNlFtj9D89lpmXv_uvPnW1AQ10sxs_3EGNYlRaVvCQX4udb_IMlbgY-AgAA___eoZiv).
* **Bonus shares for readers.** If you've been a Flyover reader for longer than one month and invest now as we raise our second million, you'll receive **10% bonus shares.**
* **We 've made it affordable.** You don't need to be a venture capitalist or private equity firm to get in early. Shares are just $2 each, with a minimum investment of $750.

We've grown because of you. And together, we're proving that **reader-owned media is the future** --a clear alternative to the legacy news outlets that have lost the trust of millions. We're honored by every single person who has already invested. But to hit 1,000 investors in the next 10 days, **we need you.** [Finish Your Investment Today](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkUFr4zAQRn-NfEuQZ2zJPuiwu8a3bC7L9ihUa5yoSLKxxwn998UtBAK99fwejxm-l5M9uRBDvvx1iQyPk_Xkw-CYvM10XyMx02JBSQsS6oNsDqDsn37cYuweJhTejERAWJApda0A2raui6vR9atGKQlkW-nK1yMO0jcKGiTQElURzN6VDahSY1vi0VVVpVzZlCVoOWIpKkk-8LQc36aQ-UpjfJ9utByHKRXRXJnnVeAvAb2APuQbrfyNuWPsN052nbZlIIHd43wByqVZ4O8dJ_JhSwK78z2TP5zIB_ckDC7NLlyywK7_6j_jKTNlFtj9D89lpmXv_uvPnW1AQ10sxs_3EGNYlRaVvCQX4udb_IMlbgY-AgAA___eoZiv) Thank you for your trust, **Guy Short**

In the meantime, I want to tell you a little about who I am and why I'm running:

I grew up in a trailer in a town of 700, and neither of my parents graduated from high school. Every day, my parents got up and went to work, doing everything they could to put food on the table for our family. But when my dad got sick and his health insurance was canceled, my family lost everything, and we had to choose between household necessities and the care my dad desperately needed.

It’s thanks to hard work, teachers, and public education that I got a fair shot, becoming the first in my family to graduate from college. And it’s public education that drew me to the great state of Iowa, where I moved to provide my daughter with the quality schooling she would need to succeed.

For so many people across the nation, that promise of a better life is fading, and the priorities and values we hold dear are being cast aside in favor of political agendas.

**I'm running for Congress because good people all over Iowa and the country have lost faith in our government. Party bosses in DC have been nothing but a rubber stamp for corporate backers and special interests, doing _nothing_ to help everyday Americans.**

We must take back the House and one of the best ways to do that is to flip Iowa's first district — and I know it's possible. Both _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ and _Cook Political Report_ have already called this race a toss-up and Mariannette Miller-Meeks is quaking in her boots.

**Our 2024 race was the slimmest GOP hold in the country; we lost the race by just 799 votes! With hard work and the support of this grassroots team, I'm ready to close the gap and win in 2026.**

IA-01 needs a leader who will put the people first, and I know I can be that leader, but a win in 2026 won't be possible without your support. **[We're laying the groundwork for our campaign to get off to a strong start. clean_body: I'm running for Congress in the most competitive race in the country | = = Hi, folks, I'm Christina Bohannan. Nikki said I could reach out and introduce myself. I’m a mom, engineer, law professor, and former Iowa state representative, and I'm running for Congress in the most competitive race in the country to unseat Mariannette Miller-Meeks. This race is already a toss-up and a must-win if we want to take the House majority back next year. If you're fired up to help me flip Iowa’s 1st congressional district and the House blue, = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = In the meantime, I want to tell you a little about who I am and why I'm running: I grew up in a trailer in a town of 700, and neither of my parents graduated from high school. Every day, my parents got up and went to work, doing everything they could to put food on the table for our family. But when my dad got sick and his health insurance was canceled, my family lost everything, and we had to choose between household necessities and the care my dad desperately needed. It’s thanks to hard work, teachers, and public education that I got a fair shot, becoming the first in my family to graduate from college. And it’s public education that drew me to the great state of Iowa, where I moved to provide my daughter with the quality schooling she would need to succeed. For so many people across the nation, that promise of a better life is fading, and the priorities and values we hold dear are being cast aside in favor of political agendas. I'm running for Congress because good people all over Iowa and the country have lost faith in our government. Party bosses in DC have been nothing but a rubber stamp for corporate backers and special interests, doing nothing to help everyday Americans. We must take back the House and one of the best ways to do that is to flip Iowa's first district — and I know it's possible. Both Sabato's Crystal Ball and Cook Political Report have already called this race a toss-up and Mariannette Miller-Meeks is quaking in her boots. Our 2024 race was the slimmest GOP hold in the country; we lost the race by just 799 votes! With hard work and the support of this grassroots team, I'm ready to close the gap and win in 2026. IA-01 needs a leader who will put the people first, and I know I can be that leader, but a win in 2026 won't be possible without your support. = = Let's get to work! Christina | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Nikki for Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Americans are getting ripped off at the pharmacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We pay the highest prescription drug prices in the world, even though our tax dollars fund the most cutting-edge research and development that makes these medicines possible.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114040061/565747011/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2M5MjYwMi1hNjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6LrI6FVVQi1fmDRa204umQhMkVy2Vj4ziny8y0qdsto=&emci=bbc92602-a682-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=c7c92602-a682-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Americans are getting ripped off at the pharmacy. We pay the highest prescription drug prices in the world, even though our tax dollars fund the most cutting-edge research and development that makes these medicines possible. On average, Americans are shelling out over $1,400 on prescription drugs every year — the highest per capita drug spending in the world. The pharmaceutical industry is price-gouging us to rake in billions and billions in profits each year. _That is unconscionable._ I've heard it in town halls across the state: Oregonians are being crushed by sky-high prescription drug prices that push their budgets over the limit, forcing them to make hard choices between paying for critical medicines or paying for groceries or rent. **I introduced the End Price Gouging for Medications Act to crack down on Big Pharma's outrageous charges.** The U.S. leads the world in prescription drug research — we should get the best prices on prescription drugs, not be punished with the worst. People want real relief on costs, and that's why my bill has bipartisan support. It would force Big Pharma to charge Americans no more than they charge for prescription drugs in comparable countries and save hardworking Americans millions in health care costs. clean_body: We pay the highest prescription drug prices in the world, even though our tax dollars fund the most cutting-edge research and development that makes these medicines possible. | | | | Americans are getting ripped off at the pharmacy. We pay the highest prescription drug prices in the world, even though our tax dollars fund the most cutting-edge research and development that makes these medicines possible. On average, Americans are shelling out over $1,400 on prescription drugs every year — the highest per capita drug spending in the world. The pharmaceutical industry is price-gouging us to rake in billions and billions in profits each year. That is unconscionable. I've heard it in town halls across the state: Oregonians are being crushed by sky-high prescription drug prices that push their budgets over the limit, forcing them to make hard choices between paying for critical medicines or paying for groceries or rent. I introduced the End Price Gouging for Medications Act to crack down on Big Pharma's outrageous charges. The U.S. leads the world in prescription drug research — we should get the best prices on prescription drugs, not be punished with the worst. People want real relief on costs, and that's why my bill has bipartisan support. It would force Big Pharma to charge Americans no more than they charge for prescription drugs in comparable countries and save hardworking Americans millions in health care costs. Onward! _This piece is co-written with two nationally-recognized public health experts, Pari & Eve, co-creators of [Repro Ready.](https://substack.com/@womeninamerica) Subscribe to their newsletter to advance science-based health policy._
* * *
Across the country, Americans have been watching the news with horror these last few weeks during Trump's invasion of the nation's capital, Washington D.C. The common, nonstop refrain from onlookers has been: why isn't anyone in D.C. pushing back? Why, in the capital of 'the free world,' are people standing by while D.C.'s streets are militarized? WHY ISN'T SOMEONE DOING SOMETHING?
Part of the answer is simple: because it's terrifying here.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2bf16fcb-60fd-4c6d-95a8-c40bc529602e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0Gc261IUgHYEQEaF2mfX4H6d34A9Oy7Gv0QIEDOZTck?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171984156)
Residents are watching in real time as their [Uber Eats drivers](https://substack.com/redirect/ba3fd14d-be8d-446b-b839-0a5469d10378?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are torn off their mopeds, tasered and slammed to the pavement while trying to deliver orders. Neighbors are hauled off for [smoking weed ](https://substack.com/redirect/d025e75d-5900-4b47-9f47-da696d29149d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)on their own stoops--de-criminalized under city law, though laws don't seem to matter anymore. DHS officials are prowling the Metro during rush hour, stopping commuters at random as if this were East Berlin in 1961.
And now, under Pete Hegseth's order, the National Guard openly patrols D.C. [with loaded weapons](https://substack.com/redirect/17cb6bb1-2974-40ce-9962-d2efc223f2bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), their boots echoing off streets that once staged marches for peace and justice.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0Gc261IUgHYEQEaF2mfX4H6d34A9Oy7Gv0QIEDOZTck?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171984156)
It's not as if this city hasn't faced moments like this before.
In 1968, after Martin Luther King Jr. was assassinated, D.C. burned; federal troops occupied neighborhoods where the grief was hottest, telling residents their cries for dignity [were threats to order.](https://substack.com/redirect/52ca972d-43b2-4b0f-bc63-187324bb6cc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And in 2020, peaceful demonstrators [were gassed and beaten](https://substack.com/redirect/39c2e5ba-87e4-4450-9341-a58c373089a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Lafayette Square so that Trump could wave a Bible upside down for the cameras.
D.C. has always been both symbol and stage, a place where suppressing opposition movements is often disguised by law enforcement as "restoring the peace."
So when people ask why Mayor Muriel Bowser and the council aren't shoulder-to-shoulder with their constituents in fighting this takeover, the answer is this: look at history. Local officials have too often bent with the federal wind. And when those closest to power cower, ordinary people feel unprotected, too exposed to risk stepping forward themselves. Exhaustion does the rest.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0Gc261IUgHYEQEaF2mfX4H6d34A9Oy7Gv0QIEDOZTck?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171984156)
In a functioning democracy, parents and caretakers, the chronically ill, and the overworked could still gather in protest knowing the risk would not be ruin. That freedom has been stripped away. Trump counts on the fact that threats of arrest, injury, and/or deportation are enough to keep people quiet and his strategy reflects that. He escalates to spread fear and then uses that fear as pretext for a deeper grip.
The stories mount. A man arrested for the simple act of filming police despite the Constitution's plain promise that this is legal. A trans woman [ripped from her car](https://substack.com/redirect/82df7bea-4740-4707-b047-c35bfd7da05f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at a checkpoint, disappeared into a Virginia holding cell, her asylum status now dangling by a thread. These both happened in the DMV last weekend and these both are the signals and rehearsals of a slow normalization into the unacceptable.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0Gc261IUgHYEQEaF2mfX4H6d34A9Oy7Gv0QIEDOZTck?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171984156)
And if there's one lesson history teaches, it's this: _**what happens in D.C. never stays in D.C.**_
Just as the Reichstag fire gave cover for Hitler to roll his tactics out across Germany, just as Franco tested his brutality on Madrid before consolidating Spain, this occupation is a pilot program. Trump has already said he will extend it to 19 more states.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0Gc261IUgHYEQEaF2mfX4H6d34A9Oy7Gv0QIEDOZTck?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171984156)
### **What you can do right now**
Washington D.C., for all its marble and monuments, is just another city. But cities are where fascism takes root--and where it can be defeated. Paris fell, and Paris was liberated. Warsaw was choked by Nazis, and Warsaw rose. If you are outside D.C., you have the advantage our neighbors here no longer do: _**you know what 's coming. You can prepare.**_ Here's how:
1. Start asking your local and state leaders now how they plan to protect your rights if federal forces show up. [You can find your representatives here.](https://substack.com/redirect/4d2826b1-aaba-4d99-a5df-cb2bc2f9a863?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
2. Find out what local organizers are preparing, and how your community plans to mobilize safely. A good place to start is your [local ACLU ](https://substack.com/redirect/65d5558f-fa5a-4d6c-9334-6548143cdbfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)or [mutual aid chapter](https://substack.com/redirect/6303cc31-f149-4978-941f-fbb2dbe0ea53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
3. Keep an eye out for local resources. Mutual aid organizations, especially those [focused on immigration](https://substack.com/redirect/ff32017f-564a-414e-b120-f440fb584396?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), will set up notification hotlines so that community members can call in check points or highly monitored areas that people should avoid.
4. Build networks of support so people don't feel alone when intimidation tactics begin. Are you part of a book club? A church? A running club? The PTA? Deepen your relationships in these existing communities so that you have local folks to lift you up (or bail you out!) when needed. Start a secured, encrypted group chat or call list for emergencies.
5. Consider your risk tolerance. Local volunteer needs will range from pro bono legal support to[ tracking ICE check points](https://substack.com/redirect/f954ed3e-9351-461f-90b4-b8bb3c27874f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and literally showing up ahead of the checkpoints with signs warning folks to turnaround. Think about where your skills are best placed to help and what level of risk you're willing to take on in you support so that you're ready when the time calls for it.

The militarized takeover of Washington D.C. caught the city by surprise. Don't wait until it's too late to prepare for when it arrives at your doorstep. History is speaking whether we choose to listen is up to us.

Rebekah studied earth science with a dual major in journalism at Syracuse University for her undergraduate degree, as well as her Master of Science degree at Louisiana State University, and her doctoral studies at Florida State University. Rebekah's work tracking COVID-19 in Florida earned international praise, and her advocacy for data access and transparency won her Forbes' Technology Person of the Year and a nomination for Nature's John Maddox Prize. Rebekah now heads [Mesoscale News](https://substack.com/redirect/950dfc75-f95a-4870-a960-f7d4b7e7d473?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), an independent science newsletter covering international crises, climate change, natural disasters, politics, and whistleblowing. The common, nonstop refrain from onlookers has been: why isn't anyone in D.C. pushing back? Why, in the capital of 'the free world,' are people standing by while D.C.'s streets are militarized? WHY ISN'T SOMEONE DOING SOMETHING? Part of the answer is simple: because it's terrifying here. | | ---|---|--- Residents are watching in real time as their are torn off their mopeds, tasered and slammed to the pavement while trying to deliver orders. DHS officials are prowling the Metro during rush hour, stopping commuters at random as if this were East Berlin in 1961. And now, under Pete Hegseth's order, the National Guard openly patrols D.C. , their boots echoing off streets that once staged marches for peace and justice. It's not as if this city hasn't faced moments like this before. In 1968, after Martin Luther King Jr. was assassinated, D.C. burned; federal troops occupied neighborhoods where the grief was hottest, telling residents their cries for dignity And in 2020, peaceful demonstrators in Lafayette Square so that Trump could wave a Bible upside down for the cameras. So when people ask why Mayor Muriel Bowser and the council aren't shoulder-to-shoulder with their constituents in fighting this takeover, the answer is this: look at history. Local officials have too often bent with the federal wind. And when those closest to power cower, ordinary people feel unprotected, too exposed to risk stepping forward themselves. Exhaustion does the rest. In a functioning democracy, parents and caretakers, the chronically ill, and the overworked could still gather in protest knowing the risk would not be ruin. | Peter, I want to share something deeply personal with you. Since I launched my Democratic campaign to replace GOP Senator Susan Collins, I’ve received such heartwarming support from so many of you. I am incredibly grateful. But to be honest, Peter, it hasn’t all been positive. Some are telling me I don’t deserve to run for office. Or serve in the Senate. Or even be a father – because I’m gay. [Please read this very closely, Peter: These hateful attacks never stopped me before, and you better believe they won't stop me from fighting for every type of family in the Senate now. Our latest poll shows me within ONE SINGLE point of flipping this critical Senate seat for Democrats – but a massive Super PAC just rushed Susan Collins an unprecedented $5.6 MILLION to take me down. I’m urgently asking 1,000 supporters to split a $3 donation between me and Blue Amp Action in the next 4 hours to help me rescue our shot to bring this win home and ensure every type of family has the representation they deserve in the Senate >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a9cf943-3e6f-44dc-8ca7-c4bb472d7b35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T151f3927-1dcd-4582-b5de-45430e1488c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
_Jake, Jordan, and Ella_ I was in second grade when Susan Collins was first elected to the Senate. Now, 30 years later, my husband and I just became new dads to our baby girl, Ella – and Susan Collins is still in the Senate. I never planned to run for office myself — but after watching Collins make things *worse* for our families by voting for Trump’s dangerous cabinet, Supreme Court nominees, and even his ACQUITTAL — I looked at my daughter and made the pressing choice to fight for her future. Peter, no matter how many hateful attacks are thrown at me, I need you to know that nothing will deter me from fighting on your behalf in the Senate. [But the harsh reality is – unless I can compete with Susan Collins’ earth-shattering sum of cash, our chance to make history and gain a critical Senate seat for Democrats will be over. So I’m humbly asking 1,000 supporters to split a $3 donation between me and Blue Amp Action in the next 4 hours to close the fundraising gap and show the haters what we’re made of. Can I count on you to help me FLIP this Senate seat blue and hand Collins and her MAGA financiers the humiliating defeat they so desperately deserve? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf71cd65d-5e59-4d95-9989-c69774e8ffd3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: We cannot be a country of drive-by shootings.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team, this is disturbing:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250826-1-b&t=1&akid=10819%2E3935704%2E45MS55)
According to new reports, a man who lost his local election hired four people to shoot at the homes of Democratic elected officials. The men fired multiple bullets while children were at home before being detained.
**As a victim of political violence, I know the horror of a targeted shooting all too well. This is unacceptable.**
An attack against lawmakers is an attack on the foundation of our democracy. This is a problem for Democratic and Republican lawmakers alike, and it’s only getting worse.
We can’t let people use guns in attempts to silence those with whom they disagree. The violent rhetoric that is often fueled by the gun lobby needs to stop.
[**Our work to end gun violence is far from over. We must work together to build a safer future, free from gun violence. Please contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250826-1-b&t=2&akid=10819%2E3935704%2E45MS55)

Thank you,
Gabby Giffords

**Folks, please take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Trump can’t be allowed to run the Federal Reserve
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Congress is the only thing that can stop Trump. So far, Republicans seem all too happy to light our democracy and our economy on fire because they’re scared of Trump. But if this keeps up, it’s going to make the Great Recession look like a walk in the park.
#

So, Trump’s trying to fire a governor of the Federal Reserve.
The Federal Reserve is America’s central bank. The president appoints the chair, the vice chair, and the seven member board of governors, the Senate confirms them, and then the Fed decides what to do based on economic data — not politics, not MAGA, not what Trump wants.
But Trump wants to pack the Fed with sycophants, so he’s breaking the law. Says he’s firing a governor when he hasn’t proven she’s done anything illegal, hasn’t even charged her with a crime.
Trump’s doing this because he wants personal control over every single thing that happens in this country. This felon who’s gone bankrupt multiple times wants the government taking direct ownership of businesses. He wants to control US monetary policy. He wants to raise and lower tariffs however he wants.
Just so we’re clear — that is legit socialism. I’m a Democrat, the GOP have been baselessly calling us socialists and communists and marxists for decades. This, right here, is what they accuse us of.
So, why would any business, any nation, want to invest in the United States if our financial system is under siege by this political menace?
The short answer is, they don’t. The dollar’s value has tanked this year, and treasury bonds are selling off like crazy. Countries are beginning to stop shipping their goods to us. American businesses are going to start closing. Your 401ks, your groceries, your jobs, your homes, your kids' future — all that is on the line. We’ll all suffer because of Trump, and he’ll just keep getting richer.
Congress is the only thing that can stop him. So far, Republicans in Congress seem all too happy to light our democracy and our economy on fire because they’re scared of Trump. That has to stop.
We have to step up, here and now. I’m screaming at my colleagues to wake the hell up before this gets any worse, but we’ve got to make a lot more noise before they’re going to listen.
[**Can you sign this petition and demand that Congress stop Trump before he absolutely wrecks our economy? I need you speaking out if we’re going to stop this. Please.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250826_econ/?source=em250826-1-30&akid=3944%2E734936%2EYQqJcQ)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250826_econ/?source=em250826-1-30&akid=3944%2E734936%2EYQqJcQ)
Thanks,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=3944%2E734936%2EYQqJcQ). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3944%2E734936%2EYQqJcQ). body:

---
Fellow Patriot, _**An activist judge just issued a ruling that could shut Alligator Alcatraz down in 60 days.**_ _We’re not surprised. The Left HATED Alligator Alcatraz. And this attack shows that they’re running scared. _
---
[ **LET’S KEEP THE LEFT RUNNING** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=142e0f1d355f4b178528aa93399b801b&_e=SvsjwZ8645vUry6G5YzCSqa1f8umjBVV6B_Uvd8W1o0O7VpAepLvpA7NG6194cbwFoLEXvF-kfCegvZ9BYGwP09tqATUeS6rk4_rkCGZpM0t5CpkY2DfPyglfFnN2LblJK3geZD2HMj3QQTasDZESg9E_xyh1UsPdQxDxbRlok0UNicid82MYGw9VXqiDDjv57ZRXuSWbrILMyn7YV2s3aXCRGzVSc7ZsQZ7vsP-rcSFWQsNZ3db009xYqNKfu-oNb9JOmIFuQ8_GePT1NhgLhenjK_Zh_37kQR22mYZvHfKGDVQ-rrQAu0xQQO7t5YxRYu_CcsJE2rBPiw5hSfb9zhdP2PdzExdfLZsXm7mtUjXLGrVpW1DC_jZOLv3fLIZ28prxdXlo9hrD6xw5kKzubrG5uDQyUGQ-YxO9AmDaZ7yzxLzBRGJgUHQf08LCUKPVmx5UVIY4242JcC0IiKasee_cQgxxBfuruN2rNt93uRvL3LszzuCPeAJa7Y_cYdg1J7J5TUC-Du5F4ze5SSWT7u8D3K_GOJMecYXbvHLxIqnJQp8gf22SYMXoPnPf7600mUihP647oDkrdtAkxiVxwxz7zQ-xhL9UFGVBDRicFnYbKn4itcqIA48SsjBGJR2DAPQJZYglFqP300Z8Q8zzdUmbSJf7zY_55FGgEqdq_g%3D)
---
**To be clear: Operations at Alligator Alcatraz are ongoing and Governor DeSantis is NOT backing down. ** In fact, he’s fighting harder than ever before. He’s not just fighting the Left in court.
