name: Voter Action Project
subject: More voter suppression bills in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NC Newsline: NC House bill would allow elections board workers to be replaced with political hires [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082625_1&amount=25]
Get this, Team: Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina have introduced a sweeping elections bill that, among other steps, would bar election officials from encouraging or promoting voter turnout. This is just the latest and starkest example of a trend among the vote suppressors of opposing even nonpartisan outreach efforts that could boost voting rates.
This bill would also take more than a third of existing nonpartisan staff positions at the state elections office and convert them to jobs for partisan political appointees deeply invested in the results of the elections they would be in charge of. Finally, the measure would add new voting restrictions for military and overseas voters, and ban ranked choice voting.
The bill and proposed ban on promoting turnout “ raises real questions about what democracy means in North Carolina, who really holds the power, who government is answering to ” according to Andrew Garber, a counsel in the nonpartisan Brennan Center’s Voting Rights and Elections Program.
Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are more focused on expanding and cementing their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. It's just another example of what they'll export around the country if they get away with it here.
This troubling bill has the potential to impact us all, no matter what state we live in. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to help us stop voter suppression in North Carolina and across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082625_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082625_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082625_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082625_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082625_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082625_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082625_1&amount=35]
Wondering how this impacts you? It's as simple as this: Rep. Allison Dahle, a top defender of voting rights on North Carolina’s House Elections committee, said, “ I think North Carolina has become a testing ground. It’s become a place where they say, ‘let’s see if it works.’ ”
For decades, the voter suppression movement has taken bills that pass in one state and exported them across the country. The leaders at a sprawling, dark money conservative think-tank have taken credit for it, caught on camera bragging about writing the legislation at their headquarters. For example -- the sweeping suppression bill passed in Georgia in March of 2021 was adapted and passed in states like Texas, Florida, and beyond in the months afterward.
It's all just the latest extreme anti-democracy tactic pioneered by North Carolina vote suppressors over the last decade or so. In 2016, a court found that the state’s voter suppression law targeted Black voters with “surgical precision.” They drew multiple gerrymandered maps, and stripped the new governor of several election-related powers before he took office. After the 2024 election, they waged a months-long campaign, ultimately unsuccessful, to overturn a Supreme Court race by having over 65,000 valid votes thrown out after the vote-counting, and two recounts, had been completed. It's not going to end until we stop them.
We have to fight back every time they try to chip away at our fundamental right to vote. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to stop this bill and suppression bills like it nationwide? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082625_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082625_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082625_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. Peter,

I know the news is nonstop. Every day it feels like another attack, another threat, another piece of our democracy under siege. I understand that political emails are probably the last thing you want to read.

[_**But I want to be honest about why we send these emails and why your support matters more than ever.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114041824/565753525/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1NWQyYzg0LWFiODItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ngudoqOJ5VcVGAb6PJ6dK6wXQ1EzSHfVb9KSfhJrDwI=)
| [SUPPORT EMERGE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114041825/565753526/895464311?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1NWQyYzg0LWFiODItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ngudoqOJ5VcVGAb6PJ6dK6wXQ1EzSHfVb9KSfhJrDwI=)

Right now, Republican-controlled legislatures and a Trump White House are pushing policies that endanger our rights, our public schools, and our communities. They are gerrymandering districts, slashing funding for essential services, and making it harder for everyday people to have their voices heard.

Winning isn’t just about stopping the next attack. It’s about training and empowering the next generation of Democratic women who will stand up, run for office, and fight back at every level, from school boards to Congress. That’s what Emerge does best. That’s what your support makes possible.

Our alums are on the front lines every day, shining a light on corruption, defending the vulnerable, and showing up when others run from the fight. Without grassroots donors like you, we won’t have the resources to recruit, train, and support more women like them.

[_**If you’re able to chip in today, it would mean so much. clean_body: We wanted to make sure you saw A’shanti’s message about why emails like this are so important. | | | = | = = Peter, I know the news is nonstop. Every day it feels like another attack, another threat, another piece of our democracy under siege. I understand that political emails are probably the last thing you want to read. = | = Right now, Republican-controlled legislatures and a Trump White House are pushing policies that endanger our rights, our public schools, and our communities. They are gerrymandering districts, slashing funding for essential services, and making it harder for everyday people to have their voices heard. Winning isn’t just about stopping the next attack. It’s about training and empowering the next generation of Democratic women who will stand up, run for office, and fight back at every level, from school boards to Congress. That’s what Emerge does best. That’s what your support makes possible. Our alums are on the front lines every day, shining a light on corruption, defending the vulnerable, and showing up when others run from the fight. Without grassroots donors like you, we won’t have the resources to recruit, train, and support more women like them. = | = | = | = | = | = We can’t do this without you. In solidarity, A’shanti F. Gholar President & CEO, Emerge = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is how you win a swing state:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friends — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years_. It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we’ve made. **I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.** As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I’ll never stop listening to what the people need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state. And I know that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. [**I’m asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton because right now is when we can build the momentum to win. Chip in $20 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114041866/565753627/-1005672175?refcode=250826_MFC_Cooper_ThisIsHowYouWin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzU5ZmEzYy1hYjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mgE3D0imeRMF-huYqUZ-qQ_tynypsOrIUfAu42R3n3U=) | | [**$18 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114041867/565753628/426922545?amount=18&refcode=250826_MFC_Cooper_ThisIsHowYouWin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzU5ZmEzYy1hYjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mgE3D0imeRMF-huYqUZ-qQ_tynypsOrIUfAu42R3n3U= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

name: Heidi Hall
subject: What I learned as a woman in politics
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250826_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250826_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Friend,
Today is Women's Equality Day, and while this occasion is meant to commemorate the granting of the right to vote to women in the US, it also serves as an important reminder that the long and difficult fight for equality, frankly, isn't over—even in politics.
Solutions proposed by women are more likely to be overlooked, our attitude is more likely to be scrutinized, and our campaigns are often more reliant on small-dollar donors.
Since historically, female candidates have less opportunities to raise funds for their campaigns, every grassroots dollar that we receive makes your support that much more important.
And because we're up against someone like Rep. Kevin Kiley, an entrenched D.C. politician with connections to people with deep pockets, we need your help to even the playing field.
Friend, our End of Month Fundraising Deadline is coming up fast, and I need your help to reach our goal. Will you contribute $5 or any amount that is meaningful to you to raise the remaining $14,309 we need online? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250826_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250826_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
In solidarity,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250826_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250826_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945

clean_body: [] Friend, Today is Women's Equality Day, and while this occasion is meant to commemorate the granting of the right to vote to women in the US, it also serves as an important reminder that the long and difficult fight for equality, frankly, isn't over—even in politics. Solutions proposed by women are more likely to be overlooked, our attitude is more likely to be scrutinized, and our campaigns are often more reliant on small-dollar donors. Since historically, female candidates have less opportunities to raise funds for their campaigns, every grassroots dollar that we receive makes your support that much more important. And because we're up against someone like Rep. Kevin Kiley, an entrenched D.C. politician with connections to people with deep pockets, we need your help to even the playing field. Friend, our End of Month Fundraising Deadline is coming up fast, and I need your help to reach our goal. Will you contribute $5 or any amount that is meaningful to you to raise the remaining $14,309 we need online? [] DONATE TODAY [] In solidarity, Heidi Hall Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom. [] Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice. After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable. Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 SUPPORT HEIDI [] PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
Arizonans need bold action now. |
---
Peter, the temperature in Phoenix got up to 111 degrees last week. **This isn’t just another hot summer.** For seniors, outdoor workers, low-income families, and people experiencing homelessness, extreme heat is life-threatening — and it’s only getting worse as a result of the climate crisis. Washington has failed to act. Republicans continue to ignore science and data, leaving communities on the frontlines of climate change exposed and vulnerable. **That’s why Yassamin introduced three bold bills to fight back:** funding community heat mitigation projects, coordinating federal agencies through the National Integrated Heat Health Information System (NIHHIS), and commissioning a national study on the economic impacts of extreme heat. **[Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us fight for Arizonans and push Congress to finally take climate change seriously?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114042202/565754775/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250826_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGFmMDM0NC1hZDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKa5c68A0dQNG4XsAS93NxLY9Is64arta043YPBK2SI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114042203/565754776/1302243248?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250826_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGFmMDM0NC1hZDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKa5c68A0dQNG4XsAS93NxLY9Is64arta043YPBK2SI=)

body:
Leftists just tried to threaten and intimidate me into silence...
| __**An Emergency Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik**__
---
Peter,
---
Democrats are desperate to stop our growing momentum as we close the gap on Kathy Hochul.
---
**So, just weeks after they sent AOC to my district to attack me, the Left sent radical Far Left Democrat agitators from a Soros-funded dark money group to SWARM a _non-political_ _memorial_ event I was attending. **
---
These professional agitators classlessly disrupted the memorial event by attempting to drown me out with screams and threatening chants.
---
Their goal? __To intimidate me into silence by sending a blunt message,,,__
---
**_“Back down, or else...”_**
---
President Trump wrote the playbook on how to respond to these kinds of threats.

As these Leftist lunatics screamed at me, I thought back to the powerful image he posted after being wrongfully arrested on politically-motivated charges...

I can promise you, Peter, these radicals will _NEVER_ stop me from fulfilling my mission to pass President Trump’s America First agenda, to FIRE Hochul, and to SAVE New York.

**Let’s show them that the millions of America First patriots who make up our movement SAVE New York will also _NEVER_ _SURRENDER_ with our largest grassroots fundraising surge of the entire year! **

clean_body: Leftists just tried to threaten and intimidate me into silence... | An Emergency Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik Peter, Democrats are desperate to stop our growing momentum as we close the gap on Kathy Hochul. So, just weeks after they sent AOC to my district to attack me, the Left sent radical Far Left Democrat agitators from a Soros-funded dark money group to SWARM a non-political memorial event I was attending. These professional agitators classlessly disrupted the memorial event by attempting to drown me out with screams and threatening chants. Their goal? To intimidate me into silence by sending a blunt message,,, “Back down, or else...” President Trump wrote the playbook on how to respond to these kinds of threats. As these Leftist lunatics screamed at me, I thought back to the powerful image he posted after being wrongfully arrested on politically-motivated charges... If we’re going to save New York, we must follow President Trump’s example and NEVER SURRENDER to the Democrats’ attacks, threats, and intimidation tactics. So, I walked right back out on that stage and finished delivering my remarks despite the Leftists’ hysterical screaming and chanting. I REFUSE to be intimidated into silence! I can promise you, Peter, these radicals will NEVER stop me from fulfilling my mission to pass President Trump’s America First agenda, to FIRE Hochul, and to SAVE New York. Now, I need your help responding to their message of intimidation with a message of our own... Let’s show them that the millions of America First patriots who make up our movement SAVE New York will also NEVER SURRENDER with our largest grassroots fundraising surge of the entire year! With your help, we can ensure the Left’s paid agitators and threatening intimidation tactics BACKFIRE, just like their LAWFARE against President Trump... ...and get even closer to TAKING THE LEAD over Hochul in New York! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze- I’m a **retired Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran.** I’m running for Al Franken’s former Senate seat in Minnesota, in what is shaping up to be the most competitive Senate race in Minnesota since 2009.

I carried our flag on the battlefield for more than 20 years in over 70 countries. While serving our nation and carrying Old Glory, **I learned a few things, and I want to share a few with you today.**

[**READ MY MESSAGE BEFORE IT DELETES

Adam Schwarze

name: Deb Haaland
subject: It’s my favorite time of the year in New Mexico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I have a deep love of cooking traditional recipes using New Mexico green chile.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4038%2E400544%2ErBXDyL)
It’s my favorite time of the year in New Mexico — green chile season!
**I have a deep love of cooking traditional recipes using New Mexico green chile.**
Back when I was in Law School at UNM, I’d prepare huge pots of green chile stew to bring to student gatherings.
I made that same green chile recipe for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season.
I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
To me, New Mexico green chile tastes like home — and one of my favorite ways to cook with it during the summer months is to make a refreshing green chile salsa!
**That’s why, to celebrate green chile season, I want to share my green chile salsa recipe with you.**
**[Donate any amount to this email today, and I’ll send you my official recipe to make your own green chile salsa at home. Every dollar will help us reach our big end-of-month goal and grow our people-powered campaign for governor.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250826_1_salsa?refcode=em20250826-4038&refcode2=4038_400544_rBXDyL&akid=4038%2E400544%2ErBXDyL)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250826_1_salsa?amount=5&refcode=em20250826-4038&refcode2=4038_400544_rBXDyL&akid=4038%2E400544%2ErBXDyL)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250826-1&t=2&refcode2=4038_400544_rBXDyL&akid=4038%2E400544%2ErBXDyL)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4038%2E400544%2ErBXDyL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4038%2E400544%2ErBXDyL)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

name: Dinesh D'Souza
subject: Please let me explain
body:
This email could change someone's life
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e20928512/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZ3F4TmMzSHZyaA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjY/LbmNsdlI0U2VqNA/qP2hpZHM9bmNrTkJTdm42QzE3NWxscw/gaK4Jeg/s3l8f02bf1f)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Patriot,

I promise I won’t take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate Now](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
**Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _“crime”_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they’ve been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Patriot, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**
[Donate $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Thank you,

Dinesh D'Souza

P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face...
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Difficulties in finding a job
* Homelessness
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm
* Mental health challenges that their families can never understand

All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment.

But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. [Donate Now](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e20928512/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjY/LbmNsdlI0U2VqNA/qP2hpZHM9bmNrTkJTdm42QzE3NWxscw/gaK4Jeg/s9s054a8398)

name: Team Downing
subject: We're waiting on you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
The Left won’t like your answer...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Trump Poised to Remove Noncitizens from Census🚨**BREAKING NEWS:** President Trump is again leading the charge to protect the integrity of our democracy – **this time by ensuring that only U.S. citizens are counted in the official U.S. Census.**
Peter, for far too long, blue states have inflated their political power by counting illegal immigrants in their census totals, gaining extra congressional seats and electoral votes as a result.
_That ends now._
This bold move strikes at the heart of the Democrats’ scheme to manipulate our system and tip the scales in their favor.
This is about restoring fairness, upholding the rule of law, and ensuring that American citizens, **not illegal aliens** , determine our political future.
But make no mistake: the Left is desperate to block this effort, because without inflated census numbers, they’ll lose their power. That’s why we need every Patriot to step up now. **
****[Sign our Official Petition to Remove Illegal Aliens from the U.S. Census:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._UctCQ)**[ SIGN THE PETITION
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Don’t let them rig the system any longer. Demand a fair, lawful count now.**_Stand with President Trump and defend the integrity of our elections and the U.S. Census._**
Thank you, Peter,
Conservative News Alerts (via Team Downing)| |

name: Suki Vasquez
subject: This dog wants change (and belly rubs)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:

Friend, On our Voices of New Mexico Tour, we talked to folks from across our state. And every single one shared their experiences about how their families and communities are being hurt by Trump’s awful policies. That includes Connie, an OBGYN who works at a rural hospital. She is worried about what Trump’s policies will mean for hospitals like hers and everyone who relies on them. Her words are powerful. **Hear directly from her:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114044598/565762747/945790658?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250826_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODc1OWUyYy1iMzgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1aQMONnqvS9rqit1x6DiMCuxvSzbnHgJumiaKZ8uk4=) Connie’s message isn’t about politics — it’s about people and communities, and the real, everyday impacts of what Trump and Republicans are doing. This is what we’re hearing from folks around the state and country. We need to keep lifting up these stories and holding Trump and Republicans accountable. clean_body: Friend, On our Voices of New Mexico Tour, we talked to folks from across our state. And every single one shared their experiences about how their families and communities are being hurt by Trump’s awful policies. That includes Connie, an OBGYN who works at a rural hospital. She is worried about what Trump’s policies will mean for hospitals like hers and everyone who relies on them. Her words are powerful. Hear directly from her: = Connie’s message isn’t about politics — it’s about people and communities, and the real, everyday impacts of what Trump and Republicans are doing. This is what we’re hearing from folks around the state and country. We need to keep lifting up these stories and holding Trump and Republicans accountable. And we need to take back the Senate to undo Trump’s damage. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being on the team, Heinrich HQ | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: We will stop Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

California lawmakers took action to respond to Trump’s power grab and level the playing field.

In November, California voters will have the power to **stop Donald Trump’s efforts to rig the map in his favor** — all to escape accountability for his reckless and corrupt behavior.

The fight ahead is bigger than any one politician. It’s about the future of our democracy and the country we leave to our children and grandchildren.

That’s why I strongly support this effort, even though the new congressional map will make my district more competitive.

But I need your help to show we’re ready to win no matter what Republicans throw our way.

name: Autism Health
subject: Less Than 2 Weeks Left to Register for the Autism Walk!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **2025 Autism Health Walk: Every Step For Autism, Every Mile A Miracle!**
---
| [ ](http://)
---
| Less Than 2 Weeks Left to Register for the Autism Walk! Join us for a day of **movement, music, and miracles** as we come together to support families impacted by autism! Whether you're walking **in person** at Huntington Beach Central Park or **virtually** from your own community, your steps matter. Walk as an individual, create a team, join an existing team, or just simply sponsor a walker. Rally your friends and family to support the cause from anywhere in the world! [Click HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=8428d99bb0&e=3a42edfdc4) to Register!
---
| |
---
**Date:** Saturday, September 6, 2025

**Location:** Huntington Beach Central Park West, 18381 Goldenwest St, Huntington Beach, CA 92648
[_(See our website for parking and map)_](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6e39aef47e&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=d383618d5a&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")
---
|
---
|
---
| We’re excited to announce that **tickets are officially on sale** for the **Autism Health Summit 2026** – happening **April 24–25, 2026** at the beautiful **Legacy Resort & Spa in San Diego, CA**! **Early Bird Special – Save 10%**
Register now and receive **10% off** your ticket with promo code **EarlyBird10**. This limited-time offer is valid through **Nov 1st only** , so don’t wait! You can also apply through your California Regional Center for approval. **Event Dates:**
* **Friday & Saturday, April 24–25** – Full conference with expert speakers, panels, and networking
* **Sunday, April 26** – **Optional Vendor Day** : An extra opportunity to connect with exhibitors and explore products, services, and resources that support the autism community

This one-of-a-kind, parent-driven event brings together top doctors, therapists, researchers, and educators to share the latest in integrative health, biomedical treatments, therapies, nutrition, and more. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or healthcare professional, the Autism Health Summit is designed to inform, inspire, and empower. Don’t miss out on a transformative weekend of learning, connection, and hope. Sponsorships are available [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=d1dfdaa93f&e=3a42edfdc4). **Reserve your spot today and save 10%** at: [www.ahsconference.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=df5cd2bf08&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [BUY TICKETS](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=47f4e9a2b2&e=3a42edfdc4 "BUY TICKETS")
---
|
---
| **Warrior Mom is Now on Audible!**
---
|
---
| We are thrilled to share some exciting news— _Warrior Mom: A Mother’s Journey in Healing Her Son with Autism_ is now available on **Audible through Amazon**! Whether you’re driving, walking, or simply prefer to listen, you can now experience this inspiring story in a whole new way. This audiobook is a heartfelt journey of hope, resilience, and determination—created to inspire families and advocates everywhere who are seeking answers and strength on their journey with autism. If you’ve ever wanted to dive into the Warrior Mom story but haven’t had the time to sit and read the book, this is the perfect way to join. You will be encouraged, inspired, and reminded that no challenge is too great when fueled by love and perseverance. For more information and to grab your copy today, visit **[www.WarriorMom.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=fcafae2598&e=3a42edfdc4)**.
---
| [GET YOUR COPY](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=acce9f5b62&e=3a42edfdc4 "GET YOUR COPY")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.

clean_body: | | | | | 2025 Autism Health Walk: Every Step For Autism, Every Mile A Miracle! | http:// | Less Than 2 Weeks Left to Register for the Autism Walk! Join us for a day of movement, music, and miracles as we come together to support families impacted by autism! Whether you're walking in person at Huntington Beach Central Park or virtually from your own community, your steps matter. Walk as an individual, create a team, join an existing team, or just simply sponsor a walker. Rally your friends and family to support the cause from anywhere in the world! to Register! | | Date: Saturday, September 6, 2025 Location: Huntington Beach Central Park West, 18381 Goldenwest St, Huntington Beach, CA 92648 | "REGISTER NOW" | | | We’re excited to announce that tickets are officially on sale for the Autism Health Summit 2026 – happening April 24–25, 2026 at the beautiful Legacy Resort & Spa in San Diego, CA! Early Bird Special – Save 10% Register now and receive 10% off your ticket with promo code EarlyBird10. This limited-time offer is valid through Nov 1st only , so don’t wait! You can also apply through your California Regional Center for approval. Event Dates: Friday & Saturday, April 24–25 – Full conference with expert speakers, panels, and networking Sunday, April 26 – Optional Vendor Day : An extra opportunity to connect with exhibitors and explore products, services, and resources that support the autism community This one-of-a-kind, parent-driven event brings together top doctors, therapists, researchers, and educators to share the latest in integrative health, biomedical treatments, therapies, nutrition, and more. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or healthcare professional, the Autism Health Summit is designed to inform, inspire, and empower. Don’t miss out on a transformative weekend of learning, connection, and hope. Sponsorships are available . Reserve your spot today and save 10% at: | "BUY TICKETS" | | Warrior Mom is Now on Audible! | | We are thrilled to share some exciting news— Warrior Mom: A Mother’s Journey in Healing Her Son with Autism is now available on Audible through Amazon! Whether you’re driving, walking, or simply prefer to listen, you can now experience this inspiring story in a whole new way. This audiobook is a heartfelt journey of hope, resilience, and determination—created to inspire families and advocates everywhere who are seeking answers and strength on their journey with autism. If you’ve ever wanted to dive into the Warrior Mom story but haven’t had the time to sit and read the book, this is the perfect way to join. You will be encouraged, inspired, and reminded that no challenge is too great when fueled by love and perseverance. For more information and to grab your copy today, visit . | "GET YOUR COPY" | | YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE! | Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders. | Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance! | "DONATE NOW" | Autism Health Inc. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: What my name means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250826-814&t=1001&akid=816%2E251025%2Eh8j_AH ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250826-814&t=1002&akid=816%2E251025%2Eh8j_AH ]Abdul for US Senate

Some people see my name as a political liability. But to me, it’s always
been a source of strength.

Peter, my
name means “servant leader,” and when your name is Abdul El-Sayed, you
take nothing for granted. Let me explain:

Growing up, I’d spend summers splitting my time between my grandmother,
Teta Suad, in Egypt, and my grandma, Judy, here in the States. They
couldn’t have a conversation if they wanted to, but when they kissed me on
the forehead, it was the same love.

That experience showed me that across cultures, languages, or differences,
love is the common thread.

In our politics today, love is rare. Corporate PACs have bought the
loyalty of politicians who should be working for us.

And while they get richer, working people are left struggling to pay for
the basics — groceries, rent, and healthcare.

This campaign is about rewriting that story and building a politics rooted
in dignity, fairness, and love.

Passing Medicare for All so no one has to skip a doctor’s visit.
Increasing wages so that one good job is enough. And making sure our
taxpayer dollars go toward improving life here at home, not endless wars
overseas.

But we can’t do this without you. Our campaign doesn’t take a dime from
corporate PACs. We depend entirely on people like you to power this fight.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250826-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250826-814&refcode2=816_251025_h8j_AH&akid=816%2E251025%2Eh8j_AH ]If you believe that someone with a name like mine belongs in the U.S.
Senate — not because of what it means to me, but because of what it means
for all of us — then please, contribute $10 toward our
campaign today:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250826-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250826-814&refcode2=816_251025_h8j_AH&akid=816%2E251025%2Eh8j_AH ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=816%2E251025%2Eh8j_AH
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=816%2E251025%2Eh8j_AH

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Chris Pappas
subject: 105 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Today is a powerful reminder of our progress.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2048%2E582294%2EPr656Q)
On this day in 1920, the 19th Amendment to the Constitution was officially certified, granting women the right to vote and forever changing the course of American democracy. **Today we mark 105 years since that historic step forward.**
Women’s Equality Day is a powerful reminder of the progress we’ve made thanks to generations of trailblazers who organized, marched, and fought for their voices to be heard. _But it’s also a call to action._
Because today that progress is still under threat. Across the country voting rights are under attack, reproductive freedoms are being rolled back, and too many elected officials are working to drag us backward instead of moving us forward.
We owe it to the suffragists — and to future generations — to keep pushing for a stronger, fairer democracy for all. That’s the work I’m committed to in Congress, and it’s a fight I’m ready to take to the Senate. But I can’t do that without your support.
[**Can you make a $5 contribution today to help us keep up the fight for equality, justice, and democracy?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250826_1_19thamendment?refcode=em20250826-2048&amount=5&refcode2=2048_582294_Pr656Q&akid=2048%2E582294%2EPr656Q)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250826_1_19thamendment?amount=5&refcode=em20250826-2048&refcode2=2048_582294_Pr656Q&akid=2048%2E582294%2EPr656Q)**
Together we can honor the legacy of those who secured the right to vote by making sure we protect it for everyone.
With gratitude,
Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250826-1?t=2&refcode2=2048_582294_Pr656Q&akid=2048%2E582294%2EPr656Q)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=2048%2E582294%2EPr656Q)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=2048%2E582294%2EPr656Q)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2048%2E582294%2EPr656Q)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

Manchester, NH 03105

name: Guzman for Virginia
subject: Americans for Prosperity spending against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | **** New filings with the Virginia State Board of Elections reveal that Americans for Prosperity - the dark-money group founded by Charles and David Koch - is spending over $10,000 on an independent expenditure ad campaign to defeat Elizabeth Guzman in VA-HD22.
AFP doesn’t like that in her previous service in the Virginia House of Delegates, Elizabeth Guzman passed laws expanding collective bargaining rights to firefighters and teachers.
AFP doesn’t like that Elizabeth Guzman is endorsed by Virginia’s unions, and supports raising wages.
And AFP _really_ doesn’t like that Elizabeth Guzman is on the cusp of defeating MAGA Republican Del. Ian Lovejoy in a TOSS-UP, red-to-blue race that could determine control of the House of Delegates in just over 70 days.
**[We’re fighting Koch money with over 6,000 donations from supporters like you, fueling a massive field and advertising campaign to get out the truth and get out the vote. name: Emily Randall
subject: Emily’s Notes: Hiking, driving, and ferrying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Since Congress adjourned, I’ve been driving, hiking, and ferrying across the 6th District to meet with constituents.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046353/565768645/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.08.26_AugNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYwNGNhOC1iODgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HKvneqga3Lp_JcyA8QxbQ4DJGAsVa65GlQ2UipEnYm4=&emci=15e9d1f1-8782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3bf04ca8-b882-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) | Peter – Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C.! Here’s what I’ve been up to: • **My other home —** Congress is on August recess, so I’m home in Bremerton. But I’m disturbed (understatement) at Trump’s military occupation of D.C., where I work and live for half the year. It is terrifying to see active-duty military in the streets of American cities. We have to keep watching and pushing back against this administration’s efforts to pull us into fascism. [_**Here are ways to help D.C. from anywhere in the country →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046354/565768646/-689902352?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.08.26_AugNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYwNGNhOC1iODgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HKvneqga3Lp_JcyA8QxbQ4DJGAsVa65GlQ2UipEnYm4=&emci=15e9d1f1-8782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3bf04ca8-b882-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) • **The town hall blitz continues —** Thank you to the 200 community members who joined us at [_**last week’s town hall in Tacoma!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046355/565768647/1379048193?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.08.26_AugNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYwNGNhOC1iODgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HKvneqga3Lp_JcyA8QxbQ4DJGAsVa65GlQ2UipEnYm4=&emci=15e9d1f1-8782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3bf04ca8-b882-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442). We’ll have town halls in Kingston on August 29, Sequim on September 6, and Elma on September 24. _**[RSVP for all town halls here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046356/565768648/1733393286?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.08.26_AugNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYwNGNhOC1iODgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HKvneqga3Lp_JcyA8QxbQ4DJGAsVa65GlQ2UipEnYm4=&emci=15e9d1f1-8782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3bf04ca8-b882-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442)**_ [_****_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046357/565768649/1126352236?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.08.26_AugNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYwNGNhOC1iODgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HKvneqga3Lp_JcyA8QxbQ4DJGAsVa65GlQ2UipEnYm4=&emci=15e9d1f1-8782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3bf04ca8-b882-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) • **The truth about ICE detention —** In case you missed it: I visited the Northwest Detention Center in Tacoma, where ICE is detaining 1,500 people. My priority is ensuring every human being held in my district is treated with respect. [_**Read my report here →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046358/565768650/-1867840939?cb=MTc1NTcxOTMyNzEyNQ==&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.08.26_AugNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYwNGNhOC1iODgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HKvneqga3Lp_JcyA8QxbQ4DJGAsVa65GlQ2UipEnYm4=&emci=15e9d1f1-8782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3bf04ca8-b882-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) • **Meetings galore!** — Since Congress adjourned, I’ve been driving, hiking, and ferrying across the 6th District to meet with constituents. Here are a few highlights: Doing a “hot ones” style interview at the Port Angeles Food Bank, meeting with veterans in Tacoma, seeing the new 300-ton boat lift in Port Townsend, and [_**hiking with members of the Mountaineers and Outdoor Alliance Washington**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046359/565768651/-230512412?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.08.26_AugNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYwNGNhOC1iODgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HKvneqga3Lp_JcyA8QxbQ4DJGAsVa65GlQ2UipEnYm4=&emci=15e9d1f1-8782-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3bf04ca8-b882-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442). I feel beyond lucky to represent this beautiful district. clean_body: Since Congress adjourned, I’ve been driving, hiking, and ferrying across the 6th District to meet with constituents. | Peter – Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C.! Here’s what I’ve been up to: • My other home — Congress is on August recess, so I’m home in Bremerton. But I’m disturbed (understatement) at Trump’s military occupation of D.C., where I work and live for half the year. It is terrifying to see active-duty military in the streets of American cities. We have to keep watching and pushing back against this administration’s efforts to pull us into fascism. • The town hall blitz continues — Thank you to the 200 community members who joined us at . We’ll have town halls in Kingston on August 29, Sequim on September 6, and Elma on September 24. • The truth about ICE detention — In case you missed it: I visited the Northwest Detention Center in Tacoma, where ICE is detaining 1,500 people. My priority is ensuring every human being held in my district is treated with respect. • Meetings galore! — Since Congress adjourned, I’ve been driving, hiking, and ferrying across the 6th District to meet with constituents. Here are a few highlights: Doing a “hot ones” style interview at the Port Angeles Food Bank, meeting with veterans in Tacoma, seeing the new 300-ton boat lift in Port Townsend, and . I feel beyond lucky to represent this beautiful district. Now is the part where I ask you for a donation. I run people-powered campaigns because I want to be accountable to working people. Being at home is a clear reminder: I work for YOU! Meanwhile, my campaign team is hard at work organizing here in Washington to elect Deb Krishnadasan and other Democrats THIS year and partnering with our adopted swing district to flip Arizona’s 6th NEXT year. Grassroots donations from emails like this one make all that work possible. But August is one of the toughest months for grassroots fundraising, and right now we’re running about $5,000 behind where we need to be. = = I sincerely appreciate anything you can give. name: Forward Party
subject: If No One Is Playing By The Rules, Why Do They Exist...?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here's what's happening in the Forward world...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=1)
---
Tuesday, August 26, 2025 | Peter -- Last weekend, Texas voted to gerrymander its voting districts in the middle of the decade to win a few extra seats for Republicans in Congress. This is a blatant power grab designed to usurp the system we have in place to squeeze unequal representation out of it. In response, California has put a ballot measure forward to its voters this November to do the same thing in order to win a few seats back for Democrats - and getting praised by the [DNC chair for "not playing by the rules"](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=dVV2rW1vUlrpxgYY_oyMKqEWok2YsbwUgLPE_bgETDP0v8UmoT4ZrEHDmQzvuUtB6PRSrzEeSfgIW3bTnHhn0BbESJ_nxlgv6e3juuqlsXg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=2). With both legacy parties fully ripping off the veil of pretending to care about the voters, it begs the question: **If no one is playing by the rules, why do the rules exist?** We're not being pedantic here. It's an honest question. This country is founded on a set of principles designed to create a fairer and more representative government free from the tyranny of ages past. But if the political parties can just decide to ignore those principles for personal gain then how are we any better than the monarchs and tyrants we left behind?
**[Utah Judge Orders New Congressional Maps For 2026 In Another Redistricting Twist](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=egVypF8EV9qjJ3_Cbm6dbgl1TgbnaHoJgBm0T8fPbTF1cqpSFRJovVBrPSDv_at1ckbd6ikJG51zaF6FVDzgYj0gBzYif8jCnx4iD9NoQs8XFcU9Rz6OQpLDZkjnhyqNCFCkdwryokbOeALOpRxgYxXhDlw3NbtJuwgfzpmdj7Df6G_nUop-Ve41JHs3IP6i&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=3)** | **NBC News** A Utah district judge has ruled that the state must redraw its congressional districts because the state’s Republican-controlled Legislature erred when it overruled a ballot measure passed by voters that sought to rein in partisan gerrymandering. **[Forward Party Hosts Event On Black Voters And Local Political Power](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=NHSfsDo5SKKm5HdErAzQhiEUQzm77CzljiQKYujh49AQUSY-Ro8k9ROcxgkFoL-hiqmuk1k5vX9fhF05oNg5mWQoEVIKbe7Cvz6Xj4NFxObaWAE0X8X7-xHntBG0ZCuJS63J2DyjFcDd-q3sWvanxw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=4)** | **Atlantic City Focus** The percentage of independent voters not tied to the Democratic or Republican parties in the U.S. is _g_ rowing, and some parties are grappling with their role in the future of American politics. **[Farmville Mayor Switches Parties, Joins New Political Group](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HASfYE83osGDEFSYVmkTh2uZMT31K790r7mGQ-qoCpUmW0mDyy1ekng0hRHFX3dzUYRSsMR1-uKdaQsrkTA6ftXq2reA136AXIKh2tOxb2Dq3ZLRgwdgRziKpwEncZvh&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=5)** | **The Farmville Herald** Farmville Mayor Brian Vincent announced on Monday, Aug. 25 that he’s joining the Forward Party, a decision confirmed by party leadership.
**August 28 | FWD NJ Happy Hour - Middlesex Meet Up
** Bring a friend, grab a drink, and let’s talk about how we can strengthen our communities together! Join the Forward Party of New Jersey for an evening of connection and conversation at our Middlesex Social Hour. This is a chance to meet neighbors, local leaders, and fellow Forwardists who believe politics should be about solving problems, not fueling division. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/paulnjeb/fwd_nj_happy_hour_--_middlesex_meet-up?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=6)** **August 28 | NOVA Forward Monthly Meet Up
** Join Forward NOVA for our regular open meeting! We have the opportunity to make a stand for democracy and civil engagement in the face of the political chaos coming out of DC. We have a lot of work to do and need your help. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_monthly_20250828?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=7)** **August 28 | Civic Engagement With The Young Forwardists
** Beliefs matter—but without action, they’re only words. If you’re passionate about making change and don’t want to wait to make an impact, you’re in the right place. Join our Summer of Civic Engagement Policy Meeting, where driven young people come together to tackle pressing issues, craft legislation, and work to turn ideas into reality. This is your opportunity to take initiative, speak up, and create meaningful change. We’re ready to get to work, join our team! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/civic_engagement_20250828?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=8)**
**[Forward Endorsed Congressman Don Davis Embraces The Forward Party](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=jMHeSgphcTZt4V4qO_V_4v1VgnHeiC1TyKZQJdIPORiSFOIzi8qox0ptBmn8CPkMEhzoGsvyL8-8TAhfle8AcY4ckTREFxGeI3aV0Qi_QvKWns4h5aCDmG50Kea5cIQJ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=9)** | **WUNC** **[NC Forward Chair Patrick Newton Discussed Redistricting](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=w3B_spA9pBxvNsPGvqwYO6Kaf5U7UkjlvldZktcDbAteD-qq2K3H3VbT1tDQuF4CYNfGirIjH0zOlWVQrt27Nu3sksHfn2KHI2DQ342VNLlbqYGUBCirr-3lzWVQn7x8ijU6ulzp6qeiy-VqRpx1fg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=10)** | **Spectrum Local News**
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=11) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=12) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=13) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=14) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_77&n=15) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:
1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

# [Thank Gavin Newsom for (Hilariously) Driving Trump Crazy](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d8d6fca-3a1e-42e2-a5dd-9e1ca8efbb2f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a53588f-77a7-421a-aacd-fa9ea11dbdca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | California governor Gavin Newsom has been posting a slew of hilariously brilliant [memes and posts](https://default.salsalabs.org/T145e5135-324a-4bc6-9f79-077bfacec48d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) satirizing the idiotic ones Trump puts out -- and the internet is loving it. **They are spreading like wildfire, making Trump what he fears most -- an object of ridicule.** The merchandise is selling like crazy (including a "MAGA" [flag](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15ae033f-7648-4779-aa7e-f05e58826d15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \-- "Make America Gavin Again"). And Fox and the other right-wing squawking heads are going nuts, since they can't attack Newsom for it since that would implicitly be attacking Trump (since this is after all, satirizing his work). **This is not an endorsement for 2028 (too early for that), but it is unbridled joy that this is totally pissing off Trump and his dimwitted MAGA followers.** [**Please join us in thanking Newsom and his incredible creative team for their work. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89cfa18a-e7d0-44a0-b08f-40d049ee6fd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Democratic Petition | Gillibrand for Senate
subject: Asking for your signature before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
This system is broken — and Senator Kirsten Gillibrand and Democrats are fighting to fix it.
Did you know that right now, **43 million Americans collectively owe more than $1.6 trillion in federal student loans?** That’s not just a number. It’s families putting off buying a home. It’s graduates delaying starting a family. It’s millions of Americans trapped under monthly payments they can’t escape. And with Republicans in Congress already trying to roll back progress, it’s clear: Democrats can’t do it alone. That’s why we’re launching a grassroots petition to demand bold action to relieve student debt and make college affordable for all — because millions of people’s futures are on the line. [**_If you think Democrats should do whatever it takes to end the student debt crisis, please be one of the 10,000 signatures we need before midnight and add your name >>_** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046565/565769203/-785082729?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.26_Student-Debt_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDFkN2I1Yi1iOTgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1J7--nJAzOP17T1iHR1F0uIP1CL2TBp6ZuIqCMYz38=&emci=82af0e68-e981-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5d1d7b5b-b982-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029) | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046566/565769204/-785082729?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.26_Student-Debt_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDFkN2I1Yi1iOTgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1J7--nJAzOP17T1iHR1F0uIP1CL2TBp6ZuIqCMYz38=&emci=82af0e68-e981-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5d1d7b5b-b982-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)

This system is broken — and Senator Kirsten Gillibrand has been leading the fight to fix it. She championed expanding Pell Grants, pushed for student loan forgiveness, fought to lower interest rates and worked to create fair repayment plans.
Every signature we gather shows the millions of borrowers weighed down by debt that Democrats are in their corner. Together, we can fight back against those who want to keep young people and working families buried under impossible loans.
[**_Please, add your name today to stand with Senator Gillibrand and demand action. We’re racing to gather 10,000 signatures before midnight:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114046567/565769205/-785082729?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.26_Student-Debt_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDFkN2I1Yi1iOTgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1J7--nJAzOP17T1iHR1F0uIP1CL2TBp6ZuIqCMYz38=&emci=82af0e68-e981-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5d1d7b5b-b982-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)

name: Toni Atkins
subject: Women won the right to vote 105 years ago. It’s still under attack.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Toni Atkins for Governor 2026
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tagov-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tagov-em]
Hi Peter,
Today marks 105 years since the 19th Amendment was ratified, granting women the right to vote in this country after generations of women led the way forward with courage and persistence, organizing their communities and refusing to be silenced.
Of course, we can’t ignore that millions of Black women and women of color in the South were denied this fundamental right for several more decades because of the racist Jim Crow laws.
And, we can’t ignore that these fundamental rights can so easily be stripped away — regardless of precedent.
Today is also Women’s Equality Day — a day for us to honor the women who poured their sweat, blood, and tears into this work. It’s a day for us to celebrate all the progress we’ve made, and to recognize how far we still have to go.
Because right now, extremists in this country are working overtime to roll back the progress women have made. We’ve seen national figures aligned with the Trump administration openly suggest that women shouldn’t vote at all. And we’ve seen policies that strip away reproductive freedom, threaten economic security, and undermine our very democracy.
I know how far we’ve come. I also know how fragile our progress can be.
Even here in our great state of California, progress happens slowly (we’ve never elected a woman governor!). I’m running for Governor of California to ensure our state continues to stand as a beacon of equality, freedom, and progress — and when I’m elected, I’ll be proud to shatter this last glass ceiling for women in our state.
On this Women’s Equality Day, join me in sending a clear message: Women fought for the right to vote, and we’re not going back! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FlcqHzfPVkCd0SI6Rl1aKg2?contactdata=XB3p0E66QJE9jaIF/Hh2IcO8Ea4LU6YsRqw4PCF6OQxQ4dMqatXgcH4W7eOsUFymwMq7Bn/+4gqwAqpF0oF1ErNkR8bxcUChWieDjF5g8/APrFFhflw1s0AJloHPnOLf]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FlcqHzfPVkCd0SI6Rl1aKg2?contactdata=XB3p0E66QJE9jaIF/Hh2IcO8Ea4LU6YsRqw4PCF6OQxQ4dMqatXgcH4W7eOsUFymwMq7Bn/+4gqwAqpF0oF1ErNkR8bxcUChWieDjF5g8/APrFFhflw1s0AJloHPnOLf]
This fight has always been about more than one amendment or one election. It’s about dignity, opportunity, and the kind of future we want for our future generations.
Thank you for standing with me — and with all the women who came before us.
With gratitude,
Toni
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tagov-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tagov-em]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tagov-em]
Thank you for being a strong supporter for progress in California! Your partnership has helped Toni accomplish so much over the years – and together, we can get even more done in the future. We hope you'll continue to stay in touch by reading emails like this one – email is a critical way for Toni to stay close with her supporters. Whether or not you're able to donate, we're always glad you're on the team.

---|---|---

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4720068&post_id=170989607&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTg5NjA3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NjI0MDQxNSwiZXhwIjoxNzU4ODMyNDE1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDcyMDA2OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jJJLgVFRDto9rb7Yi2ym3AVm2SyiB-jzCVLwWFUzB4M&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4720068&post_id=170989607&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTg5NjA3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTYyNDA0MTUsImV4cCI6MTc1ODgzMjQxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ3MjAwNjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.EjErNnf-JoP11GZuoYnFy_DBao2xv6fpgx_SWU6W4ZU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
