| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/thecapitalistmag/p/the-queen-of-trading-is-no-longer?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0c9c296e-cc09-45df-9a50-02722b7bbf84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On January 14th 2025 Nancy Pelosi **[purchased call options in Tempus](https://substack.com/redirect/21f9df38-8b80-4512-876b-e2cf8db080eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , a healthcare technology company. A month later, the stock surged, turning her $75,000 investment into $235,000--a 213% return. A big win to be sure, one that any trader would be proud of, but this wasn't an isolated stroke of luck. Pelosi, often dubbed the "Queen of Trading," has built a reputation for stock market success that outpaces even the world's top hedge funds. Her portfolio's performance raises a troubling question: How does a public servant making $223,500 a year salary consistently achieve such extraordinary returns, and what does this reveal about the integrity of American governance?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjYXBpdGFsaXN0bWFnLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.6rY3M39yDEEYBDDJHstwZXnps9PDBo--gbWeLqO1MqI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170989607)
Pelosi's trading prowess is no secret. In 2024, her stock portfolio reportedly grew by 70%, dwarfing the S&P 500's 24% gain and outperforming elite funds like Renaissance Technologies or Bridgewater Associates. Estimates of her net worth **[range from $120 million to $413 Million.](https://substack.com/redirect/ec292b7e-b95c-4e19-894f-e60048c23fc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
According to posts on X, her investments in companies like NVIDIA and Microsoft have yielded outsized returns, often timed with uncanny precision around legislative developments. It is worth noting however that is not that so much that she wins all the time (she certainly does have big wins.) It's that she doesn't often lose.
## [RELATED VIDEO: Asking Wall Street traders if they beat Nancy Pelosi's portfolio](https://substack.com/redirect/12aa12cc-6a31-4060-b853-4c5036d9d8b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/12aa12cc-6a31-4060-b853-4c5036d9d8b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
For instance, her husband Paul Pelosi **[dumped 2000 shares](https://substack.com/redirect/4364a694-3824-4c5c-b6f9-aac2fad2e2ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of Visa stock reportedly worth more than $500k on July 14th 2024 months before Visa was **[sued by the DOJ](https://substack.com/redirect/a93536e4-95df-4399-824c-70c82626a0fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over its behavior in the debt market. That announcement to the general public came on September the 24th 2024. On another occasion Paul Pelosi dumped 30,000 shares of Google that he held, a month before **[the DOJ sued Google.](https://substack.com/redirect/4364a694-3824-4c5c-b6f9-aac2fad2e2ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **These patterns have fueled speculation that her role as a former House Speaker granted her access to proprietary information unavailable to the public.
The public's fascination with Pelosi's trades has birthed an industry. Apps like **[Autopilot](https://substack.com/redirect/a47f54dd-0292-40e8-a89d-ea2e0c169e41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and services like the **[Pelosi Stock Tracker](https://substack.com/redirect/ed224416-9ad8-47b1-8d8b-5feca0f57bad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[,](https://substack.com/redirect/ed224416-9ad8-47b1-8d8b-5feca0f57bad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) created by Chris Josephs, allow retail investors to mimic her moves. These platforms thrive because her trades are not just profitable--they're legendary.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a0b6dbb2-e69f-401e-84d1-6d75a1719af1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A 2023 study by the University of Chicago found that congressional stock trading outperforms the market by an average of 17.2% annually, with Pelosi's returns consistently among the highest. This isn't mere luck; it's a system where lawmakers, privy to non-public briefings, can act on information before it reaches the market.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ce230af-3a95-4104-aba9-19bd96f11aae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Pelosi's defense is as audacious as it is unconvincing. She insists the trades belong to her husband, Paul Pelosi, a venture capitalist. "I don't own any stocks," she declared in a 2019 press conference, dismissing accusations of impropriety. Yet, the sheer consistency of her family's market-beating returns--coupled with their alignment with legislative events--strains credulity. Remember that Google trade from earlier? Paul exercised call options on Google just as Congress debated antitrust regulations affecting tech giants, the trade netted millions.
The public sees through the facade: a 2025 post on X by **[@WallStreetApes](https://substack.com/redirect/4ca0308a-76ed-453d-82b5-b45163f69bb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** called her denial "blatant," reflecting widespread sentiment that far from being the greatest trader of all time, her position in Congress and access to insider information fuels her financial success.
Pelosi is not alone in this game. A 2024 analysis by **[Unusual Whales](https://substack.com/redirect/78f55699-2c05-4a59-ba81-ee57cf0c5663?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[,](https://substack.com/redirect/78f55699-2c05-4a59-ba81-ee57cf0c5663?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a financial transparency platform, revealed that 1 in 7 members of Congress traded stocks in sectors they regulate, with average returns far exceeding market benchmarks. Senators like Richard Burr and Kelly Loeffler faced scrutiny for suspiciously timed trades during the 2020 COVID-19 crisis, yet Pelosi's scale and visibility make her the poster child for this controversy. Her trades are not just profitable; they're ostentatiously so, amplifying public outrage over a system that seems rigged.
The crusade to curb this behavior has gained traction, led by voices like **[@unusualwhales](https://substack.com/redirect/958ad2cb-4fef-4443-9916-a85c3cce7c57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on X. Their advocacy helped push a 2025 bipartisan deal to ban congressional stock trading, with Senator Josh Hawley introducing the PELOSI Act to prohibit lawmakers from trading individual stocks. The bill mandates blind trusts or divestment, aiming to sever the link between legislative power and personal profit. "Public service should not make you a millionaire," Hawley stated, echoing sentiments from **[Treasury Secretary Bessent](https://substack.com/redirect/0c5b9cf4-0be6-4657-b6d0-2f5074e5500e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and others who've called for investigations into Pelosi's trades. Yet, resistance persists--some lawmakers argue that banning trading infringes on personal freedom, a stance critics view as self-serving.
This controversy exposes a deeper erosion of trust in American institutions. When lawmakers like Pelosi leverage their positions for personal gain, they undermine the principle that public service is a duty, not a pathway to wealth. A 2023 Pew Research study found that only 20% of Americans trust the federal government to act in the public's interest, a historic low. Stories of insider trading by Congress fuel this cynicism, suggesting a government that serves itself first. The fact that retail investors now chase Pelosi's trades as a legitimate strategy only underscores the absurdity: the public is reduced to betting on the very inequities they resent.
What's at stake is more than just Pelosi's portfolio. The ability of lawmakers to trade on insider knowledge creates a moral hazard, skewing policy decisions toward personal profit rather than public good. If a legislator knows their investments hinge on a bill's outcome, can they remain impartial? If congressional trading correlates with legislation favoring specific industries this isn't just unfair, it turns Congress into a private members club where they can vote themselves investment wins and that is a betrayal of the democratic ideals.
Looking forward, the push for reform offers hope but no easy fix. Even if the PELOSI Act passes, enforcement will be key. Blind trusts can be gamed, and loopholes may persist. The broader challenge is cultural: restoring a public ethos where service, not self-interest, defines leadership. For now, Pelosi's trades remain a symbol of a broken system--one where the powerful play by different rules.
As Tres. Sec Bessent said recently _**"If any private citizen traded this way, the SEC would be knocking on their door."**_
Will reform close this gap, or will the "Queen of Trading" simply pass her crown to the next insider? No one knows, but one thing is certain, until there is reform it will continue to happen and following Nancy Pelosi's trades is objectively a better bet for investors than any other analyst.
* * *

clean_body: "If any private citizen traded this way, the SEC would be knocking on their door..." | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "If any private citizen traded this way, the SEC would be knocking on their door..." | | | Aug 26| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- On January 14th 2025 Nancy Pelosi , a healthcare technology company. A month later, the stock surged, turning her $75,000 investment into $235,000--a 213% return. A big win to be sure, one that any trader would be proud of, but this wasn't an isolated stroke of luck. Pelosi, often dubbed the "Queen of Trading," has built a reputation for stock market success that outpaces even the world's top hedge funds. Her portfolio's performance raises a troubling question: How does a public servant making $223,500 a year salary consistently achieve such extraordinary returns, and what does this reveal about the integrity of American governance? Pelosi's trading prowess is no secret. In 2024, her stock portfolio reportedly grew by 70%, dwarfing the S&P 500's 24% gain and outperforming elite funds like Renaissance Technologies or Bridgewater Associates. Estimates of her net worth According to posts on X, her investments in companies like NVIDIA and Microsoft have yielded outsized returns, often timed with uncanny precision around legislative developments. It is worth noting however that is not that so much that she wins all the time (she certainly does have big wins.) It's that she doesn't often lose. For instance, her husband Paul Pelosi of Visa stock reportedly worth more than $500k on July 14th 2024 months before Visa was over its behavior in the debt market. That announcement to the general public came on September the 24th 2024. On another occasion Paul Pelosi dumped 30,000 shares of Google that he held, a month before These patterns have fueled speculation that her role as a former House Speaker granted her access to proprietary information unavailable to the public. The public's fascination with Pelosi's trades has birthed an industry. Apps like and services like the created by Chris Josephs, allow retail investors to mimic her moves. These platforms thrive because her trades are not just profitable--they're legendary. | | ---|---|--- A 2023 study by the University of Chicago found that congressional stock trading outperforms the market by an average of 17.2% annually, with Pelosi's returns consistently among the highest. This isn't mere luck; it's a system where lawmakers, privy to non-public briefings, can act on information before it reaches the market. | | ---|---|--- Pelosi's defense is as audacious as it is unconvincing. She insists the trades belong to her husband, Paul Pelosi, a venture capitalist. "I don't own any stocks," she declared in a 2019 press conference, dismissing accusations of impropriety. Yet, the sheer consistency of her family's market-beating returns--coupled with their alignment with legislative events--strains credulity. Remember that Google trade from earlier? Paul exercised call options on Google just as Congress debated antitrust regulations affecting tech giants, the trade netted millions. The public sees through the facade: a 2025 post on X by called her denial "blatant," reflecting widespread sentiment that far from being the greatest trader of all time, her position in Congress and access to insider information fuels her financial success. Pelosi is not alone in this game. A 2024 analysis by a financial transparency platform, revealed that 1 in 7 members of Congress traded stocks in sectors they regulate, with average returns far exceeding market benchmarks. Senators like Richard Burr and Kelly Loeffler faced scrutiny for suspiciously timed trades during the 2020 COVID-19 crisis, yet Pelosi's scale and visibility make her the poster child for this controversy. Her trades are not just profitable; they're ostentatiously so, amplifying public outrage over a system that seems rigged. The crusade to curb this behavior has gained traction, led by voices like on X. Their advocacy helped push a 2025 bipartisan deal to ban congressional stock trading, with Senator Josh Hawley introducing the PELOSI Act to prohibit lawmakers from trading individual stocks. The bill mandates blind trusts or divestment, aiming to sever the link between legislative power and personal profit. "Public service should not make you a millionaire," Hawley stated, echoing sentiments from and others who've called for investigations into Pelosi's trades. Yet, resistance persists--some lawmakers argue that banning trading infringes on personal freedom, a stance critics view as self-serving. This controversy exposes a deeper erosion of trust in American institutions. When lawmakers like Pelosi leverage their positions for personal gain, they undermine the principle that public service is a duty, not a pathway to wealth. A 2023 Pew Research study found that only 20% of Americans trust the federal government to act in the public's interest, a historic low. Stories of insider trading by Congress fuel this cynicism, suggesting a government that serves itself first. The fact that retail investors now chase Pelosi's trades as a legitimate strategy only underscores the absurdity: the public is reduced to betting on the very inequities they resent. What's at stake is more than just Pelosi's portfolio. The ability of lawmakers to trade on insider knowledge creates a moral hazard, skewing policy decisions toward personal profit rather than public good. If a legislator knows their investments hinge on a bill's outcome, can they remain impartial? If congressional trading correlates with legislation favoring specific industries this isn't just unfair, it turns Congress into a private members club where they can vote themselves investment wins and that is a betrayal of the democratic ideals. Looking forward, the push for reform offers hope but no easy fix. Even if the PELOSI Act passes, enforcement will be key. Blind trusts can be gamed, and loopholes may persist. The broader challenge is cultural: restoring a public ethos where service, not self-interest, defines leadership. For now, Pelosi's trades remain a symbol of a broken system--one where the powerful play by different rules. As Tres. Sec Bessent said recently "If any private citizen traded this way, the SEC would be knocking on their door." Will reform close this gap, or will the "Queen of Trading" simply pass her crown to the next insider? No one knows, but one thing is certain, until there is reform it will continue to happen and following Nancy Pelosi's trades is objectively a better bet for investors than any other analyst. * | A guest post by| free markets and American enterprise. Derek,
I want to take a moment to thank you.
Through every challenge, every headline, and every attack thrown my way (of which there are _many)_ ,**you have stood unwaveringly with me.**
I never take your support and confidence for granted.
And while the attacks on our work to uphold the values we share keep mounting, I’m motivated by your continued support and willingness to fight back alongside me.
For the sake of our democracy. Our Constitution. Our futures.
Derek, Donald Trump and his allies will continue to come after me, and anyone else who stands up to him. They hope that their persistent attacks will silence and intimidate others from holding his corrupt regime accountable.
But I’m not backing down. I never have, and I never will.
**[I’m so grateful for your support, but as these partisan attacks grow bolder, I need to know you have my back once more. I have an end-of-month fundraising deadline in a few days, and it would mean a lot to earn your support. body:
Trump wants to do away with mail-in voting
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047019/565770651/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Q2NzE4YS1iYjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdAeFIQWtKqFePVhTXRjavKecSZ0TAq_rOHDcguBe4w=&emci=efc79955-b482-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=73d6718a-bb82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9818364)
---

| | If you're going to take advice on how to run free and fair elections, Vladimir Putin is the last person you should be looking to. Of course, Donald Trump was more than happy last week to echo Putin's criticisms of mail-in voting – **and then call for a nationwide ban on it.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047021/565770653/-2044921950?refcode=2025-08-26-mail&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=73d6718a-bb82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Q2NzE4YS1iYjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdAeFIQWtKqFePVhTXRjavKecSZ0TAq_rOHDcguBe4w=)** I'm not about to let Trump infringe upon the secure and accessible means of voting that Oregonians have enjoyed for nearly three decades. **We have the highest rate of voter participation of any U.S. state, and – contrary to what Putin and Trump say – it has nothing to do with "fraud."** Trump knows he can't defend his increasingly unpopular agenda, so he's turning to any means he can to shift the electoral playing field in his party's favor. It began with his calls for Republicans to gerrymander additional Congressional seats, and now he's continuing with attacks on mail-in voting. He has _zero_ legal means of making it impossible to vote by mail – but if there's anything we know about Trump, it's that he believes the law doesn't apply to him. So we need to proactively defend voting access heading into 2026 and make it **impossible** for Trump to sneak anything by the American people. We need a majority in Congress that's going to actually stick up for our democracy when the President lies and parrots the talking points of an autocrat and war criminal. [**I'm working to help elect one, and if you believe in this fight, I'm hoping you can pitch in to fuel my efforts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047023/565770655/-2044921950?refcode=2025-08-26-mail&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=73d6718a-bb82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Q2NzE4YS1iYjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdAeFIQWtKqFePVhTXRjavKecSZ0TAq_rOHDcguBe4w=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047024/565770656/-2044921950?refcode=2025-08-26-mail&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=73d6718a-bb82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Q2NzE4YS1iYjgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JdAeFIQWtKqFePVhTXRjavKecSZ0TAq_rOHDcguBe4w=) More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: Trump wants to do away with mail-in voting | | | | If you're going to take advice on how to run free and fair elections, Vladimir Putin is the last person you should be looking to. Of course, Donald Trump was more than happy last week to echo Putin's criticisms of mail-in voting – and then call for a nationwide ban on it. = I'm not about to let Trump infringe upon the secure and accessible means of voting that Oregonians have enjoyed for nearly three decades. We have the highest rate of voter participation of any U.S. state, and – contrary to what Putin and Trump say – it has nothing to do with "fraud." Trump knows he can't defend his increasingly unpopular agenda, so he's turning to any means he can to shift the electoral playing field in his party's favor. It began with his calls for Republicans to gerrymander additional Congressional seats, and now he's continuing with attacks on mail-in voting. He has zero legal means of making it impossible to vote by mail – but if there's anything we know about Trump, it's that he believes the law doesn't apply to him. So we need to proactively defend voting access heading into 2026 and make it impossible for Trump to sneak anything by the American people. We need a majority in Congress that's going to actually stick up for our democracy when the President lies and parrots the talking points of an autocrat and war criminal. = = More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. subject: re: Public Broadcasting SHUTTING DOWN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Breaking >>>>
| **We are DEVASTATED!!!** Trump gutted $1.1 BILLION from public broadcasting — putting news, children’s shows, and educational programs on the chopping block for _years to come._

[**We will NEVER forgive Trump or his MAGA minions for destroying public media! So we’re sending public broadcasters a letter to thank them for their decades of service — and to stand with them in this critical fight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93213?t=6&akid=20986%2E878179%2Ed13hcC) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93213?t=7&akid=20986%2E878179%2Ed13hcC)
---
TO: Public Broadcasters
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. To everyone in public broadcasting,

**Thank you.** Your freely available programming has meant so much to millions of Americans!

I am FURIOUS with Trump and the MAGA mob for wiping out your funding, but please know that I have your back in this fight.

**I also know that Trump’s attacks on the free press don’t end here — he wants to shut down MSNBC, CNN, and anyone else who holds him accountable.**

It’s not just upsetting, _it’s a dangerous step towards**outright authoritarianism!**_ That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to stop him.

[**I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who defend public media and our most essential freedoms »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93213?t=8&akid=20986%2E878179%2Ed13hcC) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93213?t=9&akid=20986%2E878179%2Ed13hcC)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
_\- The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20986%2E878179%2Ed13hcC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20986%2E878179%2Ed13hcC).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20986%2E878179%2Ed13hcC) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=20986%2E878179%2Ed13hcC). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20986%2E878179%2Ed13hcC)
---

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Wesley Bell had his constituents ASSAULTED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

AIPAC spent millions to buy Cori Bush’s seat and hand it to Wesley Bell —
and now he’s having his own constituents assaulted for daring to stand up
for Palestine.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250826?refcode=em20250826-36961&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36961_1203867_EBzT3n&akid=36961%2E1203867%2EEBzT3n ]A post on X from Ryan Grim (@ryangrim) reading: 'St. Louis police and
security for Rep. Wesley Bell got quite rough with townhall attendees at
the end of the recent event. Here's new video from one constituent who
filmed some of the assaults and by the end is getting thrown to the ground
himself:'. It includes a screenshot of a uniformed security officer
shoving protesters.

At a town hall last week, Wesley Bell — who represents St. Louis after
AIPAC’s network poured millions into buying his seat from Cori — was met
with constituents demanding answers on his support for Israel’s genocide
in Gaza and his ties to AIPAC. Instead of listening, he had security and
law enforcement physically remove and assault them.

This district used to have Cori Bush — a working-class, progressive
champion who always fought for her community. Now, they have a guy who
uses force against his own constituents for daring to demand peace and
justice.

AIPAC has made it clear they plan to come for Justice Democrats again in
next year’s midterms, just like they did with Cori and Jamaal Bowman in
2024. They spent millions last cycle to crush progressives, and they’re
preparing to do it again.

Grassroots movements like ours have beaten AIPAC before, and we can do it
again. But we need to be ready now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250826?refcode=em20250826-36961&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36961_1203867_EBzT3n&akid=36961%2E1203867%2EEBzT3n ]A donation of just $5 can go a long way towards
defending our incumbents and giving our new candidates — like Donavan
McKinney — a head start in their races. Chip in today to help us win →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250826?refcode=em20250826-36961&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36961_1203867_EBzT3n&akid=36961%2E1203867%2EEBzT3n ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250826-36961-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36961_1203867_EBzT3n&akid=36961%2E1203867%2EEBzT3n

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36961%2E1203867%2EEBzT3n

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

**[At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you to chip in $3 in response. But before I do, let me explain the stakes.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047515/565772394/1527952032?refcode=em-8.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGJkZDEyOTAtYmQ4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-4WsdZolLGV9IeUXav8JCjdrVum1F821hG7Knae7jcM=)**

As you know, I was one of only a handful of Democrats who flipped a GOP seat back in November. After a weeks-long vote count, we won by 653 votes. To put that into perspective, over 315,000 votes were cast in total – that’s a miniscule percentage.

National Republicans didn’t like losing this seat. They’re already spending millions on ads airing throughout the district to expand their grip on power with CA-45 as part of their majority.

We’re bracing for more attacks. This is one of the most expensive media markets in the country, and running ads to get our message out can cost more than **_16x more_** than other areas of the country.

It’s why we must start to fund our re-election efforts right now. But I’m not a career politician. I refuse corporate donations from Big Pharma and Big Oil because I’m beholden to the people I was elected to represent, not special interests.

While I know it’s the right thing, it makes fundraising a hell of a lot more difficult – and now, with national Republicans lining up behind our opponent, we’ll be facing the full might of the GOP machine.

The House majority is on the line. Stopping the MAGA agenda is on the line. And I won’t let our communities down.

**[If you’re with me, will you chip in $3 before our end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047516/565772396/1527952032?refcode=em-8.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGJkZDEyOTAtYmQ4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-4WsdZolLGV9IeUXav8JCjdrVum1F821hG7Knae7jcM=)**

Thank you,

Derek
**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047517/565772397/1527952032?refcode=em-8.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGJkZDEyOTAtYmQ4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-4WsdZolLGV9IeUXav8JCjdrVum1F821hG7Knae7jcM=)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We can’t wait for the wealthy to give us the world we’re asking for.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
When thousands of people pitch in just $5 at a time, it adds up to make an enormous difference.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250826-5371-footer&t=1&akid=5371%2E420207%2E_0sIeM)
Hi Peter, it's Pramila.
[**Today, I’m asking you to donate just $5 to power my campaign for Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250826-1?refcode=em20250826-5371&amount=5&refcode2=5371_420207__0sIeM&akid=5371%2E420207%2E_0sIeM)
And if you’ll give me just a minute, I’ll explain how your $5 can make a powerful difference.
**Since my first campaign for Congress back in 2016, I haven’t taken a dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists.** I made that commitment because I wanted to be focused on legislating for the people, not the powerful.
While other members of Congress are beholden to their wealthy donors, I’m fighting for policies that will make a real difference in the lives of poor and working people: Medicare for All, a liveable planet, dignity for all workers, trans equality, and more.
And none of it would be possible without the support of thousands of grassroots donors chipping in anything they can to power my campaign.
We may be up against the billionaires, but when thousands of people pitch in just $5 at a time, **it adds up to make an enormous difference.**
[**That’s why I’m asking for your $5 today, Peter. Because we can’t sit around and wait for the wealthy to give us the world we’re asking for. We have to build it ourselves.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250826-1?refcode=em20250826-5371&amount=5&refcode2=5371_420207__0sIeM&akid=5371%2E420207%2E_0sIeM)
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250826-1?refcode=em20250826-5371&amount=5&refcode2=5371_420207__0sIeM&akid=5371%2E420207%2E_0sIeM)**
I can’t thank you enough for everything you do to fight for our values, and I’m so proud to work alongside all of you to build the world we know is possible.
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250826-5371-footer&t=2&refcode2=5371_420207__0sIeM&akid=5371%2E420207%2E_0sIeM)**

clean_body: A small way to make a big statement You won't find this in stores -- here's how to get yours | | | Fellow Patriot, I don't know how else to say this... But something historic is happening -- and I want YOU to be part of this movement (and have a part of it, too).With Christmas and the holidays coming in a matter of months...We're inviting YOU to join it in the boldest, most joyful way possible: By wrapping your gifts in the symbol of this movement. 🎁 Limited-edition "47" wrapping paper dimensions are 24"x10'. Upon your gift to Turning Point USA, please allow 3-4 weeks for fulfillment -- all wrapping paper will be fulfilled prior to Christmas 2025 and donations must be received by 12/01/2025. This wrapping paper is a statement.A reminder that YOU helped spark this movement. That YOU stood tall when others backed down. That YOU gave the next generation a reason to be proud of America again.Because everywhere Turning Point USA visits, we're seeing patriotic young people fall in love with America again. They chant " USA!" in deep-blue states. They proudly wave the flag. They stand for freedom, for family, for TRUTH.This is not normal. This is a cultural UPRISING. Fellow Patriot, there's never been a better time to join this movement. We've shown we can beat the Left in our culture, but now, we need to reach as many young people as possible to put the Left out of business for a GENERATION. We're watching history unfold... Students rejecting the Left. Choosing America. Loving this country again.And it's all because of patriots like YOU. Whether it's Christmas, a birthday, or just because... don't just wrap a gift.Wrap it in the future you're helping build. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. This isn't just holiday cheer... This is cultural warfare -- with a smile. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I need to be blunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This isn't the time to sugarcoat anything

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114047778/565773255/1328794144?refcode=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkMjA5Y2JlLWJlODItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rWXVfV5F5o0goVxHzXkYLJI7E3ubCdbKYqNNIPERCJ8=&emci=14ddb68f-9f82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)

At 87, I’ve learned there’s no room for polite talk when our planet is on fire. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114047779/565773256/-1772575153?refcode=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkMjA5Y2JlLWJlODItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rWXVfV5F5o0goVxHzXkYLJI7E3ubCdbKYqNNIPERCJ8=) For decades, we've been told we have time. That we can deal with the climate crisis in four years, after the next election, or when the right leader comes along. But that's just not true anymore. Our planet doesn't have four more years. Our frontline communities don’t have four years. The fight is happening right here, right now, and we need to make every second count. As you read this, Donald Trump and his MAGA bandwagon are ripping away environmental protections at record speed — fast-tracking approvals for new mining and drilling on public lands, silencing climate science, and handing out billions in tax giveaways to the very polluters destroying our future. I’ve lived long enough to know their playbook: Billionaires and fossil fuel corporations count on us staying quiet. But when we rise up together, they're afraid of us. _We have shown over and over again that the many can beat the money._ **That's why the work we do at JanePAC matters more than ever. We're backing climate champions from city hall to the statehouse to Congress who understand that science demands action, not excuses.** **[But the only way we can power this movement forward is with grassroots supporters like you stepping up when it matters most. My team set a $30,000 goal for August so we can double down on races where we’ve already endorsed climate champions — and take on even more. Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114047780/565773257/-1772575153?refcode=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkMjA5Y2JlLWJlODItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rWXVfV5F5o0goVxHzXkYLJI7E3ubCdbKYqNNIPERCJ8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114047781/565773258/-1772575153?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkMjA5Y2JlLWJlODItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rWXVfV5F5o0goVxHzXkYLJI7E3ubCdbKYqNNIPERCJ8=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114047782/565773259/-1772575153?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.9d209cbe-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkMjA5Y2JlLWJlODItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rWXVfV5F5o0goVxHzXkYLJI7E3ubCdbKYqNNIPERCJ8=)

clean_body: This isn't the time to sugarcoat anything | At 87, I’ve learned there’s no room for polite talk when our planet is on fire. = For decades, we've been told we have time. That we can deal with the climate crisis in four years, after the next election, or when the right leader comes along. But that's just not true anymore. Our planet doesn't have four more years. Our frontline communities don’t have four years. The fight is happening right here, right now, and we need to make every second count. As you read this, Donald Trump and his MAGA bandwagon are ripping away environmental protections at record speed — fast-tracking approvals for new mining and drilling on public lands, silencing climate science, and handing out billions in tax giveaways to the very polluters destroying our future. I’ve lived long enough to know their playbook: Billionaires and fossil fuel corporations count on us staying quiet. But when we rise up together, they're afraid of us. We have shown over and over again that the many can beat the money. That's why the work we do at JanePAC matters more than ever. We're backing climate champions from city hall to the statehouse to Congress who understand that science demands action, not excuses. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Remember when Trump and the Republicans ran on cutting costs for families, and promised to help working Americans?

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047802/565773306/1435897075?refcode=email_082625_brokenpromises&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ4YmNhMy1iZTgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpSjgA80srp2VirrMaelCgKzCXjjHleIStOWhEoVuzo=&emci=804c7f25-747f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=6948bca3-be82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715) Folks, remember when Trump and the Republicans campaigned on lowering costs and helping working families? **Well, they threw all of that out the window when they passed Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill — or _the Big Beautiful Betrayal,_ as I like to call it. ** You’ve probably heard they took health care and food away from millions of Americans to give handouts to the ultra-wealthy — but there’s more. The Republican budget also shuts down clean energy projects, strips funding for wind and solar tax credits, and wipes out countless investments we made to make electricity more affordable for millions of American families. **[This is a serious setback, but we’re still fighting to keep your energy costs low. If you can, please, chip in to help us defend the investments we made to cut costs for Colorado’s families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047803/565773308/1506335976?refcode=email_082625_brokenpromises&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ4YmNhMy1iZTgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpSjgA80srp2VirrMaelCgKzCXjjHleIStOWhEoVuzo=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047804/565773309/1506335976?refcode=email_082625_brokenpromises&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ4YmNhMy1iZTgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpSjgA80srp2VirrMaelCgKzCXjjHleIStOWhEoVuzo=)
---
**The Republican cuts are projected to hike your energy bill by up to $400 a year, force American factories to shut down, and eliminate HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS of American jobs.**
MAGA Republicans seem determined to backtrack on all of the progress we made years ago in the _Inflation Reduction Act_ — no matter how much it costs everyday folks.
We won’t stand for it. And my Democratic colleagues and I are doing everything we can to fight back: **In the Senate, we just came together to introduce the _Lowering Electric Bills Act_ to restore some of the IRA’s most critical clean energy tax credits, and bring down energy costs for working families.**
We’re going to keep fighting to get these investments back in place, because abandoning our booming clean energy economy doesn’t bring us any closer to energy independence — it just makes us more reliant on fossil fuels, _and raises costs on working people. _
**[So if you’re with us, chip in whatever you can to help us keep fighting to cut costs for families, and retake the Senate to protect the progress we’ve made from Republican attacks. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114047806/565773310/1506335976?refcode=email_082625_brokenpromises&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ4YmNhMy1iZTgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpSjgA80srp2VirrMaelCgKzCXjjHleIStOWhEoVuzo=)**

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Celebrating Women’s Equality Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/FJCGXcbns0qiXfVj8mPMYQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FJCGXcbns0qiXfVj8mPMYQ2]
Peter –
Today is Women’s Equality Day, a day that marks the anniversary of the 19th Amendment, when some women finally won the right to vote after decades of struggle and sacrifice. It’s a reminder of how far we’ve come — and how much further we still have to go.
We’ve shattered barriers, but glass ceilings remain. Women are still underrepresented in positions of power, and our rights are still under attack.
If I’m elected, I’ll be the youngest woman Attorney General in the country — a milestone that would show the next generation that nothing is out of reach.
But this campaign isn’t just about making history — it’s about protecting our future. As Attorney General, I’ll defend reproductive freedom, safeguard voting rights, and ensure Colorado remains a place of equality and justice for all.
We can only reach this goal if we work together - so in honor of Women’s Equality Day, will you sign our petition saying you’re ready to elect me as the youngest woman Attorney General in 2026? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FJCGXcbns0qiXfVj8mPMYQ2]
Thanks so much,
Jena

clean_body: [] Peter – Today is Women’s Equality Day, a day that marks the anniversary of the 19th Amendment, when some women finally won the right to vote after decades of struggle and sacrifice. It’s a reminder of how far we’ve come — and how much further we still have to go. We’ve shattered barriers, but glass ceilings remain. Women are still underrepresented in positions of power, and our rights are still under attack. If I’m elected, I’ll be the youngest woman Attorney General in the country — a milestone that would show the next generation that nothing is out of reach. But this campaign isn’t just about making history — it’s about protecting our future. As Attorney General, I’ll defend reproductive freedom, safeguard voting rights, and ensure Colorado remains a place of equality and justice for all. We can only reach this goal if we work together - so in honor of Women’s Equality Day, will you sign our petition saying you’re ready to elect me as the youngest woman Attorney General in 2026? [] Thanks so much, Jena Follow Jena Online: [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent. Jena for Colorado P.O. Friend, I'd like to introduce myself.
Hi – my name is Ben, and I'm Michael's campaign manager. I wanted to take a moment to personally reach out to you, one of Michael's top supporters, and say thank you for making our team so successful thus far.
Since we launched this campaign, we’ve built incredible momentum. Michael has crisscrossed the state to meet Coloradans where they are. He’s earned endorsements from over 130 Colorado leaders. And he’s laid out a vision of Colorado rooted in opportunity, integrity and fairness – not partisanship and infighting.
But we can't take our foot off the gas now. We need all hands on deck to ensure Michael has the resources to compete against the far-right special interest money certain to come flooding into Colorado's race. **To keep up the grassroots-powered momentum we've built together so far, it's critical that we meet each and every fundraising goal from here on out. **

Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is only 5 days away, and we are still $10,000 short of our goal.

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The opposition is doing everything it can to hold onto power.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250826-1495-foote&t=1001&akid=1495%2E342411%2EKysro_ ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Today marks the kick-off of our end-of-month fundraising push — and what
we do right now will determine how strongly we show up in the fights
ahead.

Each end-of-month goal we hit isn’t just a number on a screen. It’s
resources in the hands of organizers. It’s capacity to push back against
right-wing attacks. It’s power to keep backing Squad leaders who put
people over profit and never back down from speaking truth to power.

Whether it’s pushing for bold, progressive change or defending fundamental
rights — we’re up against a well-funded opposition that’s doing everything
it can to hold onto power.

That’s why hitting every single fundraising goal matters — to build the
long-term strength of this movement and win.

We don’t take corporate PAC money. We count on each other.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250826-movement.iUnVK4&refcode=em20250826-1495&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1495%2E342411%2EKysro_ ]Can you chip in $3 right now to help us meet our
fundraising goal ahead of Sunday’s deadline? Every dollar builds our
power.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250826-movement.iUnVK4&refcode=em20250826-1495&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1495%2E342411%2EKysro_ ]Contribute ››

Thank you,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1495%2E342411%2EKysro_

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Team Kaptur HQ
subject: How you can power Marcy's work for the Heartland
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend, 2026 will be here before we know it.

We're already working to prepare for this critical election year by hiring organizers, building our digital outreach program, registering and mobilizing voters, and meeting Ohioans where they are.

Our district is once again one of the most important battleground races in the country, and with so much at stake, we can't leave anything to chance.

It doesn't take much to help power Marcy's fight for a fair economy, affordable healthcare, and real investments in our Heartland communities, friend. For a grassroots campaign like ours, every dollar counts. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?=250826_hq_difference_l1]
CONTRIBUTE ONCE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250826_hq_difference_b1]
BECOME A MONTHLY SUPPORTER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250826_hq_difference_b1&recurring=true]

Becoming a monthly supporter is the biggest difference you can make for our campaign, because your sustained support powers the long-term organizing work that it takes to win.

Our monthly supporters help us plan, budget, and prepare for all of the twists and turns that come with such a hotly contested race. Your contribution supports Marcy's urgent work through Election Day and beyond.

Friend, even just $5 a month, makes a major difference for our grassroots campaign. Can we count on you? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?=250826_hq_difference_l2]

Thank you so much,

— Team Kaptur HQ
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=e0a387d8-c182-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=e0a387d8-c182-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413]
Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tcAb-PaXtEayL-mWUU_QGw2?unsubscribedata=pyDpRzaIKuN3NVWyT9eARGUtq%2FsVQVAXbFQsk0Y5YuKWB23u7%2FnutPhE16raALaAkrZ2Ur9Xg85O5IqC62e%2BQTGeREGa9j3QtZdEXTEUYSyAx2K%2FxbqPiNhNwFRbJ0VLjmTsu4Xh0T3M%2BaHqaH6nue9suTNSLzj%2FaHwkJUc6%2BBGicHZpatngN6OhouwTJ6gyyY6vEFXLWvswpTv9wkLBrULrfx9wlNMOUGPEGmK8y468xAe0uN7kzh%2BOkH2FJFXlMUvz62lTC2zSld0pfuj10Rl4ey92yQF5dS8QfvhevvANyg8urv%2B9%2BVXpIjRDGKsFFgQNSKmwpENNexlI%2BkLtbrwpT3zzDMXqsvBRpzuYen8pqj5vuqNxzKbtlxXrdNuAYFodtbZMj2AnH9WcOdE8lRA9x4EVBoUzym3kCtGXQJ8%3D] . Kaptur for Congress

Toledo, OH 43697

name: Team Pou
subject: Why our work matters.
body:
Please read what they wrote about us.

| |
---
Team, The Cook Political Report just highlighted why our work matters. They wrote: _"[Pou’s district] narrowly and shockingly voted for Donald Trump last year [...] It is in CPR’s Lean Democrat column**for now."**_ Team, that’s exactly why we are launching our end-of-month push with a goal of $5,000. We can and we must win, but MAGA Republicans are coming after this seat, and every dollar we raise now goes straight to defending it. Everything goes toward winning in November. Nellie has spent her life serving New Jersey families, delivering results on healthcare, good-paying jobs, and lowering costs. Voters know she shows up, listens, and fights for them. And that’s what will keep NJ-09 blue. **[Will you chip in $15, $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us reach our $5,000 goal and continue building the campaign our district deserves? Your support makes it possible to stand strong and hold this frontline seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114048973/565777633/-200729754?refcode=250826_tp_eom1_l1&ms=250826_tp_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWY4ODRiMjEtYzI4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YtxkeDwaPpSizbcLBBPjCsjlN_rAHxN84uPzb5Wy6Ew=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114048983/565777643/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250826_tp_eom1&ms=250826_tp_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWY4ODRiMjEtYzI4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YtxkeDwaPpSizbcLBBPjCsjlN_rAHxN84uPzb5Wy6Ew=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114048985/565777644/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250826_tp_eom1&ms=250826_tp_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWY4ODRiMjEtYzI4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YtxkeDwaPpSizbcLBBPjCsjlN_rAHxN84uPzb5Wy6Ew=)

### About Nellie Pou

body:
When candidates champion these issues, they win. Now, we need your help to support them »
#
Reducing costs.
Securing a livable wage.
Making healthcare accessible.
Protecting reproductive freedom.
**These aren’t just ideals or talking points, Peter — they are priorities for working people in every corner of this country.**
Families are being stretched thin as wages lag behind the ever-increasing cost of living. Millions of people are facing impossible choices, like whether to pay outrageous medical bills or put food on the table. All while politicians backed by out-of-touch elites work to strip away basic freedoms, including the right for everyday Americans to make personal decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives.
The good news? **When candidates champion these issues, they win.**
Even in red states, voters have overwhelmingly supported higher wages, affordable healthcare, and basic rights — proof that economic justice and freedom unite us all.
But corporate-funded politicians won’t give up their power without a fight. That’s why our grassroots movement is on a mission to elect leaders who refuse corporate PAC money and who are committed to actually fighting for everyday Americans.
**[If you’re ready to help us elect real warriors for working families, please consider chipping in $10 or whatever makes most sense for you today:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94185?refcode=em20250826-9329&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9329%2E614464%2ES2T7Mn)**

name: Team Kelly
subject: 🇺🇸 To ALL of Mark Kelly’s supporters: Please, don’t click away 🧑‍🚀
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When Mark Kelly thinks about his most important supporters, it isn't the people that write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#

When Mark Kelly thinks about his most important supporters, it isn't the people that write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you.
---

Your support has been critical in helping Mark combat MAGA extremism.
Because of you, Mark is serving in the United States Senate — holding the line against President Trump, standing in the breach against the worst that this administration is trying to do.
---

But here’s something we thought you should know: Out of all the people who read these emails, less than 25% of them have made a donation to support his work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that important group.
---

Mark’s average online donation is around $30. Most people chip in much less than that. But with President Trump pushing our democracy to the brink, all that matters is that you are supporting Mark at a time he needs it most.
We’ll put it right to work not just in Arizona, but around the country. Mark is on the frontlines of this fight, and he is not going to back down.
---

[**If that sounds good to you, please: We’re humbly asking that you chip in $3 before midnight tonight.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug25.yz3v7m&refcode=em250826-1-f&t=1&akid=6147%2E6688874%2El1WhAn)

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: They’re getting aggressive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
This woman may not technically speak for the Democrat Party, but she has captured the essence of what her fellow members of Congress believe. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6d9e51776b68473d9c8e1a653fb58020&_e=5YpZIGIDeTMgLGKPLN44DMr2bzAD-aIWw3JJEQnrUpB75r8jOeKwVGab8fD77RDgfI-N2e5ZYRsHAaGzUZehf7DELGxlPD4yhgAQK1KYIXHRuX57sEItowl98Ov7faxfxVbNA1joEi6HWpTdiD9oqeZmf2q3sE4ujiftjAZz_eUG9j3yw-dA7fEVuEwzaApda2WK7B7rRrsT-AgtUrmev_e9fYv0WYDaxg0ssqH4Y3RO8cyn6z99Iv1yhErNKARgjM_o_cm2rJ4aDe0PbEGyDRb7RdihmuPZ3Zz_7KMMz2gVhyjPWKJQLJb3Tutz6dfupmw4M57WWXkreWgjLFRTdlq-LT6KovgfwXZlK7T_I1rfREpm9ryGya4ig41ROi3S6BAdZgkKrJt_ViROoeVWAh7Oqt8_eHG8NojzNeDtM4v_z-FNPjTsa2Ex0nIYqpdx1mbW_bCSsxdhmviwjnR--KR90SzkB2Tv_EegEErqyfKHgQe5_hYDFNihsH2HBkMoAKDPmLCBQ2L3RpL71C4V3HhzDFVZKPcN0URaGIjEkKGWUqzSgFBsuXfsFwrInIcuJFx39dDfU_sd4e7kHgLVZA87RQ95kJiFNZU3eCyH_yvQhxflnqaGYC5mtji2ZvmynqKrIz8hePaeOp587X4pbgPvahpQfQIxzyMsnXPzU4UV98TdqRzcAsIUoCNX3FkA4if5p9zZriaoizBDViSGjMotxT78KXLDa1sAG4Suz5tvQq04tMHAMuT7xm8I-ZcU)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

_[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6d9e51776b68473d9c8e1a653fb58020&_e=5YpZIGIDeTMgLGKPLN44DMr2bzAD-aIWw3JJEQnrUpB75r8jOeKwVGab8fD77RDgfI-N2e5ZYRsHAaGzUZehf7DELGxlPD4yhgAQK1KYIXHRuX57sEItowl98Ov7faxfxVbNA1joEi6HWpTdiD9oqeZmf2q3sE4ujiftjAZz_eUG9j3yw-dA7fEVuEwzaApda2WK7B7rRrsT-AgtUrmev_e9fYv0WYDaxg0ssqH4Y3RO8cyn6z99Iv1yhErNKARgjM_o_cm2rJ4aDe0PbEGyDVKRD_5h4XbQZEE963xL4F8B4iIyhkee2yeUNSI4Lj9xB8pDleVo3NCnXlaXdvzYowe3jkBrNCD6rDi3x4zwSnEKvuVjisDpbBAa991jRWnkDUQbMTGu789PxYRlPWBUe2aKz0xH0XDmH-fOklEfdTmMVW1-ifXiTmoMd3ApHNV0fbEF85Ib1xcCY02a2AibJEyXAIqpBpmvZ0mX5YSG0Ph_39a-afMXiKLunAt6TRRLMBiVCiQl3CjcagK-WkjIjVuzq8IitW94LOgJ3YMnfEphA0rjWpfqVgq7dSWcrvBZkpu9Aitw1JmpdDt8YNm6f72vlIDM46Q4tYVaNTI69nyQNT72yR6OiZK5XVXg3otz-_ZRfFevszLshcdSaL7D1wv3m1124HS47xTc-gb97sX-7rPcUg_zS6_jtYfeBI2S7TtJu2085CE4hR-4fWVLkG-hjuOZ5KJ5I179uOe8jnlf_FlUZ3C8R10YSNTZ76h3)_
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but to**fight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose.**

I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society.

While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating.

**You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. **

**[Will you chip in $1, $5, or even $50 to help me win this battle?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6d9e51776b68473d9c8e1a653fb58020&_e=5YpZIGIDeTMgLGKPLN44DMr2bzAD-aIWw3JJEQnrUpB75r8jOeKwVGab8fD77RDgfI-N2e5ZYRsHAaGzUZehf7DELGxlPD4yhgAQK1KYIXHRuX57sEItowl98Ov7faxfxVbNA1joEi6HWpTdiD9oqeZmf2q3sE4ujiftjAZz_eUG9j3yw-dA7fEVuEwzaApda2WK7B7rRrsT-AgtUrmev_e9fYv0WYDaxg0ssqH4Y3RO8cyn6z99Iv1yhErNKARgjM_o_cm2rJ4aDe0PbEGyDZF-4L6i8w7QVp3_7crKDZxcHxukutCOeCAj68v20kWZTutWLUAXRpe7rxOddVFvjGozgfhsjtUVXmSu47MLxjjtoOj9MWuXQNqBO3glHe28jNDpKJpZe3Y_DpgfdFTS8zFrYW8NhpsnykwKKiEmiLVnLHylY9aqx5sViMBDvS88hN_P5_P_arv5Dc1ZwgD5HMOBRTpq_JgOiT07qZXehBSiEXQ6m_knwESuCIkkR4k45GcVrbZy-zAhrTMzvIWn_hHXZLH7onIMkPpVDPXrtvqgNR8IBgSffFGEq-sraGw2m8gh5w4B6uwTXSQ30f0lsPjx0Z9oukTCxXBQJGJulYpRTBTuUtZJftKXhwK6g0O3t0TcDVkQixslOu2MKIylJzvlx4nILw8pRQd50c10guMNCq0zexZ2Pb5lrCw7c1o4qkPtRvtZ7rxUCzDfqRfITZtlS1nK8E_k6sCH0jOvwHgjJ9xXUxkq6fJBpDp_SU8z)**

Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield.

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. With your help, I know we can flip this Senate seat for the Republican Party - but that will require you getting involved TODAY. And you have a choice.

clean_body: This woman may not technically speak for the Democrat Party, but she has captured the essence of what her fellow members of Congress believe. | Fellow Conservative, “Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.” Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values. They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it. As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions. And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but tofight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose. I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society. While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating. You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. I grew up playing hockey. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after 9/11. I served because I love this country, wanted to make my mom proud, and knew I had something to give. Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. With your help, I know we can flip this Senate seat for the Republican Party - but that will require you getting involved TODAY. And you have a choice. I’ve earned advanced degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins. I’ve trained in nuclear deterrence. I’ve worked across cultures, built teams under pressure, and led calmly when it mattered most. But none of that compares to the challenge ahead of me now — earning your trust and building a movement powerful enough to flip this seat. I’m not asking for a blank check. I’m asking for a chance. Because we still live in a country worth defending. Respect and results still matter. And I believe people like you are ready to fight — not with insults, but with action. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Peter!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , **Peter**!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign to demand the release of all U.S. political prisoners, including people in ICE detention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We’ve got to fight back against the racist-in-chief’s white supremacist agenda. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWm1exUeTkpkyziA8hUURkqEfo9TzlLOtkezXsJo6aKcIS7t__EZvWwH9bFH_fOVm8LG-YRYAF2z6-G27-9W2rPLUjUarWZkczmy6i0pwGdEq98bfM60y-CdlsVQFbc6fADJPYyHLeAymg39NvkVpW8_tfeehg5x6WQdkkhMxgVLXCLgZQps1peGXg_iFJYFH3zhkQ1RhRmBe78N66AMc0zF48qzkPccIQBVwWSxrLlWXjO7mtmDjeaUxESwd4JznHFYaajYa6K4KpCs6AAWN1pdicMdohSBQpA6mXM1INOMxzBYVt3OHIAvLMFBO4PILL/4jd/JXkKQfHfTZe-dN3ev1MR6w/h0/h001.hj-mlZZaqkhfISkhnf38MS-vi8BGvWA4mbXWLci-PqQ)
---
Friend, The fascist-in-chief is militarizing Black neighborhoods, attacking civil rights, and censoring Black history. Last week he criticized the National Museum of African American History and Culture for focusing on “how bad slavery was,” and he’s trying to reinstall taken-down Confederate monuments.1 We’ve got to fight back against this white supremacist agenda. Right now we’re in a month known as Black August: a time to honor Black people who’ve resisted state violence and struggled for Black liberation—particularly Black people who’ve been assassinated or imprisoned for this work. This tradition began in California prisons in the 1970s and continues around the country and the world. **Black August is a time to recommit to the fight for Black liberation, and to lift up organizers’ primary demand to release all U.S. political prisoners (people who are locked up for their political beliefs or for political aims).** This is especially urgent as Trump jails more protesters and immigrants. Black immigrants in particular face higher rates of criminalization and deportation than immigrants of other races. Unfortunately, they’re targeted by the same unjust criminal legal system that over-polices Black Americans. [**Will you sign on to demand the release of all U.S. political prisoners, including people in ICE detention?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila98o29zS0HEwgq6nJr6U7hrs7AFVxN6GI7e_V-Kh8v7wamyDt0KzMf1dkg07aQM0guCFGleJxI5r_09LDsIySj6_RgeJLpPVPGiu6agwYhQwAMWkLaOI-WCxZ4dNdHEEv3OmxHwePEHBl9xPgFIDU1AQb3JoLx4YavtnfFqJVoLf7F5c_7JFbTj_Pfr3E5_g5krj_kMYZKI8FjGBNcHFftt_-McdjROHTsgdsdV4hZzQZ6sm2WPbnqOqJIUYRtAUcxovApooPL4yoHiyhOy-lKWaaPArKoEjC4Gzt2da47WB0Pga6UFnokKeT_V9Mbw6sxDWdfc1K2zf2rI3LkY3lbv43cZiKRwXdCS8SUaK8l3vorVCnQ_8xouUmEKkg4L9g8cuHiGx0ZrXZvsoquvfKOvilF8z9-WximvC2pmAOcpGnteyOwD_0kVXJ5IhsEyHwO-nylPupnQUQtAWiaIjzGYR0KYIIuH3iU4H4vyhO0En1cmY4SMvOL1Q7MpFYc6QNd/4jd/JXkKQfHfTZe-dN3ev1MR6w/h1/h001.RV2hFYMlUpASwrLnptGmS67ZluIadusTtrGFSrC6OZU) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila98o29zS0HEwgq6nJr6U7hrs7AFVxN6GI7e_V-Kh8v7wamyDt0KzMf1dkg07aQM0guCFGleJxI5r_09LDsIySj6_RgeJLpPVPGiu6agwYhQwAMWkLaOI-WCxZ4dNdHEEv3KFXB4ekYMzX8xevH4IXaW0FZNKRPxQbS3EOf8PC7RikIJZ0Ic3GkU2_4G7v6mZVGUVk1l2rWw5RST4tS22dKPQSRSOjU51KDm6jXu0hQHA-bxQzFtG-Wx26XM0UFYgXSQ9VDvhVmEkHyBhD-GbJxxZPf64LOaZcAa6jAsfO2f4IClO-esHdStz5k440l8wkKR-sRIPYUVG06Y2uSFA7CvWGIK4FejWXjpGE1sjbQeOAOnCT8Bt7nSXzyG7Pkf9k8Di518prNO-Hg-fU5f_xETrrxARRt0GtaNRZJyULr5O9CVhtCtLfK_jzuDFArBtRKCRsMFkEcs73QYNnrtzFANRpKkLngwE0i8SMEtyGBCacm8q0IDBLquRfWSBww4Wrz/4jd/JXkKQfHfTZe-dN3ev1MR6w/h2/h001.pwZncTJECvih_QvHwTzeWaVEWDa2i8w04GPZOiAHXwY)
---
Early in the pandemic I introduced legislation to free incarcerated people from prisons and ICE detention centers in order to mitigate the spread of COVID-19, which is still urgently relevant: This month most detainees in “Alligator Alcatraz” have had COVID symptoms.2
The administration is expanding ICE enforcement and detention, which means even more people will be trapped in the inhumane and overcrowded conditions that are characteristic of ICE detention centers. We must stop these human rights abuses.
As the administration expands repression and kidnappings in cities across the country, people are rising up to resist state violence.
I will continue advocating against ever-growing spending on policing, prisons, and war—and instead demanding much-needed investments in Black communities who’ve struggled due to chronic disinvestment and systemic racism.

clean_body: We’ve got to fight back against the racist-in-chief’s white supremacist agenda. | | | Friend, The fascist-in-chief is militarizing Black neighborhoods, attacking civil rights, and censoring Black history. Last week he criticized the National Museum of African American History and Culture for focusing on “how bad slavery was,” and he’s trying to reinstall taken-down Confederate monuments.1 We’ve got to fight back against this white supremacist agenda. Right now we’re in a month known as Black August: a time to honor Black people who’ve resisted state violence and struggled for Black liberation—particularly Black people who’ve been assassinated or imprisoned for this work. This tradition began in California prisons in the 1970s and continues around the country and the world. Black August is a time to recommit to the fight for Black liberation, and to lift up organizers’ primary demand to release all U.S. political prisoners (people who are locked up for their political beliefs or for political aims). This is especially urgent as Trump jails more protesters and immigrants. Black immigrants in particular face higher rates of criminalization and deportation than immigrants of other races. Unfortunately, they’re targeted by the same unjust criminal legal system that over-polices Black Americans. | Early in the pandemic I introduced legislation to free incarcerated people from prisons and ICE detention centers in order to mitigate the spread of COVID-19, which is still urgently relevant: This month most detainees in “Alligator Alcatraz” have had COVID symptoms.2 The administration is expanding ICE enforcement and detention, which means even more people will be trapped in the inhumane and overcrowded conditions that are characteristic of ICE detention centers. We must stop these human rights abuses. As the administration expands repression and kidnappings in cities across the country, people are rising up to resist state violence. I will continue advocating against ever-growing spending on policing, prisons, and war—and instead demanding much-needed investments in Black communities who’ve struggled due to chronic disinvestment and systemic racism. Thank you for taking action. Together we’ll keep building the movement for racial justice, including reparations, housing and healthcare for all, clean air and water, demilitarizing our police, ending mass incarceration, and delivering true public safety. With you in the fight for freedom for all, Rashida 1 2 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

Team, Recently, some of Arizona’s most trusted journalists announced they’re leaving _The Arizona Republic._ We’ve relied on these journalists for years to ask tough questions, expose corruption in Washington, and tell the truth about what’s happening in our state. **When local news shrinks, corruption grows. If we let out-of-state corporations gut our media, everyday Arizonans will be left without the information we need to hold leaders accountable — no matter their party.** That’s not the Arizona we believe in. And that’s why we need your help. We believe in a future where Arizona’s democracy is strong, where truth still matters, and where our communities are covered by local journalists who know our neighborhoods, our schools, and our struggles. And with these reporters no longer able to report on these things, we need to double down on spreading our message to every Arizonan across the state.
