# Abrego Garcia arrest clip goes viral for shocking comment he made while cuffed
## _" Gobierno corrupto!"_
Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a 30-year-old El Salvador native and alleged MS-13 gang member, was arrested by ICE in Baltimore on Monday and went viral after calling the U.S. government "corrupt" while being led away in handcuffs, sparking online backlash about the irony of his comments.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c39a001c-34e3-40bd-92d1-61283bbae5c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Social media users quickly criticized him,** with one calling him "nothing but a petulant child" and others pointing out the "absolute irony" of someone facing deportation criticizing the very government he apparently wants to remain in. Users highlighted the contradiction in his statement, with comments like "So corrupt he still wants to stay here" and "He has the gall to mutter 'corrupt govt.' Criminals don't get to call anyone else corrupt."
* **Complex Legal Case:** Abrego Garcia faces human smuggling charges from a 2022 traffic stop and was deported to El Salvador in June before being brought back; he has pleaded not guilty and was released on bond last Friday, with his lawyers claiming officials offered deportation to Costa Rica in exchange for a guilty plea or threatened deportation to Uganda.

# 23-year-old Ukrainian refugee stabbed to death by homeless repeat offender: report
Iryna Zarutska, a 23-year-old Ukrainian refugee who had recently fled the war to seek safety and a new beginning in the United States, **[was fatally stabbed](https://substack.com/redirect/5695a40d-c731-4dfc-9dac-c6daa1d4b378?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at a Charlotte, North Carolina light rail station on Friday night just before 10 p.m.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5695a40d-c731-4dfc-9dac-c6daa1d4b378?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Suspect Background:** Decarlos Brown Jr., 34, a homeless man with an extensive criminal history, was arrested and charged with first-degree murder; he has been arrested multiple times since 2011 for felony larceny, robbery with a dangerous weapon, and communicating threats, and previously served five years in prison.
* **Mental Health Problems:** Brown currently faces pending charges for misusing the 911 system in January, when during a police welfare check he told authorities he believed someone had given him "man-made" material inside his body that controlled his eating, walking, and talking.
* **Community Impact:** A GoFundMe page was established to support Zarutska's aunt and family members during this "heartbreaking time," describing her death as an "irreparable loss" for her family who had hoped she would find safety in America.

name: Tobias Read
subject: What I said on MSNBC >>
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250826em-msnbc-pet [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250826em-msnbc-pet]
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I just published a major op-ed in MSNBC because I feel a responsibility to speak out as Oregon’s top elections official.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250826em-msnbc-pet [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250826em-msnbc-pet]
Here’s what's going on:
* Oregon has run all of its elections through the mail for more than 25 years.

* Voting by mail is safe, fair, accurate — and voters across the political spectrum love it.

* Fraud is essentially nonexistent. Ballots are verified with forensic signature matching and overseen by bipartisan boards.

* Last fall, more than 75% of Oregonians cast a ballot — one of the highest participation rates in the country.

President Trump has threatened to eliminate it altogether through executive order. That would be unconstitutional, costly, and dangerous for our democracy.
I made it clear in my MSNBC article: If Congress and the president want to make our elections more secure, they should be expanding vote-by-mail, not shutting it down. And if President Trump tries to impose his executive order, Oregon is prepared to challenge it in court.
But I need the power of the people on my side. Will you add your name today to stand with me and defend vote-by-mail? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/auG4lmiVq06681BB7gmzfw2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/auG4lmiVq06681BB7gmzfw2]
Together, we can send a powerful message: our democracy belongs to the people, not to presidents who want to undermine it for political gain.
More to come,
Tobias Read
P.S. You can read my op-ed here [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/trump-vote-mail-executive-order-oregon-rcna226337] , and please share it with your friends and networks >>

name: America Fitzpatrick, LCV
subject: DEVELOPING: Campaign to protect public lands now underway in Arizona, California, Maine, Maryland, Michigan, and Oregon. MORE TO COME:
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI4NTU1MTQS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI4MDQ5ODA2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Our nation's public lands are under threat by the Trump administration. Our
pristine waterways. Our soaring forests. Our sprawling deserts. The places that
provide habitat for rare flora and fauna, clean water sources for cities and
towns, and opportunities for outdoor recreation are all at risk. But, it doesn't have to be this way.LCV just launched a series of events to push back on the sell-off of our public
lands. We’re demanding that our national parks, monuments, and other waterways
remain protected. In Colorado, Maine, Michigan, Oregon, California, and Maryland, we’re working
alongside local leaders, community members, and members of congress to fight for
public lands across the nation. We’re organizing hikes, campouts,
demonstrations, and more to call attention to the Trump administration’s
dangerous plans. Our goal is simple: KEEP PUBLIC LANDS IN PUBLIC HANDS. Nationwide efforts like this are powered by your generosity, Peter. Will you renew your LCV membership today to support our grassroots organizing and new public lands campaign? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMV0w0ms~ TIMING IS CRITICAL. Congress is about to return to Washington, D.C. — and is set
to take major votes that will decide funding levels for forest and park rangers
and other key staff who steward our public lands. We have to raise the pressure while there’s still time. https://links.messages.lcv. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/9zEZMd-x- We’re going places where people connect with nature and with each other. Places
where people hike, fish, camp, kayak, and stargaze. Places where wildlife make
their homes and where millions of people get their drinking water. Places that are in severe jeopardy if the Trump administration succeeds at
selling them off. We need your help: Your support is essential to keeping the fight going and building a national network of resistance to these attempts to privatize and profit from these public lands. Renew today to join the fight to keep public lands in public hands >> https://links.messages.lcv. The Trump administration’s efforts to rollback protections for public lands are
staggering:On Trump’s first day in office, he signed several executive orders declaring a false national “energy emergency,” and called formore oil and gas leasing on public lands, including in Alaska’s vulnerable Arctic National Wildlife Refuge.
He’s on a mission to rescind national monuments, especially ones recently created or expanded, like California’s Chuckwalla and Utah’s Bears Ears.
He’s fired thousands of staff members in the Department of the Interior and installed anti-conservation extremists to allow destructive commercial logging in national forests and roll back critical clean water safeguards. That’s why our campaign is so important, Peter. Please join us by renewing today to support our new public lands tour and ongoing work to make sure we defend our nation’s shared lands and most cherished landscapes >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_RcA0~ With hope,

America Fitzpatrick
LCV Conservation Program Director
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12855514&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDQ5ODA2MQS2&spReportId=MjI4MDQ5ODA2MQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12855514&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDQ5ODA2MQS2&spReportId=MjI4MDQ5ODA2MQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVHmjLj_

name: Haley Stevens
subject: What I heard from folks like you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Not just political talking points. Real concerns from real people.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=664%2E49239%2E6KRabm)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4897?t=2&akid=664%2E49239%2E6KRabm)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save over 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now because I'm ready to ensure my hard work in the U.S. Senate continues to support Michigan's working families.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign before 11:59 p.m. tonight? My team set an ambitious goal to get 20,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 12% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4898?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=664%2E49239%2E6KRabm)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4898?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=664%2E49239%2E6KRabm)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4898?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=664%2E49239%2E6KRabm) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4897?t=6&akid=664%2E49239%2E6KRabm)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

33717 Woodward Ave #539

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: The stakes in this race have only climbed.
body:
|
#
Hi there, I hope you’re enjoying what’s left of the summer! August has flown by, and soon I’ll be heading back to Washington as Congress gets back to work. This August recess gave me the chance to spend time here at home – talking with families, small business owners, and community leaders about the challenges we’re facing and the solutions we need. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114052248/565788718/1362877131?refcode=em-8.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMThlZjA2NS1kMDgyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lr2ts6ESXDHLQx93fZAMfif8A-5lzuGCSt8ThRJzD8M=)
_Gov. Whitmer and I last week at a “Back to School” event!_ **But here’s the truth: while Congress was out of session, the stakes in this race have only climbed.** Our families are still feeling the pinch of rising costs, still worrying about the future of Social Security and Medicaid, and soon, thousands will face the threat of higher health care premiums if critical tax credits are allowed to expire. Meanwhile, national Republicans are doing nothing to lower costs or protect the programs families rely on. Instead, they’re pouring millions into attack ads in frontline districts like ours. With Republicans laser-focused on protecting their own power, they’re not going to stop the smears. They’ve made it clear they’ll do whatever it takes to flip seats like ours and hold onto their majority. [**So please friend, I’m asking you to stand with me in this fight. We’re coming up on our August end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re falling a bit short of our goal. clean_body: | Hi there, I hope you’re enjoying what’s left of the summer! August has flown by, and soon I’ll be heading back to Washington as Congress gets back to work. This August recess gave me the chance to spend time here at home – talking with families, small business owners, and community leaders about the challenges we’re facing and the solutions we need. = Gov. Whitmer and I last week at a “Back to School” event! But here’s the truth: while Congress was out of session, the stakes in this race have only climbed. Our families are still feeling the pinch of rising costs, still worrying about the future of Social Security and Medicaid, and soon, thousands will face the threat of higher health care premiums if critical tax credits are allowed to expire. Meanwhile, national Republicans are doing nothing to lower costs or protect the programs families rely on. Instead, they’re pouring millions into attack ads in frontline districts like ours. With Republicans laser-focused on protecting their own power, they’re not going to stop the smears. They’ve made it clear they’ll do whatever it takes to flip seats like ours and hold onto their majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

body:
Ten dollars. That’s the donation I’m asking you to split between me and Shontel Brown before our End of Month Deadline, Peter.

Ten dollars.

That’s the donation I’m asking you to split between me and Shontel Brown before our End of Month Deadline, Peter. No, that’s not a typo – **just $10.**

$10 to expose Team Extreme’s plans to cut Social Security and Medicare.

$10 to replace the Republican House with a Democratic majority.

$10 to hold extreme MAGA House Republicans accountable for refusing to break from Donald Trump and Elon Musk.

I know $10 might not seem like it can do all those things. But, if everyone gives a little, it adds up quickly.

[**Please, Peter: Can I count on you to contribute just $10 to me and Shontel Brown? ### Greedy monopolies/billionaires are trying to kill democracy. To celebrate workers on the front lines of these fights, we're offering [20% off all Paid Subscriptions thru Labor Day](https://substack.com/redirect/4bb6e94c-e238-43d5-8d01-5a9c9a7dd474?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.115ucU-zKaOWxHvJwYjocjsabCUNP6POkYT-PIxnUgs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=172034011)
**By David Shuster**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b88808bd-d189-40de-85f7-3f6a5598fef9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the sordid annals of American governance under the GOP, there are moments so perfectly absurd, so exquisitely obscene, they must be historically recorded and digitally preserved in whatever passes for our National Museum of Shame these days in our dying republic.
What we are now witnessing in Washington, D.C.--our supposed cradle of democracy--is precisely such a moment.
The capital city has been turned into a military garrison, ruled not by law but the whims of a lunatic strongman with delusions of Caesar dancing in his head.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5926a291-0f22-4df6-b567-2f12fc3f53d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.115ucU-zKaOWxHvJwYjocjsabCUNP6POkYT-PIxnUgs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172034011)
The man at the center of this abomination? Donald J. Trump--twice-impeached, once-defeated, perpetually-aggrieved, convicted felon.
Trump has seized the capital not in the service of liberty, but in the self-interest of ego. With all the subtlety of a tank rolling down Georgetown's M Street, he's draped the city in camouflage and contempt.
[Deploying armed National Guard troops through the streets](https://substack.com/redirect/0fdec905-fd5e-4a75-b76f-f36332198bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as if Farragut North had suddenly become Fallujah.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5c83fb27-52db-486e-a58f-29d955ee6e4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This, Trump tells us, is for our safety.
Safety, in Orwellian MAGA-speak, now means suppressing dissent with military-grade optics. It means that toddlers in strollers and seniors in grocery aisles must now share the sidewalks with rifle-toting "public servants."
Ones who take orders from a [trash can of a man](https://substack.com/redirect/51f31eaa-cd59-4feb-9229-2472c97d12cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who once tried to overturn an election based on his his own delusions and a mob of cosplaying militiamen.
It is not governance. It is theater. Bad theater. [Tinpot authoritarianism](https://substack.com/redirect/77ca2a90-2add-44bf-93f1-65878a5e4821?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) dressed up in red, white, and blue bunting.
Washington, D.C., that beleaguered capital already denied statehood many times over as well as proper representation, despite a larger population than two states. With a total G.D.P greater than 15 states. And more federal income tax contributions than 22 states.
And now it has also been robbed of even a pretense of self-rule. Militarized troops march while the D.C. mayor protests powerlessly.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.115ucU-zKaOWxHvJwYjocjsabCUNP6POkYT-PIxnUgs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172034011)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26889b50-fb77-4adc-a0aa-52755ed9bd45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Federal law enforcement, stacked with loyalist stooges in tactical uniforms, answer not to law or tradition. They answer to the whims of [one deeply insecure man](https://substack.com/redirect/efba5ad5-d332-4b47-8cfa-96bceb1924b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) whose love for flags is matched only by his disdain for what they represent.
And what about the great "crime wave" that Trump says justifies all of this? Like most Trumpian claims, it is mythological.
Conjured from a poisonous stew of cable news panic and late-night social media posts.
Crime in D.C., by all meaningful measures, has continued its long decline. The [murder rate and violent crime numbers last year, at the end of the Biden administration, reached a 30-year low](https://substack.com/redirect/0fdec905-fd5e-4a75-b76f-f36332198bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
There have been no spikes this year.
But facts in this administration are as unwelcome as ethics at a Mar-a-Lago donor dinner.
So, in place of reality, we get spectacle: [on top of gun toting troops](https://substack.com/redirect/0ea067bb-8600-42e3-a780-877422a8218b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from across the United States stationed across D.C., Trump wants to spend $2 billion in proposed "beautification," as if planting tulips beside machine guns might soften the image of military occupation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c9095929-5011-4805-9e52-29dcc569b344?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What is beautified exactly? The city's facades--or the grotesque moral rot behind them?
And now, the farce is metastasizing.
Trump, high on his own fables, declares this is merely the beginning.
[Chicago is next](https://substack.com/redirect/0fdec905-fd5e-4a75-b76f-f36332198bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). San Francisco.
Any city that fails to genuflect before Trump's creeping junta will be treated like the Iraqi city of Nasiriyah during the 2nd gulf war, only with better lighting. [Trump says the military troops are staying "for a while."](https://substack.com/redirect/0ea067bb-8600-42e3-a780-877422a8218b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.115ucU-zKaOWxHvJwYjocjsabCUNP6POkYT-PIxnUgs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172034011)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e02444a2-b48a-462e-9e6b-db97b544e8fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Translation: until Trump is removed by force, vote, or divine intervention.
This is not the behavior of a United States president.
It is the posture of a tyrant--an aspiring autocrat whose primary talents are self-pity, grievance-mongering and [forgetting what room he's in](https://substack.com/redirect/f910bf26-78c7-4df5-85aa-0bc8afcae912?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Trump governs by tantrum, legislates by threat, and enforces by photo op and military brigade.
Much of the country, or at least the sycophantic MAGA cultists and conservative media that still genuflect before Trump's golden toilet, applauds.
They cheer not for liberty, but for order. Not for freedom, but for control.
The man who dodged the draft, insulted American POWs, and refused to even visit a military cemetery in his first term because it was raining, now plays Field Marshal of the Food Court, turning the seat of democracy into a potential warzone to soothe the bruised ego of a failed casino emperor.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8d5e52c6-4caa-4b4a-8712-32f8dea8f5bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If our nation's founding fathers could see this disturbing spectacle, they'd choke on their powdered wigs. Our republic is not dead--but it is being gagged, handcuffed, and frog-marched down Constitution Avenue by [a vulgarian with a God complex](https://substack.com/redirect/b74c0646-1331-4ea1-843c-7cb57a079955?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Washington, D.C., with a population that is 42% black, 37% white, and 12% Latino has long been treated by the GOP as a colony.
Under Trump, the humiliation, disrespect, and contempt are far worse.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/173ae7d6-4811-45ec-9e46-4a4f0be66f99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

clean_body: Trump sees a border fence and he wants to paint it black | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Trump sees a border fence and he wants to paint it black | | | Aug 26 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Greedy monopolies/billionaires are trying to kill democracy. To celebrate workers on the front lines of these fights, we're offering ! By David Shuster | | ---|---|--- In the sordid annals of American governance under the GOP, there are moments so perfectly absurd, so exquisitely obscene, they must be historically recorded and digitally preserved in whatever passes for our National Museum of Shame these days in our dying republic. What we are now witnessing in Washington, D.C.--our supposed cradle of democracy--is precisely such a moment. The capital city has been turned into a military garrison, ruled not by law but the whims of a lunatic strongman with delusions of Caesar dancing in his head. | | ---|---|--- The man at the center of this abomination? Donald J. Trump--twice-impeached, once-defeated, perpetually-aggrieved, convicted felon. Trump has seized the capital not in the service of liberty, but in the self-interest of ego. With all the subtlety of a tank rolling down Georgetown's M Street, he's draped the city in camouflage and contempt. as if Farragut North had suddenly become Fallujah. | | ---|---|--- This, Trump tells us, is for our safety. Safety, in Orwellian MAGA-speak, now means suppressing dissent with military-grade optics. It means that toddlers in strollers and seniors in grocery aisles must now share the sidewalks with rifle-toting "public servants." Ones who take orders from a who once tried to overturn an election based on his his own delusions and a mob of cosplaying militiamen. It is not governance. It is theater. Bad theater. dressed up in red, white, and blue bunting. Washington, D.C., that beleaguered capital already denied statehood many times over as well as proper representation, despite a larger population than two states. With a total G.D.P greater than 15 states. And more federal income tax contributions than 22 states. And now it has also been robbed of even a pretense of self-rule. Militarized troops march while the D.C. mayor protests powerlessly. | | ---|---|--- Federal law enforcement, stacked with loyalist stooges in tactical uniforms, answer not to law or tradition. They answer to the whims of whose love for flags is matched only by his disdain for what they represent. And what about the great "crime wave" that Trump says justifies all of this? Like most Trumpian claims, it is mythological. Conjured from a poisonous stew of cable news panic and late-night social media posts. Crime in D.C., by all meaningful measures, has continued its long decline. The . There have been no spikes this year. But facts in this administration are as unwelcome as ethics at a Mar-a-Lago donor dinner. So, in place of reality, we get spectacle: from across the United States stationed across D.C., Trump wants to spend $2 billion in proposed "beautification," as if planting tulips beside machine guns might soften the image of military occupation. | | ---|---|--- What is beautified exactly? The city's facades--or the grotesque moral rot behind them? And now, the farce is metastasizing. Trump, high on his own fables, declares this is merely the beginning. . San Francisco. Any city that fails to genuflect before Trump's creeping junta will be treated like the Iraqi city of Nasiriyah during the 2nd gulf war, only with better lighting. | | ---|---|--- Translation: until Trump is removed by force, vote, or divine intervention. This is not the behavior of a United States president. It is the posture of a tyrant--an aspiring autocrat whose primary talents are self-pity, grievance-mongering and . Trump governs by tantrum, legislates by threat, and enforces by photo op and military brigade. Much of the country, or at least the sycophantic MAGA cultists and conservative media that still genuflect before Trump's golden toilet, applauds. They cheer not for liberty, but for order. Not for freedom, but for control. The man who dodged the draft, insulted American POWs, and refused to even visit a military cemetery in his first term because it was raining, now plays Field Marshal of the Food Court, turning the seat of democracy into a potential warzone to soothe the bruised ego of a failed casino emperor. | | ---|---|--- If our nation's founding fathers could see this disturbing spectacle, they'd choke on their powdered wigs. Our republic is not dead--but it is being gagged, handcuffed, and frog-marched down Constitution Avenue by . Washington, D.C., with a population that is 42% black, 37% white, and 12% Latino has long been treated by the GOP as a colony. Under Trump, the humiliation, disrespect, and contempt are far worse. | | ---|---|--- * David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of Greedy monopolies/billionaires are trying to kill democracy. To celebrate workers on the front lines of these fights, we're offering ! name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: Protect voting rights—right here, right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
On this anniversary of the 19th Amendment, let’s recommit to the fight for voting rights.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40071%2E3422442%2EE82cnL)
Peter,
Today marks 105 years since women won the right to vote with the certification of the 19th Amendment. But instead of celebrating this victory for equality, we are forced to confront a new challenge: _Donald Trump is actively trying to roll back voting rights today._
**[Katie Porter will stand up to Trump’s attacks on voting rights as California’s next governor. Chip in today to help us fight back >>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250826_1_ak?refcode=em20250826-40071&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40071_3422442_E82cnL&akid=40071%2E3422442%2EE82cnL)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250826_1_ak?refcode=em20250826-40071&refcode2=40071_3422442_E82cnL&akid=40071%2E3422442%2EE82cnL)
Trump is promising to end mail-in voting, he’s threatening election workers, and he’s pressuring Republican-led states to gerrymander their congressional maps so he can steal the 2026 midterm elections before a single vote is cast.
Why is he doing this? Because he knows Republicans will lose control of Congress in 2026. Americans are fed up with Trump’s cost-of-living increases, his draconian round-ups of innocent immigrants, and his attempts to dismantle our democracy. We want to have a check on his power as President, but he’s doing everything he can to prevent it.
The 19th Amendment was hard-won and set us on the path to building a country that works for everyone. **But that progress is at risk as Trump attacks our ability to cast a ballot and hold fair elections.**
On this important milestone let’s recommit to the fight for voting rights—right here, right now.
**[Peter, can you pitch in $5 to help us protect fair elections and elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250826_1_ak?refcode=em20250826-40071&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40071_3422442_E82cnL&akid=40071%2E3422442%2EE82cnL)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250826_1_ak?refcode=em20250826-40071&refcode2=40071_3422442_E82cnL&akid=40071%2E3422442%2EE82cnL)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250826-40071&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40071_3422442_E82cnL&akid=40071%2E3422442%2EE82cnL)**

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: A difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
We are going to have to make a very difficult decision in the near future, and you need to know about it.

We are going to have to make a very difficult decision in the near future, and you need to know about it.
It is becoming increasingly clear that we need to get up on television as soon as we can. Our opponents have already started spending because one wealthy man with a history of giving to extremist causes is funding it himself.
So we need to go up, and soon. But we don't have the funds right now to be confident we can sustain our ads until the end without going down. That would be a disaster.
Going up is a risk. But the bet we're making is that if we do go up and we ask you to fill the budget gaps it'd create that you will -- for Gavin -- for control of the House.
[**So with that in mind: can you make a $3 contribution to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee to help us pass the Election Rigging Reform Act? If we can reach the voters we need to reach, we will win. But we need the resources to get it done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250826&refcode2=2499_4767699_UtYBDU&akid=2499%2E4767699%2EUtYBDU)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=2499%2E4767699%2EUtYBDU).

clean_body: We are going to have to make a very difficult decision in the near future, and you need to know about it. We are going to have to make a very difficult decision in the near future, and you need to know about it. It is becoming increasingly clear that we need to get up on television as soon as we can. Our opponents have already started spending because one wealthy man with a history of giving to extremist causes is funding it himself. So we need to go up, and soon. But we don't have the funds right now to be confident we can sustain our ads until the end without going down. That would be a disaster. Going up is a risk. But the bet we're making is that if we do go up and we ask you to fill the budget gaps it'd create that you will -- for Gavin -- for control of the House. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Like we said, this is a tough call. But you've shown how committed you are to getting this passed. That means a lot to Governor Newsom. Thank you, Team Newsom

name: CA Election Alert
subject: Only one Democrat voted against redistricting. Can you guess who?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
We deserve leaders who will fight back against Trump and the GOP. |
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114053529/565792311/1981932150?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTNhMjI3YmQtZDM4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z3dh3bmPfnEwVvlBsCDSFzwMs_Kc4PEa4Y7eLw9CLCU=)
The California State Assembly just passed the Election Rigging Response Act to stop Donald Trump from seizing complete control of our elections. Only _one_ Democrat voted against it. _**Can you guess who?**_ [_****_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114053530/565792312/1981932150?refcode=em-8.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTNhMjI3YmQtZDM4Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z3dh3bmPfnEwVvlBsCDSFzwMs_Kc4PEa4Y7eLw9CLCU=)**That’s right: Randy’s primary opponent, Jasmeet Bains.** At a time when Republicans are doing everything they can to gerrymander districts and silence the voices of working families, Jasmeet sided with them. It’s unacceptable. And let’s be clear: by voting with Republicans, Jasmeet gave cover to the very same extremists who are attacking our democracy, our freedoms, and our future. That’s not leadership – _that’s betrayal._ We deserve leaders who will fight back against Trump and the GOP. And here in the Central Valley, we can’t afford Democrats who enable Republican power grabs. The stakes couldn’t be higher. With redistricting likely to be on the ballot this fall, every decision shapes the future of our representation, our communities, and our chance to finally flip CA-22. **[There has never been a more important time to support Democrat Randy Villegas than right now. Only one Democrat voted against it. Can you guess who? ’s right: Randy’s primary opponent, Jasmeet Bains. At a time when Republicans are doing everything they can to gerrymander districts and silence the voices of working families, Jasmeet sided with them. It’s unacceptable. name: GOTV PAC
subject: Help us keep billionaires out of our courts!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07132025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Elon Musk thought he could buy the Wisconsin Supreme Court last April. He poured millions into the race, flew in wearing a cheesehead, and even literally handed out million-dollar checks.
And what happened? Voters sent his candidate packing by 10 points.
That “People vs. Musk” campaign showed the country that when grassroots Democrats organize, even the richest man in the world can’t buy our democracy. Musk is now backing away from politics because his name is toxic.
Now it’s Pennsylvania’s turn.
This November, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court is on the line, and if Republicans and their billionaire backers flip it, they’ll have a powerful weapon to gut voting rights, attack reproductive freedom, and greenlight gerrymanders for years to come.
GOTV PAC is bringing our winning Wisconsin playbook to Pennsylvania: phone banks, voter turnout, and grassroots power that beats dark money. But we can only do it if supporters like you step up right now.
Can you rush a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can to GOTV PAC today? Together we’ll defend the Pennsylvania Supreme Court and send another message that billionaires can’t buy our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08262025]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. clean_body: [] Peter , Elon Musk thought he could buy the Wisconsin Supreme Court last April. He poured millions into the race, flew in wearing a cheesehead, and even literally handed out million-dollar checks. And what happened? Voters sent his candidate packing by 10 points.
